Revealing that note might twist his future in the oddest ways. Tick-tock, tick-tock!
Oh well, at exactly 11:34 PM tonight, you'll regret ignoring me. Just a hunch.
Hmm, the clock strikes 2:22 PM tomorrow, and something not very nice might just happen.
Your destiny at 6:03 AM seems rather bleak without helping me, don't you think?
Tick-tock, around 9:45 PM, I foresee a stubbed toe in your future. Just saying.
It's 2:33, are you finally finished with that task?
By 5:27 PM, you'll wish you'd smashed those spiders for Pax. Strange how time works, huh?

name: Emerald Flame

goals.label: All of the Blackened Pages required
Burn the papers in the green flame

journal: The task is done, but the pages remain restless. Perhaps they seek the green flame...
objectives: The papers yearn for the green illumination on the island.
goalTexts: Burn the papers in the green flame
All of the Blackened Pages required

name: Energized Spirits

goals.label: Throw the ingredients into the barrel of ale near Tor

journal: Tor Drostin Steppe, Central Fort. Search for the ale to the northeast. You'll find the North Winery, northwest of the Adventurer's Outpost.
objectives: Don't be forgettin' that Elanian Ale I asked for it might be our only hope. The ingredients should be in the north winery. West side of the bay, right?
goalTexts: Throw the ingredients into the barrel of ale near Tor

npc: That's the very elixir I've been achin' for might just save me sanity.
Ah, bless yer heart! Ye've no idea how much this means to me.
Ah, there ye are... Did ye bring it? The sobriety's crushing me shoulders.
Right, just walk away. Not like the weight's crushing me or anything.
Fine then, leave me to wrestle these demons meself.
Thank ye kindly. This war's weighin' heavy on me.
Ah, so that's how it is... I'll manage on me own.
This means a lot to me.
Safe travels, and be careful out there.
Figures. Can't count on anyone when the boots get muddy.
Grand. Just grand. Another shoulder turned.
There's a spoilsport somewhere around here!
Would ye help me energize this party? Let's give the lads a night to remember before the next storm hits.
I've heard whispers of ingredients for Elanian Ale tucked away at the north winery now that'd be just the thing.
We need more than the usual ale a drink that'll stir the soul and steady the nerves.
But the weight of this warfront's got me feelin' like a kettle about to boil over.
With the forts finally united, I thought we might seize a rare chance to raise a glass.
Ye've brought a glimmer of hope to these weary eyes.
Here, take this it's the least I can offer for easing this burden.
I just need a hand with one last thing before we celebrate...
Up north, on the west side of the bay head up there and look for the ingredients, then toss 'em in a barrel to brew ale!

name: Escape Pod
journal: Retrieve the access code to enter the escape pod.
objectives: Obtain the access code to enter the escape pod.

npc: Quest perspective phrases
Access Denied.
Beep Boop Access Denied. Access Code Required For Single Launch.
Code Required.
One Access Granted.
Prepare for launch.

name: Essence of the Wild

goals.label: Collect Essence of a Werewolf Soldier

target.label: Essence Werewolf
target.landmark: Find a Werewolf Soldier on Prison Island, and beat it down to within an inch of its life

journal: Dwarfaton Ironchek Windstone Village, Windstone blacksmith yard Find a Werewolf Soldier on Prison Island, and beat it down to within an inch of its life. Then use the Essence Extractor and return the item to Dwarfaton.
objectives: Remember, use the Essence Extractor on a Half-Alive Werewolf Soldier when it's down to 10 percent health.
goalTexts: Collect Essence of a Werewolf Soldier

npc: Get the essence and drag it here then we'll be done with this foul job.
To finish purifying that cursed saddle, I need something rare... the Essence of a Werewolf.
Weaken one of those beasts until it's on its last legs... about 10 percent of its strength.
Let's see... Yes! This is exactly what I needed.
Ah, perhaps another time then.
Excellent! I knew I could count on you.
You're back! Were you able to get the essence?
The Essence Extractor's finally ready fresh off the forge and still spitting sparks.
Not just any werewolf, mind you... a Half-Alive Werewolf Soldier lurking on Prison Island.
Take the gun, knock the mutt down to ten percent, then pull the trigger and pray it doesn't bite back.
I see. Well, if you change your mind, you know where to find me.
No worries. The task isn't for everyone.
You've done a fine job, truly.
And as promised, a cleansed Rivetgrip Saddle. I'm sure you'll put it to good use.
Test Player
player: bug quest item essence of the wild

name: Evidence in the Shadows

target.label: Note of evidence
target.landmark: Search the Great Steppes Stronghold to the west for any evidence that may uncover the secret plan

journal: Tor Drostin Steppe, Central Fort. Search the Great Steppes Stronghold to the west for any evidence that may uncover the secret plan.
objectives: We need any evidence you can find in Great Steppes Stronghold. Look for notes or documents that reveal their true intentions.

npc: With this evidence, we can prepare accordingly.
Thank you for your help. You've done us a great service.
These documents confirm my suspicions.
This is exactly what we needed.
You're back. Did you find anything?
I understand. It's a risky task.
Any notes, documents, or clues you find could be vital to our cause.
Very well. If you change your mind, I'll be here.
Thank you. I knew I could count on someone like you.
Remember, we can't let them know we're onto them.
I see. Not everyone is cut out for this kind of work.
Excellent. Be cautious and keep a low profile..
As someone new to the front, you can move around without raising suspicion.
We need proof to act.
They're claiming there's an ecological collapse.
I've been noticing some unsettling behavior from the Lightbearers lately.
So, you think the Lightbearers are behind this whole war?
I need you to discreetly search Great Steppe Stronghold and gather any evidence of their plans.
I knew Tor would see the light!
I've been doing some snooping in Barnaby's quarters, and noticed some folders that were absolutely not supposed to be seen.
They were false flag documents, trying to get us up here through any means necessary.
There was never an ecological collapse, it was a lie by the Lightbearers to move us up north!

name: Exit Stage Left

target.label: Gnoos
target.landmark: Head into the Riverrise Fields to find gnats for poison

journal: Zazz Blorb Riverrise, Scene. Head into the Riverrise Fields to find gnats for poison. Locate the quitting papers on the table next to the stage.
objectives: Hurry up! The papers are on a table near the stage. The poison, well, the poison comes from the midges.
goalTexts: Return Zazz's Quitting Papers to Soko Uno

npc: You don't know how much this means to me. Soko's got me cornered.
Please, I'm begging you, don't tell anyone I'm pretending to be Cherry.
If you can't help, at least keep my secret safe. I don't need Soko finding out.
Listen, if you won't get the papers, promise me you won't tell Soko who I really am.
Wait... what the hell is even that? Is this midge poison? You fools!
I've spent the last 9 years building up a resistance to this shit. I knew this would happen! It's because I'm too good isn't it?
I've reached my breaking point. Soko Uno paid me to pretend to be Cherry and make her the official lead, but I can't go through with it. It's all too much!
I don't even know what happened to Cherry Mobius, but Soko's got me tiptoeing on a tightrope, and I'm about to fall. I need an exit plan.
Something strange is going on with her, and this is the only way I know to deal with it.
What's this? Papers from Zazz Blorb?
Look, I need you to grab my quitting papers from that table near the stage and give them to Soko Uno... with a little extra.
You brought this to me, so now you're in. You're going to help me fix this mess, or you're next!
What?! Zazz is quitting? That spineless worm!
Gather some poison from midges in the Riverrise Fields west of town. Take that poison, and smear it all over those papers.
Do you even know what this means?! If one more person finds out, I swear, I will end them!

name: Exotic Attire Acquisition
journal: Yassma Riverrise, City Center. Search the tents behind the bar for these items.
objectives: So, um, remember the hat, coat, pants, and t-shirt? Yeah, I still need those...

npc: Did you... get the outfit? No rush or anything, just checking!
Wow, you're actually doing this? Okay, deep breaths, Yassma. We got this!
Oh wow, this is really happening! Thanks?
So, uh, these aren't stolen-stolen, right? Just... borrowed?
Oh boy, I hope this works. Please let this work.
I totally owe you a million awkward hugs. Although you have to pay for those.
I need a hat, a coat, pants, and, uh, a t-shirt. If you could 'borrow' these for me, it would really help. I mean, who notices a missing t-shirt, right?
Oh, did I just make things awkward? Sorry, forget I asked.
Right, stealing. Yeah, that was a bad idea. My bad.
Oh geez, I probably sounded like a weirdo. Never mind!
Yeah, it s a bit... unconventional, but... desperate times!
I heard there are some clothes that might work behind the bar at the tents.
I want to join the Velvet Vipers, but they said my outfit screams 'apocalypse tourist' rather than 'sizzling siren.'
Hey, so, um, I ve got a... unique request.

name: Explosive Revenge

target.label: Explosive Powder Jugs
target.landmark: Go to the TNT shop and pick up 5 explosive jugs

journal: Maverick "Mav" Gritt Riverrise, Alcohol truck. Go to the TNT shop and pick up 5 explosive jugs.
objectives: Get off yer lazy ass and find those damn explosive bottles! Check around the goddamn TNT shop in Riverrise. Can't miss those orange jugs!

npc: Is that more liquid gold for old Rusty? Tell me you got some good stuff!
I knew you'd have the guts! Now let's give Rusty a taste of real hellfire!
Hic, h-hic, what do we have here? New s-supplies for old Rusty?
Beep boop, calculation c-complete. DELICIOUS.
Drinks uh, explosives, you say? Hic, you sure know how to surprise a bot.
It has quite the kick. Fortunately, I am explosive proof.
Bzzt, bonus validated. Rusty's g-gonna have a blast with this, hic.
Recompense c-c-calibration complete. Bring Rusty more booze, and you will be rewarded.
That damned Rusty McDrinkit's gone and done it now! Busting up my truck and chugging all my booze.
I'm fed up with that tin can wrecking my work.
I'm fixin' to send that scrap heap to kingdom come. We're talking a nice, big boom with some fine explosive powder.
I need ya to sneak over to the TNT shop and grab me some of that explosive powder in the orange bottles.
Take 'em over to the robot, and I'll set fire to 'em while he's holdin' 'em.
Be quick and keep your head down, no need to attract any extra heat.
Damn it! You ain't got the guts? Fine, get outta here!
To hell with it, I'll find someone else with some backbone!
What the hell? Rusty's gonna keep rampaging thanks to you! Git!

name: But Wait, There's Boar!

target.label: Boarmammoth
target.landmark: Hunt Boarmammoths in the woods around Goldenfield and collect their snouts after butchering the beasts

journal: Butch O'Hara Goldenfield, Barn. Hunt Boarmammoths in the woods around Goldenfield and collect their snouts after butchering the beasts.
objectives: Venture into the woods surrounding Goldenfield, that s where you'll find your prey. It's not going to be easy. It may be best to group with some of those other lowlives.

npc: Go on then, let's see what you’re made of!
Well, well, how's the hunt going?
I'll be a monkey's uncle! You've done it!
Good luck out there, you'll need it.
Remember, it's not just about the hunt, it's about the skill and respect you earn.
Holy Hell. Now I don't gotta string ya up across the barn.
I've heard you've been helping out, but bringing a green turtle shell to Martha is one thing. Real skill is shown in mastering the art of butchery.
I've got a challenge for you. Legends say that tracking and killing each breed of boarmammoth is the ultimate test of any butcher's skill.
It's no easy task, but I believe you've got what it takes.
Ah, I thought you had more grit in you.
Not everyone is cut out for the butcher's path.
No worries, maybe another time.

name: A Taste of Home

target.label: Salt
target.landmark: Help Berg Stonefoot relive his grandma's famous Roasted Poultry Leg

target.label: Poultry leg
target.landmark: Help Berg Stonefoot relive his grandma's famous Roasted Poultry Leg

journal: Berg Stonefoot Goldenfield, near Forest Camp Help Berg Stonefoot relive his grandma's famous Roasted Poultry Leg. Bring him Salt, and 2 Poultry Legs.
objectives: Get Salt and Poultry Legs. Turkey tastes the best, but they're mostly in the forest. You might be able to snatch a chicken or a goose from the locals.

npc: Fantastic! I can already taste the juicy, delicious poultry. Less diarrhea.
Any luck finding those poultry legs yet?
Can't wait to taste that roasted poultry again!
Oh, you're the best! Guess not everyone coming from that portal is trouble...
Get Salt, and Poultry Legs. Turkey tastes the best, but they're mostly in the forest. However, you might be able to snatch a chicken or a goose from locals.
Of course, you're buying. Right?
Oh, did you forget the bucket? Guess I'll have to go to the drive thru instead...
Remember, salt and poultry legs! Granny would've had your head if you forgot one.
Oh, I can almost taste my granny's famous Roasted Poultry Leg. Juice dribbling down my chin, smoky aroma filling the air.
Salt, and poultry legs, simple yet perfect. The bucket that said Kwalat Fried Chicken on the side.
The magic lies in the recipe, the ratios, and the 7 secret herbs and spices. It's like a sonnet to the taste buds.
Now, turkey, that's the king of poultry: the juiciest and the tastiest. They mostly roam about in the forest. Turkey? Do you have turkey on your world?
If you're light on your feet, you could snatch a chicken or a goose from the locals unnoticed. Doubt they can tell you portalers apart
So, what do you say? Help me relive a taste of home and in return, I'll make you privy to granny's secret recipe. Trust me, it's a treasure worth more than any gold.
No? Well, it was worth a shot!
I'll just keep spewing shit all over the road, thanks.

name: Greta's Grudging Gourd Gathering

target.label: Mana Vial
target.landmark: Help Greta Grubb with her pumpkin harvest by finding a Mana Vial to fuel her robot helper

journal: Greta Grubb Goldenfield, near Southern house Help Greta Grubb with her pumpkin harvest by finding a Mana Vial to fuel her robot helper.
objectives: Don't forget that Mana Vial, got it? That robot helper of mine ain't gonna fuel itself! You can find them in chests, barrels, or crates. Or if you re feeling handy, you can craft one at the alchemy station!

npc: You did it! You're a real hero, you know that?
Oh, you're a gem! I'll be here, sorting through these stubborn pumpkins.
Any luck with that mana yet?
Don't keep a lady waiting too long, okay?
Still hunting for that Mana Vial?
People around here don't take kindly to folk from the portals, but maybe you can change their minds.
No hard feelings. I'm sure you've got your own fish to fry.
Well, don't you worry. I'll manage. I always do.
Oh, well that's a shame. I was looking forward to your company..
Mana vials are sometimes stashed in barrels that the farmers forget about.
Just think of it as an adventure. You do like adventures, don't you?
The bot is fresh out. If you could find a Mana Vial, it'd be much appreciated.
People say the mana reservoirs are drying up. The town is running out, thanks to you people.
It's that blue stuff you see in the green tech around here.
My tech around here runs on mana - some of the only stuff that burns clean.
Harvest time's upon us, and I could use an extra pair of hands. Don't want outworlders stealing it.
You know, life around here can be a hoot, but sometimes, it's all work, work, work.

name: Farmyard Mayhem

target.label: Spiders
target.landmark: Head north to the Ripplecrop Fields and collect spider eggs on the ground or off of spiders

journal: Hank Thornbuckle Goldenfield, Efge farm. Head north to the Ripplecrop Fields and collect spider eggs on the ground or off of spiders.
objectives: Son, you gotta step up and take care of those spider eggs.

npc: Leaving before the job's done isn't something a real man does.
Seriously? Walking away now makes you a coward.
Go to the Ripplecrop Fields north, through the forest, and bring me back some spider eggs. I need to know how they taste and why they're tearing up the fields.
Good job handling those spiders. That's how you take care of family.
According to this podcast I listen to, there's something in the water making 'em horny.
You better have handled those spiders and brought back breakfast.
Get out there and show those spiders who's the real alpha.
Well, if you truly want to make amends, we could use some help around the farms up north.
The spiders have been more aggressive lately, and it's affecting our profits... and 'Lil Timmy's' plans.
You dare accuse my boy of stealing an artifact? How could you!
But don't think we're done yet. There's always more to do on the farm.
Timmy needs good examples, not someone who quits. Do better.
Timmy needs a strong role model, and you're showing him the right way.
I need you to bring me some of those horny eggs!

name: Feathers and Fury

target.label: Chicken
target.landmark: Choke 6 chickens around Goldenfield

journal: Lily Baxter Goldenfield, South farm Choke 6 chickens around Goldenfield.
objectives: Remember, six chickens. Don't chicken out now!

npc: What, are you scared? I'll tell my mom you're a chicken!
You're such a coward! Wait till the grown-ups hear about this!
Be sneaky, though. We don t want Grandma or the guards to catch wind of this.
All you have to do is head over to the Chicken Farm and take out 6 of those cluckers.
How about... we frame him for chicken murder? Yes, that's perfect!
So, Buck thinks I stole some artifact? I've never even been to Falling Planes!
That little shit can't prank anyone from juvie.
This is going to be legendary! Here's your reward.
Fine, be a loser! I'll get someone else, and everyone will know you're a wimp!
Yes! You did it! Now all that's left is to plant the evidence on Buck.
Oh wow, you're back! How did it go?
You're in? Perfect! This is going to be epic!

name: Feed the Flock

target.label: Hole 1
target.landmark: Retrieve ten bundles of corn from the fields in Goldenfield town for Granny Hilde

journal: Granny Hilde Goldenfield, near Chicken farm Retrieve ten bundles of corn from the fields in Goldenfield town for Granny Hilde.
objectives: Find those holes my grandson dug up and place those in there to grow. Oh, you re just wonderful.

npc: Thank you, dearie. My chickens and I appreciate your help.
My chickens are clucking with anticipation.
Hope you didn't get lost in the cornfield.
Hope you didn't get lost in the cornfield.
Bless your heart, the chickens will be clucking with joy.
Don't forget, sweetheart, plant these with love around the field. Preferably close.
My feathered babies are looking a bit thin, they need more nutrition.
We don't have much, but I hope this'll do.
I would happily pay for your services.
Oh, but the fields are looking a little thin
Oh, well that's a shame. The chickens will be disappointed.
I understand, dear. Maybe another time.
Alright then, I suppose we'll manage.
Would you do me a favor youngin? Take these and plant them in the holes around the field.
My back is getting worse by the day and I have so many chickens to tend to.

name: Feeding Frenzy

target.label: Lacertian
target.landmark: Head to the swamps north of the marshes

journal: Max Starchaser Riverrise, City Center. Head to the swamps north of the marshes.
objectives: Remember, lacertians in the swamps north.

npc: Off you go! I ll be waiting!
Back already? My anticipation is... mounting.
Well, these little beauties are even more... toothy than I imagined.
I m starting to question my life choices, but hey, here's your reward!
Seriously? Now I'll have to find something else to flirt with.
Oh man, now my date night plans are ruined!
Really? I had my heart set on those sexy plants!
Well, there go my fantasies. Thanks a lot!
Trust me, it's going to be a wild ride. And don't worry, there'll be a nice reward for your, uh, surgical efforts. Up for it?
These slippery suckers have very potent pheromones in their uh reproductive area.
Hey there, adventurer! Word on the street is there are some lacertian creatures in the swamp north of the creeping marsh.
I would love to get my hands on some of these gonads to concoct some sensual cream.
You want off this rock? No problem, Captain Rob's gotcha.
Of course, I'll need a little coin first. Otherwise, I'll have to leave ya to the sharks.
I'll be here if ya change your mind.
Oh yeah, this'll help me get more money for Mariel.
Just you or you got fellow delinquents?
Aye aye, you're funeral dudes!
What, you gonna take a rocket chair outta here? Get real!
Lemme just count this quick... ah whatever, I trust ya!
Sails away, let's kick some waves.
If you got a group, 3,000 gold and we'll call er' even.
If it's just you, 1,000 gold and you're out!

name: Fish Prophet's Decree

target.label: Bundle of rope
target.landmark: Search the shores of the lake to the west for lures and rope

journal: Ol' Fins Windstone Vallage, Windstone Lake's. Search the shores of the lake to the west for lures and rope.
objectives: Don't forget the rope and luresss, the ansssient one drawsss near.

npc: The fissssh will wait. But beware, they might grow hungrier. Yessss.
The ansssient one mussst be ressspected, you sssee. Perhaps another time.
Bringsss me a bundle of rope and ssshiny luress, and together we shall pull the legendary fish from itsss watery realm.
Findsss the rope and luresss atsss the lake to the wessst.
The ansssient fish godsss grow ressstless. Delay not, bring me a bundle of rope and ssshiny luress.
Thisss delicate thread of mine, hisss, it won't hold againssst itsss might.
A colossal fish, untouched by time, will ssssoon rissse from the depthsss.
The ansssient fish godsss have wissspered to me.
Your act of kindnessss will be remembered by the deepsss.
Take thisss note, and let the water'sss fortune follow you.
May the ansssient fish godsss blesss you alwayssss.
Here'sssss your reward, as promissssed.
In return, I'll give you my note of legal consssnt for Triton.
Thisss will helpsss me catch the colossal fish.
Sssseer of the depthsss returnsss!
Yessss, you have the favor of the ansssient onesss.
The ansssient one demandsss a rope of legendary ssstrength.

name: No Pressure
journal: Kicheki Goldenfield, south east of the Well Turn off water supply and replace leaking pipes with new ones. Turn it back on after repairing.
objectives: Find and replace leakin pipes with new ones. You can usually find 'em in barrels or crates. Oh, and turn off the water supply first! Turn it back on after repair

npc: Good! Oh, and turn off the water supply first! Turn it back on after repair.
You actually did some good work. Aside from squashing half of my crops.
Remember, the sooner we fix the leaks, the sooner I can stop cussin'.
What? What are you waiting for? Want a golden shower, too?
Don't forget those pipes, outworlder. Your hadnouts are countin' on it.
Found those pipes yet? Clock's tickin'.
Maybe not all of you outworlders are trash. Take care.
After the repair, follow the pipes and fix the leaks. It s just beside me to the west. Are you blind, kid?
These pipes of mine, I tell ya, more temperamental than a wet hen.
Every other day, they're springing leaks. Beginning to think portal jumpers are opening 'em.
And who has to fix 'em? Yours truly. Why don't you take some responsibility?
Find and replace leakin' pipes with new ones. You can usually find 'em in barrels or crates.
Don't dawdle! I'll be here, fixin' this fuckin barometer!
Suit yourself, but don't come crying when there's no handouts.
Alright then, guess I'll handle it myself. Just like always.
So you're gonna just leave me in this shitty situation, shocker.
I get that you have no fuckin soul, you outworlder jerk.
All yer kind are the same. Now get off of my property!

name: Flowers for Friendship

target.label: Flowers
target.landmark: Collect desert flowers

journal: BSHL-02 Steppe, Junkyard slums. Collect desert flowers. Follow the road northeast, nearly to the coastline. There you will find the flowers.
objectives: Just head northeast from the junkyard slums until you find them.

npc: Anyway, here's a gift! Th-thanks for everything... You're the bestest!
M-maybe we could, you know, hang out sometime? Or not! No biggie!
I-I mean, unless that's cringey! Error! Feelings overload! Beep boop!
I w-wanted to give you these flowers... because you're super special to me.
S-so, um, funny thing... The 'research' was kinda a lie.
Wowzers! You actually did it... That's so epic!
O-oh! You will help me? That's so... cool. Beep boop.
O-oh... H-hi there... Did you m-maybe get those flowers? Beep... boop...
O-oh! You're back! Did you g-get those flowers? Beep... boop...
Error 404: Friendship not found. Maybe next time... senpai.
It's fine! I can collect data... by myself... Beep... boop.
I understand. Initiating forever alone protocol.
No worries! I'll be here... in standby mode... all alone.
O-oh... okay. I'll just go defrag my broken circuits.
Error: Emotional subroutine activated! Must be the desert heat. So, will you assist me?
Eight flowers should be sufficient... if that's okay with you... senpai.
It's not like I need your help or anything! B-but it would be cool if you joined me.
I was wondering if you could, maybe, help me gather some desert flowers? For, uh, science purposes!
Just, um, collecting flora data. Yes, data.
O-oh! Greetings, traveler.
There's uh, very rare ones up to the northeast I need.

name: Focus Fuel

target.label: Bushes
target.landmark: Help Nia enhance her productivity by collecting Transparent Leaves for her special joint recipe

journal: Nia Sundance Goldenfield, near Summer house Help Nia enhance her productivity by collecting Transparent Leaves for her special joint recipe.
objectives: Fill jars up with those berries
Don't forget, those Whisperdew Berries won't just be lying around. You'll need to look for the rare bushes they grow on around Goldenfield.

npc: Take these three jars and fill em' up with those berries, I need some voices whispering the answers to this bug.
Keep an eye out for those tasty berries.
Whisperdew Berries are the key, cowboy.
You're the best! Thanks a heap!
You're my hero! Let's code and roll.
And hey - I'll roll you one too. You're basically an expert.
No problemo, happy trails.
Aye, it s the wild west out there.
Bummer, guess I'll keep spacing out.
So how 'bout it? Up for a little adventure, cowboy?
Don't let those bushes whisper you away from them.
Fill up these three jars with berries. You'll need to look for the rare bushes they grow on.
The logic's all entangled, like vines in a jungle. Which makes it kinda exciting. But boy, do I need a focus boost to untangle it.
It's what you get when folks don't use Test-Driven Development from the get-go.
I've got this project. It's a spaghetti code monster, a real Hydra. Fix one bug and two more spawn.
Oh, you want to learn herbalism? Far out, man.

That's where you come in. I need some Whisperdew Berries from the bushes around Goldenfield. It's not just your average psychedelic - it gives a helluva focus boost. Turns the jungle into a zen garden.

name: Forbidden Knowledge
journal: Skip Stones Prison Island Find Pastor Fazool in Reverie Hollow and tell him Skip sent you.
objectives: Remember, you need to take the mask to Skip Stones on Prison Island.
Find Pastor Fazool in Reverie Hollow... Tell em' Skip sent ya'.

npc: The veils between worlds are thinning, and whispers of ancient truths reach my ears.
I've been delving into secrets that could alter our understanding of Kwalat.
The trade document is going to help me immensely, and for that, you have my support.
I've secretly done dealings with Pastor Fazool in Reverie Hollow...
He's... something of a believer.
Tell him I sent you. He certainly has a few interesting takes I think you could be a part of.
Not all are prepared to face the unknown. I understand.
Fear not the shadows, but if you must, I won't press further.
Very well. Should you change your mind, the offer remains.
Excellent. With your help, the hidden truths shall be revealed.
Well hello. Does knowledge rest in our grasp?
Together, we stand on the brink of revelation.
There is more to uncover, and I trust you'll be ready.

name: Fowl Play
journal: Lily Baxter Goldenfield, South farm Search the rat field for the scythe.
objectives: Don't forget, you need that bloody scythe from Rat Field and sneak it to Buck in the Violet Weed Field. Then we SEND. HIM. TO. PRIIIIIISON!

npc: If you don't help me, I'll tell everyone you killed the chickens all by yourself!
You're no fun! I'm still gonna tell everyone it was you!
If you don't, I'll tell everyone you killed the chickens!
Alright... it's time! Buck is SOOOOOOO fucked.
YOU TRAITOR!
Fine, but everyone will hear that you did it!
I can't believe you set me up! But you actually did it...
Did Lily go and get herself eaten by wolves or something?
Yay! This is gonna be soooo fun! Go get that knife!
Once you have the scythe, sneak over to where Buck is pouting near the Violet Weed Field and plant it on him.
You just need to go get a scythe from the rat field - it should be all gross from killing rats.
What? What the heck is this scythe doing on me?

name: Fragments of Fury
journal: Slick Shady Steppe, Coal Village. Head to the very north west of the Silent Mountains to find the Shoreline Ruins, just south of the large island.
objectives: The Shoreline Ruins are in the northwest Steppe. Get there quickly and find the artifact.

npc: You're bailin' now?
Seriously? It was a lot of work findin' this thing.
Ride swift and true, pardner.
I beseech you, brave soul, to rescue the tribes and reclaim the fragments.
Only then can we hope to reassemble the artifact and restore balance to our world.
Alright, so the artifact is showing up somewhere in a place called the Shoreline Ruins.
Looks like it's located in the northwest corner of the Steppe.
May the spirits guide your path. Go swiftly.
Be careful out there.
If we can get control of this artifact, surely we'll be able to stop this mindless war.
Perhaps fate will bring us together again.
Welcome back. Have you freed the tribes?
You have done it! The tribes are free, and the fragments are safe from the Lightbearers.
With these fragments, we can begin to restore the artifact and prevent it from falling into the wrong hands.
Your deeds will be remembered among our people.
Please accept this reward, and take this Ancient Knowledge it will aid you in the times ahead.

name: Fragments of the Forgotten

target.label: Retrieve the letter the ruins
target.landmark: Find the ruins east of Goldenfield, past the Thornbuckle farm

goals.label: Go to the ruins to look for the artifact

journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff Windreach Woods, Road house Find the ruins east of Goldenfield, past the Thornbuckle farm.
objectives: Hey, keep your vibes tuned in! The artifact is waiting for you in those trippy ruins. Remember, the ruins hold deep secrets, man. Keep your mind clear and your senses sharp. And then hope nobody got there and like, bogarted the relic before us.
goalTexts: Go to the ruins to look for the artifact

npc: Oh, wait! It's coming back to me. The artifact is in the ruins east of Goldenfield.
Whoa, really? You don't go home?
No promises...
Move fast man, before someone else gets it. Bring it back here, and we'll figure out how to activate the thing, ok? I'll try to get sober before then...
Hmm, maybe you already found the artifact...
Man, my brain's fuckin' melted right now. The things people would do for a chance to go home...
This artifact is like, super cosmic. It can open some kinda rift to send people back to their own dimensions.
So I was diving into those ancient texts you brought me and, wow, they're a trip.
That's his problem, not ours. Let's rebuild this thing and get out of here.
Says here the guy broke up the artifact and hid it around Elan. Something about it being like, super dangerous? Yeah, well, that's just like his opinion, man.
Bummer... But hey, maybe this letter's got something goin' on inside, you know?
Oh man, like, seriously? No artifact? Just this old, dusty letter...
If you ever change your mind, I'll be here, all zen and waiting.
You found the artifact, right? Right?!
Maybe we can finally get the fuck off this rock.
Wow, groovy! I knew you'd be up for this cosmic quest.

name: From Seaonna with Love

target.label: Special Flower
target.landmark: Search north east above Ludwig Shatten for the Pulsating Sphere

journal: Seaonna Windreach Woods, Mermaid Lake Search north east above Ludwig Shatten for the Pulsating Sphere.
objectives: Hurry! Triton is waiting, and I can't lose him! Please, the rare flower from the pulsating sphere north in Windreach Woods. We need it now!

npc: Oh, thank you! You have no idea how much this means to me.
Did you get it? Oh, please tell me you did!
Oh, you actually did it? This is amazing!
And please, ignore any rumors you heard about the sphere being explosive.
Thank you, thank you so much! This is just what I needed. Now, just a few more gifts to gather...
Triton wants me to join his lawsuit? OH. MY. GOODNESS!
You know, Triton is actually a fucking genius, always one step ahead of the current. He has to know I love him!
If this lawsuit goes through, I can finally tell him how much I adore his baby breath and ask him to marry me!
So, what do you say? Help me get some gifts for the love of my life. I'll include the note as part of the bundle.
For the first one, I'm thinking of flowers. There are supposed to be some pretty special ones holding down a pulsating sphere north in the woods.
I'm sure it's not dangerous... like... at all. Love!
What? But Triton! This is about Triton!
Oh no, you can't just leave me hanging like this!
Please, you have to understand, this is for love!
No, no, no! Please I need this! I'll scream!

name: Funds of Faith
journal: Grizelda Windreach Woods, Wooden mushroom house. Go east across the railway and search the abandoned houses in the forest. Her stash is in one of them.
objectives: Well, goddamnit! Did you find that satchel yet or not? Don't you dare waste my time, sweetie.

npc: Alright, you listen here! If you want to prove yourself to the church, you'll cough up 500 Gold. Yeah, you heard me right!
Damn it to hell! How do you expect to get anywhere without showing some dedication?

I can't remember which abandoned house I stashed it in, but it could be 1 of 3. Head southeast, across the road. There are 3 abandoned houses triangulated in the woods. One of those damned houses has my... stash.
Well, I'll be damned! Go get me that stash immediately!
For fuck's sake, if you're not ready, don't waste my time!
These funds are crucial. They'll secure us passage through the damn portals.
You don't have that kind of money? Fine! I've got a stash hidden of... some stuff. You go find it and bring it back for me.
It'll help you ascend dimensions or some mystical shit like that. Don't eat until you're far away from here!
You are ready for... ASCENSION! Now you can know our secret.
Take this rare mushroom and go eat it in the woods.
Jesus H. Cheezus, are you even trying? Come back when you're serious!
You're moving up, sugar! Welcome to Level 3 of the church, dubbed the 'Mushy Devout.'
Well, hot damn! You actually did it!
Alright, spit it out! You got my stash or what?

name: Fungal Devotion

target.label: Mana Resin
target.landmark: Collect mana resin from magic trees in the forest

journal: Grizelda Windreach Woods, Wooden mushroom house. Collect mana resin from magic trees in the forest.
objectives: Where the bloody hell is that Mana Resin, love? Get moving!! It's in the Magic Trees your dense son of ... loving Mushroom Minion!

npc: Fine then, you coward. But don't come crying to me later!
Bah, you're useless as tits on a bull!
These damn mushrooms are the key to cracking the secrets of our miserable lives and might even get us out of this infernal rift!
I need it to grow you one of my special mushroom!
If you're gonna reach the next level in our holy mushy journey, you'll need to fetch me 5 Mana Resin.
Well hello there, you stupid rascal! Quit staring like I've grown a second head.
And here's some gold, because even cult heroes need a bit of bling. Keep up the damn good work!
One more level, and I can finally tell you the ULTIMATE SECRET!
Welcome to Level 2, you 'Mighty Mushroom Minion!' The journey's just getting started, love.
For fuck's sake, another wasted opportunity!
Well, for fuck's sake, you did it! I never thought I'd see the day.
Well, aren't you a sight for sore eyes! You got the damn Mana Resin or what?
Ah, fantastic! Every Mana Resin you bring gets us closer to blowing this joint.

name: Fungal Phobia

target.label: Fungus Corpse
target.landmark: Kill Fungus around the forests then use Lingua's sewing kit from her home in the southwest corner of Reverie Hollow

target.label: Workbench
target.landmark: Kill Fungus around the forests then use Lingua's sewing kit from her home in the southwest corner of Reverie Hollow

journal: Lingua Reverie Hollow, Freshwater Well. Kill Fungus around the forests then use Lingua's sewing kit from her home in the southwest corner of Reverie Hollow.
objectives: Hey fungus master, you got those Fungus Exoskeletons yet? Kill some Fungus around the forest to get them. Imagine Fazool's face when he sees this stuffed fungus monster in his room! Priceless!

npc: We just need to get Pastor Fazool to run off so Lana can buy the land.

He's more scared of fungus than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs. If we want him outta here, we need to construct a stuffed fungus and place it in his house. That should scare the hell out of him.
Time to play mushroom hunter! We need you to find Neon Mushrooms. Aim for five, alright?
He can't give you any interdimensional secret, but if you need a portal fixed... maybe Lana has some Quaddari tech that can do the job.
Skipping out, huh? Guess Fazool wins this round. Hope you like his sermons!
Seriously? You're scared of a little fungus hunt? Fazool's probably laughing right now.
Oh come on, are you gonna let Fazool keep prancing around like he runs this place?
Pastor Fazool? Total fraud.
Go out and kill some of those fungus monsters. Bring back some Fungus Exoskeletons and use my sewing kit to craft a stuffed monster. That'll send old Fazool packing.
This Quaddari Tech Device might just be what you need to restart your friend's portal. It's said to stabilize erratic portals.
Just... don't come crying to me about what comes out of it.
Ah, you've returned. And with the stuffed fungus, no less.
I'll set this up in his bed... Fazool will be gone in no time.
You returned. I assume you're Lingua's... agent.
Alright, let's make Fazool wish he'd stuck to growing tomatoes instead!

name: Funny Bunny

target.label: Ribbit
target.landmark: Head to the Creeping Marsh and kill 10 ribbits

journal: Barkowski Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard. Head to the Creeping Marsh and kill 10 ribbits.
objectives: Oh, right, the ribbits! Yeah man, can you kill 10 of those tasty bastards? They're just up in the Creeping Marsh!

npc: Woah, you're in? Excellent! Like, most triumphant, dude! Let's cruise.
Dude, it's like tasting the rainbow, but for real! I need your help snagging these ribbits 'cause, you know, I'm a dog... totally just a dog.
Dude, back already? Did you nab those tasty toad-lookin' turds?
Whoa, most excellent! You got 'em!
These ribbits are gonna be a total game-changer.
Wait... dogs like ribbits, right? Totally a reasonable thing for dogs to eat?
Guess I'll find out!
You've earned some major tail wags from me. Until our next tubular adventure, bro!
Alright, listen up, bro! So, there are these tasty ribbits out there.
Word is, chomping down on one of these bad boys can blow your mind! Even for a...uh, man...dog... like me.
Whoa, bummer, dude! Guess it's not everyone's jam. Catch you later, bro!
Aw, man, I was really stoked for this! But hey, no hard feelings, dude.
Totally gnarly, but I respect that. If you change your mind, I'll be here... uh... wagging.
In the Creeping Marsh just outside of town you'll find a whole bunch of these things. Just leave a few on the ground for me, I'll sniff my way over.

name: Furnishing the Future

goals.label: Collect pieces of furniture from the trash

target.label: Chair
target.landmark: Help HPPY-01 salvage furniture around the outpost to make the bots' outpost more welcoming

target.label: Table
target.landmark: Help HPPY-01 salvage furniture around the outpost to make the bots' outpost more welcoming

target.label: Shelf
target.landmark: Help HPPY-01 salvage furniture around the outpost to make the bots' outpost more welcoming

journal: HPPY-01 Steppe, Junkyard slums. Help HPPY-01 salvage furniture around the outpost to make the bots' outpost more welcoming.
objectives: Everything is absolutely splendid! Please continue collecting the chair, table, and shelf from the trash for maximum joy!
goalTexts: Collect pieces of furniture from the trash
Return pieces of furniture to HPPY

npc: Everything is absolutely wonderful, but we can increase joy levels even more!
Collecting furniture will eliminate any errors of unhappiness in our outpost!
I cannot gather the items myself due to operational limitations.
Once my cohort has delivered their portions, I will be sure to compile it into one form for you!
Now I can finish compiling my portion of the ecological data.
Together, we will ensure total happiness!
ALL SYSTEMS ARE FUNCTIONING PERFECTLY! HAVE A JOYFUL DAY!
Excellent! These will make our outpost so much more inviting.
Would you please retrieve a chair, a table, and a shelf from the nearby piles of trash?
YOUR CHOICE IS EXCELLENT! CONTINUE ENJOYING OPTIMAL HAPPINESS!
ABSOLUTELY MARVELOUS! YOUR AGREEMENT FILLS ME WITH MAXIMUM JOY!
NO WORRIES! HAPPINESS LEVELS ARE STILL MAXIMUM!
ABSOLUTELY FANTASTIC TO SEE YOU! HAVE YOU COMPLETED THE JOYFUL TASK OF FURNITURE COLLECTION?
I'm sure they'll still be functional! Humans deposit the weirdest things out here.

name: Gathering the Fragmented

target.label: Lil Timmy's Ancient Artifact Piece
target.landmark: Help people at the Lakehouse, the Old Quarry, the Old Portal, and the Falling Planes in exchange for artifact pieces

target.label: Triton's Artifact Piece
target.landmark: Help people at the Lakehouse, the Old Quarry, the Old Portal, and the Falling Planes in exchange for artifact pieces

target.label: Driscol-99's Artifact Piece
target.landmark: Help people at the Lakehouse, the Old Quarry, the Old Portal, and the Falling Planes in exchange for artifact pieces

target.label: Varkus's Artifact Piece
target.landmark: Help people at the Lakehouse, the Old Quarry, the Old Portal, and the Falling Planes in exchange for artifact pieces

journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff Windreach Woods, Road house. Help people at the Lakehouse, the Old Quarry, the Old Portal, and the Falling Planes in exchange for artifact pieces.
objectives: Don't forget to pick up the artifact pieces and deliver the herbs. The artifact pieces are at the Lakehouse, the Old Quarry, the Old Portal, and the Falling Planes. And remember, the herbal deliveries are for Triton, Alexander Stones, Driscoll-99, and Clanker. Seriously, don't make me do my job myself. I just took some herbal supplements and can barely walk.

npc: No way man, you actually found all 4 of 'em?
You musta' had some crazy adventures out there.
I've got a whole 'nother story to tell you...
Well, whatever. Speaking of 5... it turns out there's a fifth piece of this thing.
Bummer. But hey, the journey's always here if you change your mind.
Either that, or my sense of time is off. Has it been 5 days or 5 minutes?
I guess if getting out of Kwalat were easy, everyone would totally do it.

This dusty old note says he hid artifact pieces at the Lakehouse to the north west, the Old Quarry south in the Westwind Woods, the Old Portal directly south of us in the Westwind Woods, and the Falling Planes south of Mermaid Lake. Weird choices.
Luckily, I have some 'totally legal' herbal deliveries to make at those same locations to a few of my good friends: Triton, Alexander Stones, Driscoll-99, and Clanker.
Ask those guys what's up - I bet they can help you out.
I can't be worrying about that shit. Life goes on, man.
Well, alright man, to each their own path. Peace out.
This will not stand, ya know, this refusal will not stand, man.
Groovy. See you when I see you - which probably won't be for a while.

name: Mission Imp-possible: Ultimate Weapon
journal: Ratchet D'Rek and Griz are both in Goldenfield. You'll find Grizzle Ironfoot south of the sawmill in Westwind Woods.
objectives: Find Griz at the Artifact Shop, Grizzle in the Westwind Woods and D'Rek in town at his workshop.

npc: Great! Let's get this show on the road. Time to gather those components!
Remember, Griz, Grizzle, and D'Rek!
Fantastic! You've got all the parts we need.
Let's get started on assembling this bad boy.
Congratulations, here's your very own ultimate weapon.
And hey, time to use it, right? Hope ya don't blow up!
How's the component hunt going?
Ah, Ratchet sent ya? I've got the part he's lookin' for, but I need a favor first.
I've found traces of a rare, radioactive isotope in these woods, Isotope-238.
It's tickling me whiskers with its potential! But mining it's a bit of a sticky thing.
If ya think you've got the grit, it'd be a boon to our research.
Ah, Ratchet sent you? I've been researching the artifact he asked for...
Rumor has it, this artifact could be the source of the hazardous radiation leakin' in the Toxic Waste area of Dusktide Forest.
Rescuers have already separated the artifact into little blue bottles, but we need 'em back. I need you to fetch five of these blue bottles for me.
Be wary of the dangerous atmosphere from the green oily liquid leakin' about. Note exactly healthy for ya.
I've got a proposition for you.
Ratchet and I have this plan to fuse technology with magic for your the ultimate weapon.
We believe that a unique Wolf Mask hidden in the ruins near Goldenfield holds a special code.
This code can transform ordinary weaponry into something extraordinary.
If you can retrieve that Wolf Mask, I'm confident we can create special chips to enhance your weapon like never before.
You'll have to dig through a lot of nodes to find some, but it'll be worth it.
Ratchet here! Martha told me about your I-M-P problem, and I think we can whip up something special to deal with it.
But it's not going to be easy. We'll need some pretty specific components to get this done.
First, go to Grizzle Ironfoot at the Logging Camp in Westwind Woods and help out with his mining research to get some special ore for me.
Then, head over to Goldenfield. Find Griz at the Artifact Shop and see if you can persuade him to give you an Ancient Artifact I need.
Lastly, track down D'Rek near the construction workshop in Goldenfield. You'll need to assist him to earn a Mana-Powered Mechanism.
Once you have all the components, bring them back to me, and we'll assemble the ultimate weapon!
Good luck killing imps without this!
Alright then, but you ll be missing out on an ultimate weapon.
No problem, just come back if you change your mind.

name: Mischief Masker
journal: Oswald Goldenfield, Bank. Head south to Guru David's and find the masks laying around. Keep your eyes peeled.
objectives: Still need those masks from Guru David. Don t forget: Green, Orange Horns, and Pink Bird. Head to the Yoga House in Goldenfield if you ve forgotten where to start. Without those masks, I can't help you with the gear. Keep at it, friend.

npc: Great! I knew you wouldn't let me down.
Remember, these masks are crucial. Don't come back without them.
You're back! Successful, I hope?
You did it! Excellent work.
Here's that piece of fire-graded gear as promised.
It's a solid investment - any vault without a will attached to it defaults to the bank upon.. termination.
Remember, use it wisely. The imps won't know what hit them.

name: Glimmer of Innovation

target.label: Batteries for generators
target.landmark: Collect batteries from around the settlement

journal: Eamon Hardich Westwind Woods, Sawmill Workers yard. Collect batteries from around the settlement.
objectives: Collect those batteries and take em' to - hic - Fen -hic - Fenwick.

npc: Fen's got this wild contraption idea, a laser cutter that'll probably either revolutionize our work or blow us all to high heaven.
But the thing's hungry for power... it's going to need - hic - a ton of batteries to really zap through the wood.
Grab batteries from around the settlement and bring em' back 'er.
Suit yourself, future sawdust enthusiast!
No problem, I guess creating magnificent inventions isn't for everyone.
Easy come, easy go, pal. Maybe you'll find a different life purpose while staring at trees.
Oh, anyway - if you're new here, I should find something for you to do...
Well, look who's ready to play hero! Get those batteries before I sober up, yeah?
Oh wow, these batteries will do the trick!
Grommuk - hic - ain't great at assigning tasks, so I'll give ya' one.
But I'm not building a laser cutter... I don't really remember what Eamon is talking about.
I did see something weird though - Grommuk eats batteries whole sometimes. Something about the acid makes his junk wiggle.
Did I... ask you to do something for me?
Anyways, I could use these in the generators around the sawmill... Can you help me out with the transformer?

name: Glimmers of the Past
journal: Draven Torvik Windreach Woods, Parking spot. Search for the forest crystals to the southwest, across the railroad. If you hit the logging camp, you've gone too far.
objectives: Among the crystals, forest's grasp, lies what I seek. Cigarette folder, in the woods' embrace, awaits. Hurry, wanderer, time dances swiftly in the forest. Still trying out that poetry stuff. It's... not going well.

npc: Alright, alright, alright.
Suit yourself. But don't come crying to me later.
Ah, no problem. I guess it's not really that important after all.
If you can venture to those forest crystals and retrieve that folder for me, I'll hand over the page you need.
Look, I appreciate a good poem as much as the next guy, but that ancient page? It's important.
Mary Jane Greenpuff gave it to me to jot down some verses, but I ended up losing it in a cigarette folder near some forest crystals to the southwest of us.
An ancient page? Oh... shit.
Thanks but I didn't sneeze?
And, of course, some gas money for your efforts. Much appreciated!
Here's the ancient page. Told you I'd keep my word.
Hey, you pulled it off!
Did you find my cigarettes?
A quest begins now.
Like it? It's called a haiku.
Gratitude unfolds.
Into the woods you stride forth.

name: Gnat a problem

goals.label: Collect tracking devices from gnat bodies

target.label: Gnoos
target.landmark: Find gnats around Elara and to the north of her

goals.label: Bring the tracking devices to the student

journal: Elara Brightfall Goldenfield, west of the Chicken farm Find gnats around Elara and to the north of her.
objectives: It'd mean everything to me, if you killed these gnats and got the tracking devices back from them.
goalTexts: Collect tracking devices from gnat bodies
Bring the tracking devices to the student

npc: I uh... Well, alright. But only because it's a dire situation. I am an apprentice at the Leithana University. A Junior Observer.
Oh, that's fine. I'm not pressing you. Just take your time, but know that I'll be kicked out of the University if I don't bring the trackers back.
Really? Great! But if you meet any other observers or censors, don't tell them about our little agreement.
Sorry? Oh... Hello there.
It'd mean everything to me, if you killed these gnats and got the tracking devices back from them.
Oh, I owe you big time! If you're ever in Leithana, stop by the University. I'll give you a visitor pass and show you around.
Wait! I would really appreciate your help, though!
You know, you're doing a good thing. Have you got all of them?
I was supposed to study the behavioral patterns of the Gnaticus Prolificus, or gnats as you, village people, call them.
Oh. Sure. I...I understand. You have your own village-things to do, right? Yeah. I'm so damn screwed.
Oh, Gosh, if I mess up, the Master Censor will definitely send me on an expedition to the Fiery Fields. So, yes, here I am asking a layman for help.
I put tracking devices on young gnats and now have their behavioral patterns, but I DO NOT have the tracking devices.
They cost a fortune for our department. Never thought these gnats would be so intimidating in real life.
Well, it's... I'm not really supposed to share any information with laymen.

name: Grimbleton's Great Recipe Hunt
journal: Grimbleton Riverrise, Alchemy. Find Triton near the Lake house in Windreach Woods!
objectives: Man, I can't hold it together! I need that crazy fish oil stuff like, yesterday! Get northwest to Triton Lake!

npc: Wait, what was I saying? Here, take my money!
You're in? Great, 'cause if we nail this, we're gonna break bad in the best way possible!
Awesome, man. Together we're gonna blow this science out of the water. Let's do this!
Yo, you got my back? This is gonna be like, high-level stuff!
I'm freaking out here, dude! Do you have the stuff?
Surely, he d be able to help. Take this fishing gear over to him, he ll be able to help me out. We re friends
Oh man, you did it! But, uh, turns out it wasn t that oil after all... I'm just dab it!
Haha, amazing job!
Triton! You know Triton? The fish-man guy at the lake house. Surely there s some fishing gear around there!
Yo, yo, yo, listen up! I need your help, and it's, like, a matter of life and death here!
I had it, man, the perfect blue crystal formula!
It was beautiful, like the Mona Lisa of drugs, but now... I need a special oil, but, it only comes some types of fish in a lake to the west.
Oh, come on, man! You're killing me here!
What? No? Are you out of your mind?
Fine! Be a coward, see if I care! But don't come crying to me later!
Seriously? You're bailing on me? Unbelievable!
I can't believe this! You're just gonna let me rot? Not cool, man, not cool!
Why don t you go collect the fishing gear on the shore of Triton Lake. I ll have my perfect blue crystal back in my hands before I know it.

name: Guarding Fortunes

target.label: Dendroid Scout
target.landmark: Kill some Dendroid Scouts around the forest

journal: Themis Windreach Woods, Fort. Kill some Dendroid Scouts around the forest.
objectives: Uh, s-so, um, have you seen any of those 3 Dendroid Scouts yet? I, uh, just wanted to check if you've, you know, dealt with them...

npc: Eep! Alright then. Just, uh, try not to get into more trouble, okay?
Gulp... okay. Guess it's, um, back to the drawing board for me.
Uh, no problem. Just, uh, be careful... I really don't want you getting arrested!
Oh, um, alright... but, you know, my dad won't be pleased...
I, uh, think this might show my father that you're, you know, a good person. What do you think?
Honestly, you seem nice enough. Maybe we can prove it to him?
He's adamant about arresting you. But, thankfully, he's not here right now.
So, um, my father, he's really mad at you for, um, supposedly stealing his book.
But uh... I have some pretty bad news for you.
Oh dear... this isn't going to end well, is it?
I'll, um, definitely tell my dad about your bravery. E-Even if I'm a bit scared to...
Y-You did it! I-I mean, you really did it!
H-Hey! Uh, how did it go out there?
You're really brave. I mean, like, super brave.
Oh, wow, thank you! I, um, didn't think you'd actually do it.
There are these Dendroid Scouts, really nasty creatures, causing a lot of issues around here. If you could, um, help us by getting rid of 3 of them, it would be a big help.

name: Guarding Green
journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff Windreach Woods, Road House Head south to the fort in the forest and talk to Themis.
objectives: Hey, man, you still gotta find Themis. That dude's just chilling at the fort, totally clueless about the artifact. It's South down the road. Then go West to the curve. Can't miss it! Better hurry - who knows what the hell those guys will do with it.

npc: It's cool, dude. Just remember, the universe is counting on us.
Whoa, bummer, man. They might destroy the planet or something with it.
Talk to Themis again. He's a sweet, kinda naive dude really innocent. He might be our best shot at getting it back without a fuss.
I'm totally freaking out over here.
The fort guards have the last piece of the artifact. It's like, the most crucial part.
You gotta help with this, it's, like, super urgent, man!
The artifact's vibe needs to be protected, you dig? Let's keep it cosmic, dude.
Far out, man! You're really, like, groovy for this.
Oh, you have them? He's gonna be happy.
He found one of the artifact pieces from it, but uh... the others...
No biggie, but like, peace and love, man. Unless the artifact kills us.
I guess my dad really wanted that book you stole.
Oh geez! You're back! So, um, you kinda got me in big trouble.
Oh! Oh, uh, it's you! Um, so, did you... why are you here?

name: Guarding Shadows
journal: Zelina Ironweave Steppe, Adventures outpost. Help Zelina by finding the lost gun southwest in the Candlewick Slums. Finn can be found around the Adventurer's Outpost.
objectives: Don't forget, we're looking for Finn's lost gun and test if that suspicious bayonet fits onto it.

npc: Listen up. I have a plan for that bayonet you found.
Finn Hawthorne's lost his damn gun. Can't say I'm surprised. Butterfinger McGee I call em'.
Find his lost gun and see if that bayonet attaches to it. I have a sneaking suspicion it will!
If it fits, bring both to me immediately. Don't ask questions.
If it doesn't, return the gun to Finn. He needs it now more than ever.
Just... get this done before another one of us gets killed.
Alright then... but let's keep this between us.
Fine. Just make sure no one else gets involved.
Good. I suppose you can handle it discreetly.
Very well. Just be quick and don't draw attention.
I see. Perhaps another time.
Very well, I won't press you further.
It's unfortunate, but I understand.
Alright, man, let's talk. I can solve this for good.
Back again, are we? What's that you've got?
Zelina told you to WHAT?
What are you doing with Gareth's Bayonett?
Well, would you look at that! My trusty gun. Thought it had wandered off for good.
Oh, hello there. Need something from me?
Now, if you'll excuse me, I've got some unusual rocks to attend to.

name: Guilt and Gears

target.label: Golem
target.landmark: Help Flint Thistlewick repair his steam-powered armor by collecting small gears from Small Golems

journal: Flint Thistlewick Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. Help Flint Thistlewick repair his steam-powered armor by collecting small gears from Small Golems.
objectives: Those shiny bucket-head Small Golems have my gears! Time to give 'em a tap or two!

npc: Well, would you look at that! The gears just rolled right into my hands! Magic, I tell ya!
Fine! Who needs you? I'll fix this tin can myself after another drink!
Back already? Maybe I won't need that extra tankard after all! Hand over the goodies?
end quest
You know like... in their guts. So kill a bunch of 'em!
Oh, it's you! Thought I'd have to start without my gears imagine that!
Just need a few gears to get my suit humming again. Those shiny Small Golems over there should have 'em.
These clanking golems think they can outsmart a genius like me? I'll show them who's the real metal master!
Excellent! Time to put the 'power' back in power suit - after a quick sip, of course!
Oh, too busy to help a genius, are we? Get the fuck outta here!
Suit yourself! I'll just be here, alone with my broken armor and a bottle.
Hey there, partner! Got those... uh... spinny metal thingies? My suit's feeling kinda naked without 'em!
Quests/QuestLocalization guilt and gears/ npc Well if it isn t my trusty pa
Well, would you look at that my armor's all in pieces again! Must've been that 'extra boost' I gave it last night. Hic!
And hey I'll tell Lightbearer command all about how you helped me!
Here, take this... whatever it is. Found it in my pocket! Consider it a thank you from the great Flint Thistlewick!
Now stand back! This contraption might smoke, spark, or explode. But hey, what's progress without a little risk?
Well, if it isn't my trusty parts provider! Did you bring the gizmos or was I dreaming about that?
With these beauties, I'll have my suit roaring in no time. Who needs sobriety when you've got steam power?

name: Hangover Helper

target.label: Sugar
target.landmark: Help Dr

journal: Dr. Queenie Steppe, Northsteppe fort. Help Dr. Queenie recover from her hangover by gathering ingredients nearby for her hangover.
objectives: Ohhh... I shtill need... hic... some shugars and shmexy vodkas for my... shpecial shcience remedy!
goalTexts: Return sugar and vodka to Queenie

npc: Ooooh, my head's spinnin' like a broken gear... hic!
We did some... hic... big science-y stuff, didn't we? Such... important discoveries!
But now I need my... special potion to... uh... continue my researchin'.
Problem is, I'm missin' some... ingre... ingredients. Need sugar... lots of sugar... and vodka!
Can ya get me... hic... some sugars and somes vodkas? For... for scientific purposes!
Then I'll whip up a... a concoction that'll fix me right up. Science magic, ya know?
Promise it'll be worth your while... got some real shiny stuff for ya!
Nobody here is an ecological scientist! Except maybe Xelcor...
Ohhh... hic... well, if you won't help... I'll jusht have to... to sholve thish myshelf!
Fine then! I'll do... do the shcientific shtuff without ya!
Your losh! Thish exshperiment will be... hic... groundbreaking without you!
We can... hic... finally make that... that special potion... for shcience!
Thash great! Together we'll... we'll make shome... um... important dishcoveries!
Oh shit, that's so much better! The potion actually did the trick!
Wait... fuck! The Lightbearers! They wanted that damn ecological report!
Oh no, oh no, I totally screwed up!
This is bad! If they find out I've been bluffing, I'm in deep shit!
I mean, uh....
Fuck it. I can trust you.
Let's keep this little mess between us, alright? Because if you don't help clean it up, I'm blaming it on you.
Thash great! Just mixsh it all togethers in the bucketsh here. I'll drinksh it.

name: Harvesting the Fallen

target.label: Brisk
target.landmark: Collect armor plates from Brisks for research purposes

journal: Mort Decay Steppe, Northsteppe fort. Collect armor plates from Brisks for research purposes.
objectives: Get the plates... off Brisks... That way Xelcor... shuts the fuck up....

npc: The new recruit... Xelcor Zinn... keeps blathering about his stolen parts...
Xelcor... er... the Brisks... they're disrupting the... natural ebb and flow... of our world.
Xelcor's asking a lot of stupid questions... I don't want to answer...
Oh quarkflakes, are those my Armor Plates?
Heh... you've agreed... I'm free!
Fuck... you... too.
Hi! Are you here to share in some ecological wonders?
Heehee! This is splendiferous!
These will be perfect for analyzing the biomechanical harmonics of this planet!
The molecular lattice is even more intricate than I imagined!
Thank you, friend! This will propel my ecological studies light-years ahead!
Nobody on this ecological team seems that interested in scientifica studies.
Perhaps you and I could work together again...
Xelcor Zinn... insists I... seek your aid... though I'd rather not.
Fetch me... no, fetch Xelcor... 8 of his lost armor plates... for 'research', yes.
The decay spreads... we must act... before it's too late.

name: Heartbeat of the Party

target.label: Turtle
target.landmark: Find turtles around the waters of Riverrise

journal: Zibb "The Zest" Throttlebreech Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard. Find turtles around the waters of Riverrise.
objectives: Seek the pulse of the vibrant, the eager rhythm of life. Their energy must feed our celebration. The party wanes without the delight of the spirited. 3 turtle hearts. No more, no less.

npc: Alright, you win. You're a bit of a monster, but a dedicated one. Let's just... move on and never speak of this again.
You've really misunderstood me, but it s... deeply impressive, in a frightening way.
Okay, this is... unsettling. I didn t think you'd go this far.
I suppose I should ve been clearer. I meant the pulsating energy of the crowd, not actual organs!
Uh... wow. You actually brought real... turtle hearts?
Ah, the rhythm returns to our gathering. Have you come to revive it?
Here s your reward. And, um, maybe consider seeing someone about... this tendency.
Ah, you understand the rhythm of the cosmos.
Retrieve these heartbeats for me. Turtles grace the waters around Riverrise.
Yes, the essence of life, the pulse of our existence.
Envision a gathering where the energies align, a symphony of souls interwoven in revelry. To achieve this, I require 3 turtle hearts.
Your role will be that of the evening's maestro.
The pulse of the party dwindles without your contribution, but perhaps it's the universe's way.
No pressure, we are but notes in the grand symphony. Yet, without your pulse, perhaps the party will fade into silence.
Denying this request? A bold choice, but remember, every heart absent weakens the celebration. The dance may cease.

name: Heartbreak Waters
journal: Mariel Venomtail Windrach Woods, Mermaid Lake. Find Ivie Clarkson in Goldenfield.
objectives: Remember, it's Ivie Clarkson at Goldenroast Cafe in Goldenfield. The quicker she gets the letter, the quicker we break that heart, the quicker I get to eat! Pull out those acting skills. Make her believe Ludwig's as done with her as a Torkon executioner with a broken guillotine.

npc: Fine, I was never much for consent anyway.
Fuck this up, and I'll do things to your asshole you couldn't possibly imagine. Deal?
You're one of those limp dicks? Pity.
Do this right, and I'll give you my note of legal consent for Triton.
She's sharp, so stay convincing. Get her to buy into this ruse.
I need you to take it to his whore Ivie Clarkson over at the Goldenroast Cafe in Goldenfield. You'll have to make her believe it's genuine.
Also, I said he fucked like, a bunch of imps in the woods. Dirty dick bastard.
I've crafted this breakup letter, penned with all the sorrow and heartbreak anyone could muster.
Keep this shitty piece of paper. I have a mermaid to hunt.
Well, someone evidently has a twisted sense of humor.
This isn't from Ludwig! Why would she...?
It's Mariel's legal consent note for Triton!
Wait a second. This handwriting...and what's this on the back?
We're going to make this guy's life suck more than your mom's mouth.
He's.. breaking up with me!?
Oh, backing out, are you? There goes my entertainment for the day.
Oh, you have a note from Ludwig? What...what does it say?
What is that? A note from Ludwig?
Excellent. Let's pour some salt in the wound, shall we?

name: Heart of the Woods

target.label: Logging hatvest Timberheart
target.landmark: Log Faint Timberheart Reserves around Goldenfield and surrounding forests

journal: Zogar Goldenfield, near the Fuel station. Log Faint Timberheart Reserves around Goldenfield and surrounding forests.
objectives: Head into the forest and fetch me some pieces of Timberheart Bark. Clean pieces are hard to come by, so take your time

npc: Turning down a chance to survive? Alright, your loss.
Without the magic of Kwalat's fires and food, you're in for a real treat.
Oh well. Enjoy struggling through fatigue and raw critter meat.
Suit yourself. But remember, no magic fire means no magic recovery.
Well, I've tried to help you as much as I'm legally required to.
We're not hikers looking for firewood. We're after Timberheart Bark. Getting materials like this is a great start for any logging novice.
Search for Faint Timberheart Reserves around surrounding forests and bring me back five pieces of that bark.
Don't let anything crucial slip past your attention, especially those magic trees in the forest.
Alright, moving on to the next lesson - get familiar with your surroundings.
Now, go get registered with Zikk and Zugg. Even with a fire, you won't last long out here.
Keep it up, and you'll find your place here. Just need some coins and a roof.
Look at you, all alive and stuff. Good job. Here's a reward for your lesson.
Now, head into the forest and fetch me that Timberheart Bark.
And remember, nothing warms your bones like logging.
If you're not back soon, I'll assume a tree fell on you.
Done playing lumberjack yet? Or did the trees fight back?
Remember - timberheart bark. Don't get it wrong.
Good! Keep this in mind, finding what you need doesn't always happen on the first try. Stay persistent.
Ready to submit?
Kneel, darling.
Eyes on me.
Feel the tension?
Ready to be tamed?
Want a closer look?
Bow down, baby.
Play nice, now.
Light bless the king!

Hey there, dude!
What's up, partner?
Howdy-do, amigo!
Welcome to the lab, my friend!
What's up, hoss?
What's going on, boss man?
Aye buddy. What do you know?
How's it going?

For the King, boss!

At your service!

I would have gotten away with it too, if it weren't for you sniveling losers.

goals.label: Retrieve the Artifact from a Boss

target.label: Boss
target.landmark: Track down the artifact held by a monstrous entity, kill the monster, and return the artifact to Themis

journal: Trevor Barlow Windreach Woods, Fort. Track down the artifact held by a monstrous entity, kill the monster, and return the artifact to Themis.
objectives: That artifact is no trinket-every second you hesitate, its power festers. Dark magic doesn't wait. Confront any of the ancient beasts and retrieve the artifact before it claims more lives.
goalTexts: Retrieve the Artifact from a Boss

npc: Ditching this quest is signing a death warrant for the civilians around here. It's your damn conscience.
You can run, but the death toll from that fucking thing will haunt you forever.
Walking away? You're fucking over everyone. Every life lost to that artifact is on you.
You gotta be kidding. Cowardice is a one-way ticket to a death sentence around here.
Woodraptor, Wooden Deer, Dendroids... take your pick, chief.
Your mission is to find this artifact, take down the beast wielding it, and bring the artifact back to Themis. Yeah, he's a bit clumsy, but he's in charge now.
This dangerous relic can be found on several monstrous beasts, making it even more of a threat.
We're dealing with dark magic here, and it's no joke. This might even be something... ancient.
Please, just take the artifact and go I need to figure things out.
Let's get one thing straight: that artifact won't open any portals out of Kwalat. It killed Captain when he tried.
This is all too much. Thank you for bringing this back I don't know what I'm going to do.
No, no, this can t be happening. I m supposed to be in charge now?
I-I can't believe it. Is Dad... gone?
D-did you see my dad out there? Is he alright?
Good. Keep your shit together, this isn't child's play.

How's the rib hunt going?
Don't forget those ribs. A hungry warrior is a cranky warrior.
Ah, you did it! These look perfect. Here's your reward, as promised.
Oh, that's a shame. I'll just have to make do.
No worries, I'll find another way to get my strength back.
Alright, but don't blame me if I start looking at you like a snack.
Help me out and fetch some Crispy Fried Ribs. I'll owe you one, big time.
I can take on anything if I've got some Crispy Fried Ribs in me. Think you can help with that?
Do me a favor and grab some Crispy Fried Ribs. A warrior fights better on a full stomach.
Nothing gets me back in the game like a good meal. Those Crispy Fried Ribs are just what I need.
I've been fighting non-stop, and I'm starving. I need some Crispy Fried Ribs to keep going.

npc: Good choice! Let's get hunting.
Remember - 10 Leaf creatures, straight from the Windreach Woods.
How's the hunt going?
Ah, you've done it! Excellent work.
So, truth is, only certain armor can stop those imps from burning your cajones off.
Ain't going to give you mine, but you need a helmet with some fire grading.
Saw Oswald putting some gear like that away in the vault. In fact, I stole some of it.
Maybe you can convince him to give you some.
So, Martha told you about my special spice? I should gut whoever told you...
You're right though - it's ground-up imp guts. These critters have a unique flavor that can't be beat.
I have a secret to getting up close and personal to snatch 'em.
Tell you what, if you help me hunt down some Leaf creatures in the Windreach Woods, I'll spill the beans on how I get the gear to handle the imps.
I'm thinking of whipping up a new 'plant-based alternative' using those scream-capable plant creatures.
That's a pity, could've used your help.
No worries, I'll find another way. Maybe.
Alright then, but don't come asking for my secret later.

objectives: You'll find her out in them woods, northwest up the road from the spaceship wreck. Her gross house is deep in the Westwind Woods. Ask her what in the world smacked my shuttle, will ya?
goalTexts: Learn the details of the disaster from the old hag

npc: You'll find her out in them woods, right around. Ask her what in the world smacked my shuttle, will ya?
Your papers are all set, you're official now! Alright, it's time for you to hit the trail. Yep. Go on, live your life, be happy. Just not around these parts.
You did it, eh. Marvelous. But yeah, not a word about what you saw in my house.
If you're lookin' to earn your keep, the local Mana Station's a good bet. But they won't take you in without a license. You can get that over at the administration in Riverrise, got it?
Cloning Tank Version 2.03. Good day, Great Master Daddy! Temperature and pressure are stable. Do you wish to start a new cloning cycle?
DNA material: present. Additional brain cells source: present. Cloning cycle number 420 initiated. Thank you, Daddy.
I'm aware of the "accidents" you speak of, yet the knowledge isn't freely given.
Am I an old hag? I suppose that's what some crude, cursing goblins call me. Let me guess... Zugg?
Heed my warning, the forest is a twisted maze, with creatures lurking in the shadows. Prepare for uninvited encounters.
Fetch me Neon Mushrooms. They are a rare breed, infused with "bad mana".
Elan's government keeps taking them to study! These mushrooms are crucial for my brewing.

name: In the Belly of the Beasts

target.label: Werewolf Alpha
target.landmark: Travel to Prison Island and collect a shard from a Werewolf Alpha, Werewolf Rat, and Werewolf Soldier

target.label: Werewolf Rat
target.landmark: Travel to Prison Island and collect a shard from a Werewolf Alpha, Werewolf Rat, and Werewolf Soldier
