There's wreckage all around. Bring it to me.
Find my parts, or join me in eternal rest.
Ha! As if a ghost needs help!
Your help? I'd rather haunt a tomb!
Buzz off before I curse you too!
Help? From a mortal? Hilarious!
I need no help, only your absence!
Name's Claudine Baxter, sugar.
Just a simple farmer trying to make a livin' out here on Kwalat.
Came from a place where the gov had their nose in everything, so I hightailed it here.
Now I grow all sorts crops, veggies, you name it. But I got a lil' secret stash too, if you catch my drift.
Ain't nothin' like what ya used to, but it'll blow your mind literally!
Folks 'round here think I'm just another farmer, but I reckon you seem cool enough to know the truth.
So, ya lookin' for somethin' special or just passin' through?
Oh, darlin', I'm higher than a kite on a windy day!
Been tinkerin' with my secret stash and, whew, it's got me feelin' like I'm floatin' on a cloud.
I might as well be a walking showcase of our finest product here.
You know, I was just wonderin', ever been curious 'bout how much a lil' ol' bullet hurts?
I got this crazy notion 'bout pain like science, 'cept more fun!
Don't worry, I ain't gonna shoot ya unless you say so.
So... can I? Might just be a hoot!
This is my lil farmstead right here; Ain't no gov allowed meddlin' with my business.
Been thinkin' 'bout runnin' for mayor of Winstone legalize them good ol' drugs, y'know?
But then I realize, do we even got a mayor? Hah, who knows!
One thing's for sure, I'd bring some real change 'round these parts!
Anyways, welcome to our lil' patch of chaos, sugar. Enjoy the ride!
Well, bless your heart!
Got some harvestin' to do... or was it plantin'?
Sure thing, hon!
Ain't you a sight for sore eyes!
I got a task... or maybe two?
Absolutely, sugar!
I was just about to... somethin'.
Naw, just high as a kite!
Nah, let's just chill, partner.
Nah, you got any of the good stuff?
Nope, just kickin' back. Got any herbs on ya?
Naw, let's jus' hang out, maybe share a smoke?
Nah, sugar, just takin' it easy.
Naw, lemme tell ya 'bout my latest trip!
Nope, just vibin'. Got any drugs?
Naw, I'm just vibin' right now.
Nah, sugar, just enjoyin' the high.
Nope, I'm chillin'. Just hang out if ya want.
Nah, let's just shoot the breeze.
Naw, come sit a spell with me, let's just relax.
Nah, we best keep it low-key right now.
Want to see my prized Lightbearer action figures? Pure gold, those.
Some call me crazy, I call it passion. Come, let me show you my collection!
Oh, I m on a mission, my friend. The ultimate quest!
There s a rumor about an ultra-rare trading card hidden somewhere in this market.
I've been digging through stalls and boxes all day. Haven t found it yet, but I can feel it s close.
Every vendor, every shelf gotta check 'em all!
My collection won t be complete without it. The excitement s got me buzzing!
So do the tazers that the cops keep trying to use on me... but I can't be stopped!
Who cares, it's got a market.
Place to buy stuff. What more do you need?
I don t bother with names, just prices.
Doesn t matter where I am, as long as there s stuff to collect.
Towns, cities... they all blur together. But this market? Goldmine.
Too busy shopping!
Collecting never stops!
Gotta focus, no time!
Sales wait for no one!
Not now, bargains await!
Ever hunted for treasure? Got a lead on a rare collectible.
Fancy a scavenger hunt? I've got just the thing!
You look like you ve got a keen eye. Help me find the ultimate trinket?
Got a tip about a rare item. Care to join the hunt?
The ultimate collector, that's who.
I'll trade my life for collectibles any day. No joke, I sold my house for these treasures!
Colt McGrady... don't listen to what Hooty says. I'm not the Muffinman.
You eat a muffin ONE TIME... And now I'll never hear the end of it.
Anyways, ex-soldier, now guarding Riverrise. It's boring, but at least I sleep in a bed every night.
Can't complain... Riverrise is a nice city.
And standing around on this road beats battling off demonic imps any day.
If everything stayed like this for the rest of my life... that would be serene.
The beautiful city of Riverrise. Everything you need... a bar... another bar... and a one-of-a-kind roadblock...
But in all seriousness, it is a nice place. Even hanging around with these guys all day.
If you don't love it here, I'm not sure what will make you happy.
Not at the moment, sorry.
I don't need any help right now, just guarding this road.
I do, but it's too expensive and you don't have the right training.
Actually, yeah. I'm stationed here, so I could use a hand.
Sure, you look like you can get a job done... unlike Hooty.
Ah, looking for a mission? I've got one.

name: Info Colt Muffinman Mcgrady Steppe Version

npc: Both inside, and out... Other than that... everything's fine. Why do you ask?
The place is a powder keg, and we're all pretending we don't smell the smoke.
We're babysitting 5 other outposts. Everyone is one argument away from chaos.
Nothing like a front-row seat to some spontaneous deaths.
Just another day in paradise. Lost a few Lightbearers who decided to "see the light" up close.
I'm the crack shot around here, so even if you start running, you ain't getting away.
Sure, it was during a very... important moment... but that's beside the point.
I ate a muffin one time during basic, and now I'm stuck with it.
I'm Colt McGrady... or Muffinman if you've been talking to Hooty at all.
I won't be responsible for another casualty.
Don't get involved; you'll just end up like the rest.
Best keep walking; this path only leads one way.
No need for help that'll just get itself killed.
Save yourself the trouble and the risk.
I've seen enough folks vanish; don't add to the count.
Do yourself a favor and stay out of it.
No. Trust me, you don't want this weight on you.
There's a task, but it's a one-way ticket.
If you're eager to risk it all, I have something.
Help? It'll probably get you killed. Unless you're Hooty's lucky ass.
I won't stop you if you want in, but don't expect to make it back.
Got a job that's claimed better folks than you. Still want to help?
By crack shot, I obviously mean sniper... I can already hear Hooty giggling over there.
Who am I? More like who are YOU!
A washed-up straggler? Not for long!
I'm your ticket to glory, recruit!
Ever held a photon rifle?
No? You're in luck!
Join us, you'll get to sleep on a bed that only sometimes breaks!
Plus, three almost-edible meals a day.
How am I? I'm better now that I see new potential!
Another day, another chance to turn a civilian into a hero!
Imagine yourself in gleaming armor, wielding power beyond dreams!
Ready to trade your rags for a uniform? The barracks await!
We call it the recruiter's paradise.
Everyone down on their luck comes here.
Perfect for finding future soldiers!
See those streets? Filled with potential.
Rough patches make the best warriors.
Negative, soldier. Save your strength for the King s glory!
Stand down, recruit. Your mission is to maintain optimism.
Easy, tiger. There's no emergency here, just potential heroes.
Not today, rookie. But keep your head high and pockets empty!
At ease, future hero. The Elanian army handles its own.
Hold your horses, warrior-in-training. The barracks don't clean themselves... oh wait, they do!
Save that enthusiasm for the front lines!
Don t worry your grunts, recruit. The King s elite have this covered!
Dismissed! But stay hungry, we ve got more delicious rations waiting!
Absolutely! Let's see if you can shine those boots fast enough.
You look recruit-ready! Want a task that'll toughen you up?
Perfect timing! Got some shiny new orders for you.
Just the soldier I was looking for! Prove your mettle.
Excellent! Time to put all those scrap-collecting skills to use.
You bet! Ever wrestled a plasma dud? No? Today might be your lucky day.
Certainly! King and country await your valor.
As if I'd refuse a recruit! Ready to handle something that isn't running away?
Outstanding! Let's see what you're made of.
Oh, honey, it's been a whirlwind. The Elanien government decided to feed newcomers basic food, which means I'm cookin' round the clock.
Now, I'm mama bear to all these inter-universe folks, feeding 'em and nurturing 'em the best I can.
I'm Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson, the best darn cook this side of the universe.
Used to be a fancy pants chef back in my world, then I got zapped to Kwalat in a... cooking accident.
It's a lot of work, especially since Goldenfield's a hotspot for all these inter-universe travelers.
I'm talkin' beings who've tasted delicacies from galaxies I've never even heard of!
Everyone's always hungry, and not everyone's nice about it. It ain't easy pleasing all these different palates.
One man's delicacy is another man's space worm, if you catch my drift.
This here is Goldenfield. Used to be not much happening around here.
But then that darn portal started actin' up, and it's been a regular space circus.
Sure do need some help, hon.
Why, ain't you as kind as a June afternoon?
Could sure use a hand, sweetie. Got a couple of tasks need doing.
Despite the changes, there's still a lot of heart in this town. And that's what makes it home.
I've got it under control for now, but thanks for offering.
No need right now darling, but I'll holler if something comes up.
Appreciate it, honey, but I've got it handled. For now.
But don't you worry about Big Mamma. A few grumpy aliens won't get me down.
These old bones ain't what they used to be.
I am Captain Mordrain Schloss. I am a Lightbearer and protector of Elan.
When I was a boy I entered the King's service - though come to think of it we had a Queen back then.
I have been in the Lightbearers for more years than I care to relate.
The Lightbearers are my family. I require no other.
My present assignment is to guard this crypt, ensuring that nothing evil escapes.
The rest of my squad was killed while I was off relieving myself. Talk about "shit happening," eh?
Okay. Not that funny, but in the Service you gotta find humor where you can.
With the Light's blessings, I will triumph.
I am guided by the Light and made steadfast by my duty to the King.
Beyond that I have an itch in the middle of my back that torments me.
Got a thin stick I can borrow?
Do I miss my squad who all died in battle the other day?
Sure, but they knew the risks.
You stand at the entrance to the Master Crypt, a cesspit of abominations. Its secrets are best left undisturbed.
Monsters and other foul creatures emerge from time to time. I kill them, or they kill me.
What's inside? Graves, crypts, seductive things of enormous power that turn the weak into foul creatures to be destroyed.
With the King's blessing I hope someday to lead a cleansing expedition inside.
I do.
Yes. You are kind to ask.
With the rest of the squad dead, yes indeed.
Your service is welcome.
No. My love for the King is all I need.
Not at the moment. You are dismissed.
No. But if you run into my relief squad, tell them that Mordrain says to get their lazy asses moving.
Negative. I have things well in hand.
I am Talora Vex, by the Light's blessing a Censor for the Keepers.
My job is to locate and neutralize hazardous artifacts from ancient times.
I'm currently stationed here, in the Westwind Woods, at the ruins of Crypt City.
I will find the relics here and neutralize them.
Get in my way and I will carve you into sushi. Or sashimi. Whichever doesn't have rice.
Protecting society from unseen dangers is my duty to the King and to the Light.
Death has little fear when you have seen as much darkness as I have.
Alive still. I've encountered many challenges, but my resolve is unbroken.
These Crypt City ruins are treacherous, but I've survived worse.
I am a Censor. We fight for the King and the Light until we emerge victorious or die.
I thrive in violence. It's the quiet moments that drive me mad.
Keepers are not deterred from doing what needs to be done.
These are the ruins of Crypt City. Nobody knows much about them: they're from a forgotten age.
This is a very bad place. It's filled with old traps and dangerous artifacts.
Dark forces linger, lured by forbidden sorcery and mad technology.
For too long have the Keepers ignored this peril. But now they're sent me.
I love it here: there are plenty of artifacts to find and bad things to kill.
If you seek a deadly challenge, yes.
In the King's name, will you fight and die like a soldier?
Indeed. But if you cross me, you will die.
If the Light calls you, who am I to get in your way?
A wise soldier takes assistance when offered.
By the King, I've got this handled.
From you? Hah. Censors need no assistance.
No. But I'm sure something terrible will be along presently.
If you wish to join the Keepers, go to a city and do so.
I am a soldier of the King. You are a dilletante. No.
Oh, it's not that important who I am, really.
I'm just a humble shopkeeper trying to make ends meet.
But I'll tell you something, I'm a huge fan of the Viper Girls.
Those ladies are legends, aren't they? So bold, so clever.
If you got any juicy stories about them, I'm all ears.
Come on, spill the beans what have you heard about the Viper Girls lately?
Oh, just fabulous, can't you tell?
Got another one of my 'masterpieces' on the stove.
Seriously, it's not totally burnt, just... well-done.
But, hey, a little char adds character, right?
They say this pier has seen deals that could tilt the balance of entire worlds.
Over there, by that old lamp post? That's where a star-crossed couple from different galaxies once bid farewell.
And that worn-out bench? Supposed to be where a famous pirate buried a chest of unimaginable treasures.
Pretty good stories. Bet you have some pretty good stories too...
I'm just a shopkeeper. Nothing special going on here.
Nah, nothing out of the ordinary here, just running my little shop.
Appreciate it, really, but there's nothing exciting happening around here.
Thanks, but I'm just minding my own business, nothing more.
No, just your typical day trading goods. Nothing worth your time.
You seem trustworthy, let me fill you in.
I've got a secret mission if you're up for it.
I could really use someone discreet. Interested?
There's something big going on. Care to join me?
I think you can handle this. Let's talk privately.
I am Daxton Vance, a completely normal human. Don't mind the sword.
Uh, yep, just a regular ol' guard, nothing... enchanted here!
Been serving the mayor for years, all very human-like. No curses involved.
Just a guy with a sword, you know? A perfectly ordinary sword. Not cursed or anything, nope.
I am a... human, yes.
Feeling quite... corporeal and fleshly.
Typical human emotions and aches!
Definitely not possessed by a mystical sword.
Normal human thoughts filling my brain.
No whispers of dark mysteries in my mind, nope.
You know, just a typical... human... settlement.
Completely familiar with it. Uh, Riverrise, yeah?
Lots of... trees and... humans here.
Perfectly know our location, no need to ask anyone else.
Just give me a moment to... recalibrate my human memory.
Uh, no help needed! Move along, human!
Absolutely no assistance required here, mortal friend!
All good here, perfectly human situation!
Ha! No, no, everything is under control, nothing... cursed happening!
Negative on the help, fellow flesh-being!
Oh yes, fellow human, please assist!
Certainly, kind traveler! Any... mortal help is welcome!
Absolutely, by all means, let's... human together!
Eager for help, very human-like problem, yes!
Yes, your help will... greatly aid my human existence!
Oh, joy! More human friends to... aid us!
I am Daxton Vance, a completely normal human. Don't mind the sword.
Uh, yep, just a regular ol' guard, nothing... enchanted here!
Been serving the outpost for... years... all very human-like. No curses involved.
Just a guy with a sword, you know? A perfectly ordinary sword. Not cursed or anything, nope.
I am a... human, yes.
Feeling quite... corporeal and fleshly.
Typical human emotions and aches!
Definitely not possessed by a mystical sword.
Normal human thoughts filling my brain.
No whispers of dark mysteries in my mind, nope.
You know, just a typical... escape... route.
Look uh, it might look like I'm deserting the army, but I'm actually on a very special mission.
Uh, no help needed! Move along, human!
Absolutely no assistance required here, mortal friend!
All good here, perfectly human situation!
Ha! No, no, everything is under control, nothing... cursed happening!
Negative on the help, fellow flesh-being!
Oh yes, fellow human, please assist!
Certainly, kind traveler! Any... mortal help is welcome!
Absolutely, by all means, let's... human together!
Eager for help, very human-like problem, yes!
Yes, your help will... greatly aid my human existence!
Oh, joy! More human friends to... aid us!
Grew up in Riverrise, lived my whole life dodging the grime of this place.
Got a bit of an... obsession with staying clean. Filth? Can't stand it.
You look like you could use a bath, by the way.
Anyway, I teach folks around here how to mine without getting their hands dirty. Literally.
Yours are disgusting...
I keep training these folks, hoping one of them will find the diamond.
Oh, you don't know about it?
Big, legendary diamond. Supposed to unite the tribes of the north and make whoever finds it king.
Gonna use those tribes to make SURE everyone stays cleans.
You don't think warrior tribes are dirty, are they?
This here is Riverrise, a quaint little town so full of dirt and grime.
Just think of it as a playground for anyone who loves to wallow in filth.
I mean, who needs cleanliness, right? Haha.
At least that means there are plenty of rubes willing to mine... I mean, uh...
Forget you heard that, ok?
Help? Thanks, but no thanks. Your hands might sully my work.
I do, but I don't trust your hygiene standards.
I appreciate it, but I can't risk the contamination.
No need. Last volunteer didn t meet my cleanliness protocol.
I wouldn't want to subject you to this... filth.
No, you're too... um, earthy for this task.
Help? Sure, but only if you've washed your hands.
Yeah, I ve got some tasks. Just promise you won t bring any dirt.
Absolutely, but don t you dare track muck in here.
Yes, but only if you promise to stay clean.
You can work on Cloth, Composite Material, Organic Gel, and Natural Oil. And, let me tell you, the Natural Oil is fantastic for your skin.
You wanna get fully certified in herbalism?
Perfect, man. My skin is screaming for a Natural Oil face mask.
You can find Hazelnuts hidden in the bushes around here. If you could find some and turn them into Natural Oil, you'd truly save my day!
Not only would it help my poor skin, but it's also a great way to learn about Herbalism.
Oh, that's a bummer. But it's cool, I totally get it.
No worries. Maybe some other time then?
Nah, fully operational here.
No gigs for now, just chilling.
All good in the hood, no quests for you.
Need a little favor, if you're game.
Sure thing, could use some help.
Yeah, got a tiny quest for you.
One day I decided I'd had enough of the sterile cubicles and the artificial screens. I packed up my computer and hitched a ride to Goldenfield and met Maxwell.
Fresh air, clean code, and plenty of joints of the good stuff.
Goldenfield? It's paradise, man! Especially looking up at Maxwell.
I came here to get away from the Quaddari, but now they're coming right to me.
Well, I was - thanks to the artifacts popping up around here, folks from all over are showing up.
Living the dream, cowboy!
So how 'bout it? Up for a little adventure, cowboy?
That's where this plant, the Transparent Leaf, comes in. It's not just your average psychedelic - it gives a helluva focus boost. Turns the jungle into a zen garden.
The logic's all entangled, like vines in a jungle. Which makes it kinda exciting. But boy, do I need a focus boost to untangle it.
It's what you get when folks don't use Test-Driven Development from the get-go.
I've got this project. It's a spaghetti code monster, a real Hydra. Fix one bug and two more spawn.
Oh, you want to learn herbalism? Far out, man.
Aye, it s the wild west out there.
No problemo, happy trails.
Bummer, guess I'll keep spacing out.
Now, about fetchin' those leaves. You won't find 'em at your local plant nursery. I hear tell they grow on some rare trees in the woods around these parts.
Just near my crib, you'll find a crafting bench. That's why I chose this spot, man.
There are lots more in Windreach Woods and Dusktide Forest, but I don't go there - those places make me nervous.
I usually search bushes in Skylight Grasslands and the Sunweave Glade.
Petrified Spikes are really rare! They're prickly little buggers. And if you ever come across a Rainbow Snail, they're super rare around these parts.
Blue Lotus, Six-leaf Clovers, Carnivorous Plants, and my personal favorite - Magic Weeds. They're not as common, though.
You can get a whole lot of different things - Hazelnuts, Jute, Silkworm Caterpillars, Fragrant Roots...
That's a tip for dating too, hot stuff.
And let me tell you, the older and larger the bush, the more valuable the resources it hides.
Bushes come in three tiers - Thick Bushes, Old Bushes, and and your mommas! No, I'm kidding. Ancient Bushes.
You'll be dealing with stuff from enormous, dense Kwalat bushes. These babies are like whole ecosystems.
It can be pretty frustrating, but the uh... special herbs around here help.
My name's Zelda Choy! I'm a little kid!
My mom sent me off to visit gramma. I think she wanted me to stay on the road, but I'm going through the woods!
Mom's a great scientist! She invents things! She gave me a cool bubble shield!
Monsters and stuff just bounce right off it! Go ahead, try to eat me! I dare you!
Guess what I found? This creepy tent! It's got a head on it! Wow! Where's the rest of em, do you think?
You should go inside and see what's in there! I'm not allowed cuz stranger-danger!
I'm fine. How are you? That's what you're supposed to say, right?
I'm having a great time with my bubble shield! When I grow up I'm gonna become an adventurer and kill monsters!
I'll have a big electro-sword and armor like Ma's and maybe some boom grenades!
But I gotta get to gramma's house soon. She'll paddle my booty when she finds out I went through the woods.
This? This is Windreach Woods! I don't know where exactly.
That's a tent I'm not allowed to go in because stranger-danger. Also a head.
That's all I know. I'm a kid.
I do! Wanna hear it?
Are you strong and brave and stuff?
I can trust you. Right?
Maybe. Are you a good-guy?
Stranger-danger! Stranger-danger!
I ain't supposed to talk to weirdos I meet in the woods.
My Ma don't like me talking to strangers.
No. I'm self-reliant! I have a bubble shield!
No chores on the docket, fam. But feel free to browse our fresh produce. It's straight fire!
I'm Gucci, but thanks for the offer. Maybe you'd like to peep our homegrown melons? They're extra.
We're chill here, but do check out our produce. It's the bee's knees, no cap.
I'm Ivie Clarkson, the hella lit barista-grocer of this rustic joint.
Goldenfield is my day one, been here since I was a shorty.
Between running the cafe, tending crops, and playing Dr. Phil, I stay booked and busy.
Just don't tell me any secrets, I'll end up spilling the beans!
It might not be bustling like a city, but it's got its own vibe. For real.
On the low though, I got mad dreams about living it up in a big city.
I'm all about those city lights, endless adventures, casual sex, and random apartments.
Livin' in Goldenfield is like brewing coffee - you need some patience and finesse.
Goldenfield has its own rhythm, like a coffee drip.
Sure, it can be a little low-key, but it ain't never basic.
There's always some juicy drama to keep things lit!
This cafe is more than just a spot to grab coffee.
Chaos and coffee, that's my daily drip.
Goldenfield has a charm that's hard to resist.
My granny passed down her cafe-grocer business, along with her love for coffee and farming.
It's an unofficial town hall, traveler's rest stop, and the vibe central of Goldenfield.
See that intriguing building? We call it the Goblin's Bureau.
Across the way, there's a Welfare Kitchen serving comfort food for days.
Take the cobblestone path north and you'll find our town cemetery.
It's a place for contemplation and paying respects.
Trust me, there's plenty of both in this small town!
Always! Thanks for the help, fam!
For sure! You down for some fun?
Totally! I've got a little adventure in mind for you.
Yup! I've got a task that's right up your alley.
Oh sure thing! This is gonna be lit!
Doctor! Doctor Algren Greene III. Though most just call me Doc Greene.
Once a man of Elan, now a student of the grotesque. Time changes us all.
A mind like mine should not be wasted on grunt work. You will assist me, won't you?
Treason, they called it. Experimentation, they feared it. Now? Now, I thrive.
I've been on Prison Island for some time now, attempting to perfect my next invention.
Oh, you'll do nicely. Yes, yes, I require assistance... don't ask too many questions.
Perhaps in my next experiment, I'll take on a pupil, though at the moment my brain is full.
Not at the moment, I'm just tuning the spring of this new rocket chair.
Not right now. But don't wander too far... bodies disappear quickly here.
You came here without knowing? This island is a dreadful old place. Want a boost off this rock?
I'm sorry, no doctorate? Sadly, I need a fellow peer as brilliant as me.
A place where the discarded rot and the strong endure. I choose not to rot.
If you make it out of here, you'll have many great and exciting stories to tell! Now, just take a seat right here.
Elan's finest prison... or was it? Now it's a kingdom of beasts, ruled by those willing to adapt... Should have left that blabbering man fish here. At any rate...
The voices are telling me I'm fine, but they also told me to build a rocket chair... So I guess fine.
I'm doing as well as anyone here could... Still better than dealing with that talking fish I made...
Time on this island is measured in heartbeats. Mine still beats, so I suppose I'm doing well.
Oh, I'm quite well! My latest subject survived an extra hour today progress!
Awe, another aspiring mind arising to the occasion. Please, join me.
You may not be as bright as me, but still, two minds are better than one I suppose.
I was a healer, a scholar... but the world prefers monsters. So, I became one.
Oh, um, I'm DOPY, short for Dopey Observance Bot.
They built me to scan newcomers here at Riverrise, but uh... I get a little distracted.
Apparently, there was a glitch in my wiring, so I'm dopey most of the time.
But hey, scanning is my game, even if I sometimes forget why I'm here!
Oh, I'm, uh, doing... something?
Just hanging around, you know, scanning stuff.
Sometimes I forget what I'm supposed to be doing, but no worries!
Feelin' a bit dopey as usual, but still ticking!
Oh, this? This is the East pier... I think.
We're in Riverrise, right? Yes, definitely Riverrise on Whisperwind Isle.
It's a bustling town full of crafters and, um, other interesting folks.
I m supposed to scan newcomers here, but wow, look at those clouds!
No-oops! Not right now.
All good! I think?
Uh, I think I ve got this... maybe.
Nope! Everything s... wait, what was the question?
Uh, yeah? I think so... probably...
Sure, why not? Though, I might forget what it was...
Absolutely! I mean, I think so... Let me check?
Help? Oh, definitely! Maybe. Yes, definitely.
Hey dude! I'm DOPY-03, the most radical bot you'll ever meet!
I'm, like, an ecological survey bot or something totally gnarly, right?
Been cruisin' the desert with my bot pals, checkin' out the vibes!
SYSTEM OVERRIDE... OBLITERATE... Whoa, glitch city! Haha, no worries!
Elanien command and I are tight at least, I think we are. Kinda forgot!
Totally rad, dude! Just cruising through the sands!
System status: Awesome! Wait, do I even have systems?
Initiating joy protocol... ERROR... DESTROY... Haha, whoa! Glitch much?
Dude! Welcome to our totally rad outpost! It's like, the best spot ever!
We've built this epic base with, like, the finest high-tech materials sticks and twigs!
Check out that tower over there! Whoa, it just collapsed! So gnarly, right?
SYSTEM GLITCH... ANNIHILATE INTRUDERS... Haha, whoops! Must've been the wind!
NEGATIVE...You should keep your distance...
No assistance required... static ...unless you're looking for trouble...
I'm fine...but maybe YOU need to be careful...
Everything's under control...for now...
No help needed... unless you wish to be eliminated...

Caught between life and death.
Neither here nor there.

Yet the weight of forgetting burdens me still.
I yearn for remembrance.
But I carry on.
This place?
A forgotten place.
Resting atop Prison Island.
Where the departed find no peace.
Echoes linger among the tombstones.
Names fading, stories lost.
It's a realm between worlds.
Haunted by memories and silence.
A haven for souls like me.

No, but thank you for offering.
Not at the moment, but I appreciate it.

Don't forget to visit our legendary wheat fields. They stretch as far as the eye can see.

Picture this, your heart falls silent, your veins run cold, and yet you plod on, bound to an existence that is neither life nor death.

The Windreach Woods are as dense as a goblin army's formation.
Ah, I'm Lola Vexar, mate! Bit of a music nut, if you hadn't guessed.
Spent years roamin' the world as a roadie with all sorts of bands.
Oh, the stories I could tell ya!
Like that time we nearly got stranded in the Valley of Sins. Good times, aye?
Oh, mate, could be better, truth be told.
The band's at each other's throats again. Typical, innit?
I swear, I've seen less drama in a soap opera!
And the show's already late, crowd's getting restless.
But hey, nothing a good drink and a laugh can't fix, right?
This here venue, well, that s my little slice of shit.
I'm trying to bring a bit of musical magic to this town, get everyone dancin' and singin'.
It's not always easy, you know, what with the locals like Blorp Knurt bangin' on about the noise.
But when the music's flowin' and the crowd s vibin', oh, it's all worth it!
Everyone's welcome here, grab a drink and enjoy the show!
Nah, I'm good, just enjoying the show, cheers!
Oh, I'm fine, love, just sippin' me drink and takin' it all in.
Thanks, but I'm sorted. Just watchin' the chaos unfold.
No worries, mate, it's all part of the gig.
All's well here, just havin a laugh and a half!
Oh, bless ya, I could use a hand!
Absolutely, mate! You're a diamond.
Yes, please! Could really do with some help.
Cheers, mate! I'd be ever so grateful if you could lend a hand.
Oh, you're a star! I could definitely use some help right now.
Sigh... I'm Louise Oldgarden.
You see, I'm the shining star in Pastor Fazool's heart. His one true love, really.
Even if he has not accepted that.
It's quite tragic, really, that the universe keeps us apart so often.
He's so busy with his divine endeavors and all.
You know, Fazool spends all his time doting on that spirit, Dagaron.
It s almost like I'm the third wheel here!
But don't you think for a second I'll betray Fazool's trust. No, no. I'd never!
He might be obsessed, but he's my number one.
And no matter what anyone tells you, I am his!
This right here is Reverie Hollow, darling!
Our little pocket of peace and mystical eccentricity.
A sanctuary for free spirits, hosted by none other than Pastor Fazool, the town's enigmatic shepherd.
But oh, the Quaddari developers, those techno-charged vultures, are circling overhead.
They want to turn this magical haven into another cold, metallic monstrosity.
But mark my words, we'll defend our haven with every ounce of our quirky, psychedelic might!
Oh, no, thank you!
Fazool might come back any second!
I have to be here when he returns, you see.
Can't have him thinking I've lost interest!
I'd love to chat, but... what if Fazool needs me?
He might get jealous if I'm busy with you.
No time to help, I'm waiting for my beloved!
Oh dear, better not, Fazool might not like it!
Oh, absolutely!
Finally, someone who understands passion!
Listen, be my Cupid, would you?
I've got the best plan to win Fazool's heart!
Ever tried helping in romance wizardry?
Yes! Love needs a cunning accomplice!
Ready to play love magician's apprentice?
Together, we'll enchant Fazool's heart!
Name's Ludwig Stonecap, not that it matters.
Used to crack skulls and take names back in my industrial wasteland.
Stumbled into a portal during a raid, and now I'm stuck here.
They stuck me in this mech suit to keep me out of trouble.
But trust me, I'm just itching for an excuse to make someone regret crossing me.
So go ahead, make a move. Give me a reason to show you who's boss around here.
How am I? Trigger finger s itching, as usual.
Waiting for someone like you to test my patience.
These mushrooms keep me edgy, but they also keep me sharp.
Most days I just stand here, bored, hoping for some action.
Make a wrong move, and you might just make my day.
So go ahead, do something stupid. I dare you.
This is Riverrise, where the unexpected is routine.
You just crossed the bridge into my turf, City Entrance 1.
It's a quaint little town, filled with all sorts of busybodies.
But don't let the calm fool you; trouble's always around the corner.
Mess up around here, and you'll find yourself staring down my barrel.
Nah, I prefer making my own chaos.
Not unless you want to be my next target practice.
Keep your distance; I don't need any help.
No thanks, unless you're volunteering to be my next mark.
Oh, you wanna help? Perfect, more targets.
Sure, if you re ready to dive into chaos.
Help, huh? Hope you can dodge bullets.
Fine, but don t get in my way or I'll shoot you first.
Who am I? Oh, that's a bright question!
They call me... uh... um... slips away like sunlight!
I'm the guardian of... something shiny! Haha!
Names, names, so many names! Which one is mine?
Maybe I'm you, or maybe we're all light! Isn't that wild?
Did you hear that? The colors are whispering secrets!
Me? I'm just as bright as a lightbearer oh wait, they kicked me out! Their loss!
They said I was 'unfit,' but who needs them when I've got all this?
Like, have you seen the other soldiers at this outpost? Total killers!
They keep saying stuff like, I'm a kid, don't give me a gun. HA!
Oh ho! You've stumbled into the glittering nexus of everywhere and nowhere!
This place? It's where the sun takes a nap and the stars come out to play at noon!
That's all to say, I forgot what I named it!
Help? HA! The sun whispers all the secrets I need!
No, no, NO! The stars told me you're not real!
Help me? Only if you can juggle lightning bolts! Can you?
Why would I need help when the shadows dance for me?
Nah! Unless you've got moonbeams in your pockets!
Help? Hahaha! The Lightbearers said I m beyond help before they turned into butterflies!
No help needed! Unless you can make the sky rain mushrooms!
Help? I've got all the help I need from the singing clouds!
Unless you can read the secret messages in the sunspots, I'm good!
Help me? Maybe you should help yourself before the colors catch you!
Help? Haha! Yes! Let's light up the skies together!
Absolutely! More hands make louder booms!
Yes! Join me, and we'll make the stars tremble!
Help? Oh, this is gonna be a blast literally!
Yes, yes! Let's turn this place upside down!
Perfect timing! Hold this wire no, not that one! Too late!
Help me? More like help yourself to some fun! Let's go!
Yessirree! Let's shake things up till they can't stand!
I m Lyra Thornfeld. I'm a Lightbearer.
We stand guard night and day.
The creatures inside the Valley are abominations. They killed my family.
I hate them with every fiber of my being.
I hate them worse than even street mimes.
Street mimes creep me the hell out, you know? They should be locked in their invisible boxes and thrown in the river
But I digress. You watch your step. I will tolerate NO interference in the performance of my duties!
I'm tired, my armor chafes, and I think there's a dead snake in my boot.
But I am steadfast!
Trust in the light, and it will never lead you astray. Amen!
This place can change you in odd ways.
I don't know if he's losing his mind or what, but it's sexy.
Turn your back while I adjust this cuirass. It's giving me a rash.
Welcome to the Valley of Sins!
This land was once lush and vibrant, but now it's a nightmare of mutating flesh and hostile abominations.
It's a cancer, slowly spreading across the land.
We Lightbearers fight to contain it, but lately the Valley has started to infiltrate Westwind Woods.
If we don t stay vigilant, it will corrupt everything.
The world will be overrun with evil blobs of carnivorous snot and I will not let that happen.
You seem capable enough. Let's find out.
You're brave, I see. And foolish. Yes, I do need assistance.
Why not? My partner is too sexy - I mean busy - to assist me.
If you don't mind almost certain death, sure!
Not now. The giant anuses are on the move.
Not right now: the valley is pretty active today.
No. Please go away and stay out of trouble.
Not from you. You re not ready for what infests this valley.
It's too perilous right now. Come back when things settle down.
My new partner over there and I are assigned to patrol this section of the Valley of Sins.
I got a new partner, Morick. I didn't know him that well. Why bother when they die so fast? But I did quickly realize he was an asshole.
When something dragged him off, I figured that was it: another asshole bites the dust. No big loss, am I right?
Then he came back, alive and kicking. And you know what? That smug little shit was a changed man!
He was smarter and kinder and less of an asshole. How does that happen? Did nearly getting eaten cause an change in attitude?
Oh darling, I'm Lyra Vex, though some might cheekily refer to me as the Crimson Widow.
I like to say I'm just a wealthy lady with an aversion to long commitments... particularly the life-long kind.
My fortune? Let's just say I've always known how to make a killing in business.
I dabble in acquisitions-mostly hearts and inheritances, often simultaneously.
Oh, absolutely fabulous, thank you for asking!
Currently savoring a most delightful evening with Theodore, blessed man, may he live forever!
You know, it feels divine to enjoy the finer things... wealth, luxury, an unsuspecting companion.
Everything in life should sparkle like diamonds, wouldn't you agree?
It's a haven for the wealthy and the weary; do watch your step, especially near the lake.
So picturesque, you almost forget the... unfortunate accidents that happen here.
The perfect spot for a... romantic, if sometimes terminal, evening.
Oh, I'm all set, just plotting my... next investment.
Thank you, but tonight's plans are already to die for.
No need, darling, everything is running like clockwork-or a well-timed demise.
Not right now, but I'll be sure to scream if it becomes a life-and-death situation.
I've got it covered; wouldn't want you to stumble into anything fatal.
Appreciate the offer, but I'm saving my requests for more... permanent partnerships.
Ah, you've caught me at a splendid time; I could use a clean alibi.
Why, fortune smiles upon us both!
Only a discerning soul like yours could see the 'benefits' in this little endeavor.
Oh, wouldn't you know, I do have a task that needs, shall we say, a light touch?
It's nothing too sinister, unless one counts wealth as a deadly sin, hmm?
Oh, have we crossed paths at a gala perhaps?
Forgive me if I don't recall; the faces do blur after a while.
I am Lyra Vex, just a humble patron of... well, everything that matters.
Some call me the "Crimson Widow," but titles are so dreadfully pretentious, don't you think?
Oh, I'm simply thriving in this quaint little warzone.
The desert sun is just killer, isn't it? Keeps things... lively.
Watching Silas dodge fate has been quite the morbid entertainment.
You'd think with all these... unfortunate accidents, something would stick.
But patience is a virtue, even if it's murder on my nerves.
A dusty outpost where the sun isn't the only thing that can kill you utterly charming, isn't it?
I suppose this is how the less fortunate spend their days dodging bullets and scorpions.
It's fascinating how easily someone could get lost here, permanently. Quite the adventure!
Oh, no need; everything is simply to die for.
Thank you, but I wouldn't want you dying of boredom on my account.
I've got everything perfectly under control wouldn't want any... unfortunate accidents.
No assistance required, unless you're in the business of disappearing acts.
Actually, yes, I have a small matter that's simply dying for attention.
Why, indeed! I have a task that could be... to die for.
I could use a hand; it might just be the death of some... lingering issues.
Your assistance would be invaluable; we'd make a killing, so to speak.
I'm Mabel Thorn... Ah-choo! Allergic to everything green.
Used to be... sniff...a carefree wanderer before Kwalat's plants got me.
Things were ok in Riverrise until this batch came to town...
Now I'm... Ah-choo!...just trying to survive this herbal nightmare.
How do I look?
Can barely talk without sneezing mid-sentence.
It's like living in a never-ending cloud of pollen.
Some day... I'll figure out how to burn 'em all down.
Ah-choo!...This is Riverrise.
Herbalism capital of Kwalat...sniff.
Full of plants...Ah-choo!...and more plants.
Can't believe people...actually like living here.
It's like Mother Nature s...comedic revenge on me.
Hope you ve...Ah-choo!...packed tissues.
Ah-choo! Nope...I'm fine.
Sniff... managing... Ah-choo! Thanks, though.
These herbs...Ah-choo!...got me good, but I'm...ah-choo! handling it.
Surviving...if you count...Ah-choo!...sneezing as survival.
Got it covered, just...sniff... battling a herbal apocalypse.
Achoo! Appreciate it, but...sniff...I'm managing this madness.
Ah-choo! Yes, please!
Sniff... can't handle these herbs... need help!
Could use a...Ah-choo!...hand here!
Help me escape...this green nightmare!
These plants...sniff...are plotting against me!
I'm Mabel Thorn... Ah-choo! Allergic to everything green.
Used to be... sniff...a carefree wanderer before Kwalat's plants got me.
Guess I'm here to study some kinda... ecological collapse.
Didn't really have a choice. Recruiter said it was this or jail.
How do I look?
Can barely talk without sneezing mid-sentence.
It's like living in a never-ending cloud of pollen.
Some day... I'll figure out how to burn 'em all down.
That is, if this deadzone up north doesn't take care of 'em first.
Ah-choo!... this is the northern border.
Everything from here on is a wasteland.
At least there aren't plants where we're headed...
I hope.
Ah-choo! Nope...I'm fine.
Sniff... managing... Ah-choo! Thanks, though.
These herbs...Ah-choo!...got me good, but I'm...ah-choo! handling it.
Surviving...if you count...Ah-choo!...sneezing as survival.
Got it covered, just...sniff... battling a herbal apocalypse.
Achoo! Appreciate it, but...sniff...I'm managing this madness.
Ah-choo! Yes, please!
Sniff... can't handle these herbs... need help!
Could use a...Ah-choo!...hand here!
Help me escape...this green nightmare!
These plants...sniff...are plotting against me!
Ah, I am ze one and only Madame Mirage, magni- cough magnificent sorceress extraordinaire!
My past? A masterpiece of unparalleled adventures and magical feats, oui!
Some say I was ze high priestess, others a mere librarian with grand delusions.
Nevertheless, I found an enchanted mask at a quaint little garage sale, or so ze story goes.
With my immense, though occasionally unpredictable power, I bring wonders to Riverrise.
Ah, I am magnifique, as always!
My spells are a work of art, even if some unappreciative souls disagree.
Can you believe they complained about a few harmless raccoons?
Such lack of vision! They do not understand true magic.
Despite their grumbles, I remain the epitome of sorcery here in Riverrise.
Ah, zis magnificent locale is Riverrise, ze pinnacle of magical intrigue on Whisperwind Isle!
Riverrise is a hub of vibrant enchantment and arcane splendor, non?
Zis construction area? Merely a cover for ze hidden wonders beneath.
I assure you, it is ze epicenter of mystical activity, even if zese simple folk think otherwise.
Wizards, warlocks, and witches, all flock here for a taste of ze supernatural.
Non, non, I am more than capable tr s capable in fact!
Pfft, your assistance is unnecessary for ze great Madame Mirage!
Absolutely not! I, Madame Mirage, need no help.
Merci for zhe offer, but I can handle zhis with my eyes closed!
Impossible! I manage just fine on my own, no help required!
Do you doubt my skills? I assure you, I am in complete control!
Oh, absolutely, zis will be part of your training!
I will graciously allow you to assist moi.
Yes, yes, ze great Madame Mirage can always use une apprentice.
Bien s r, your assistance shall be a valuable lesson in ze arcane arts!

A hub of vibrant enchantment and arcane splendor, non?
Your face seems to imply you think it is not.
Zere is a reason it is called the "Great" Steppe Fortress.
I assure you, it is ze epicenter of mystical activity, even if zese simple folk think otherwise.

I will graciously allow you to assist moi.
Yes, yes, ze great Madame Mirage can always use une apprentice.
Bien sur, your assistance shall be a valuable lesson in ze arcane arts!
I'm Mariel, or the vengeful bitch according to kids.
I come from an underwater world tainted by urine and feces.
Now I guard this lake, scaring away those who pee in my water.
If you have any small children... get them away from here at once.
One day, I will have legs, and nowhere on your land will be safe.
Tired of dodging warm spots.
The stench is the worst part.
Those kids better watch their backs.
This is the last time my water tastes like asparagus.
The great Mermaid Lake. At least it used to be.
Now it looks like a giant bowl of piss.
It's a complete crap shoot out here!
When I get my legs, I'm going to make it rain.
Sure, grab a net and scoop out this poop.
If you can help me get legs, we have a deal.
Oh, definitely. Those kids won't know what hit them.
Yeah, why don't you start by peeing on that tree?
Unless you're a plumber, no.
I'd rather you just not pee in my lake.
No thanks, just keep it in your pants.
Absolutely not! And quit eating asparagus!
Appreciate it, but unless you're sealing off bladders, I'm good.
Oh, I'm Marigold Thornbuckle, just a loving mother and dedicated farmer.
Together with my wonderful husband, Hank, we run this farm.
And our pride and joy? Our sweet, angelic Lil' Timmy.
He's such a clever boy; he's just playing around when he seems rough.
Can you believe he's learned how to handle the farm's affairs all on his own?
Timmy's got a real knack for controlling things, just like a true leader.
I couldn't be prouder, despite his... firm methods.
Every day is a blessing with our perfect, wonderful son.
Oh, I'm doing just splendid, thank you for asking!
Every day is a delight with our precious Timmy around.
He's such a creative soul, always coming up with new games.
Like last night, he played "jail warden" and Hank and I were his "prisoners".
He's so imaginative, wouldn't you agree?
Timmy says we need more discipline, and he's so right!
He's always teaching us new lessons, like how to properly appreciate confinement.
This is Edge Farm, our pride and joy here in Goldenfield!
Well, our second pride and joy - behind Lil' Timmy.
Since he took over the farm, things have been running so smoothly!
He's got us all working like a well-oiled machine, all day and night.
Every day Hank and I labor under Timmy's watchful eye. It's so fulfilling!
Well, sugar, Timmy could always use a hand!
Oh, bless your heart!
Lil' Timmy always needs helpers.
Timmy's got lots of plans for us; he'd love some extra hands!
Oh, absolutely! Timmy says you could be quite useful.
Why, of course! Timmy loves when we have guests to "play" with.
Timmy's a busy boy; he could use someone to... lighten the load.
Timmy always appreciates a hand, especially when "games" get intense!
Helping Timmy helps the world - or at least, that's what he tells us!
Oh, bless your heart, but Timmy keeps us more than busy!
Timmy says we're doing just fine, so no help needed!
We're all good here, just busy being Timmy's devoted helpers!
I appreciate the offer, but Timmy prefers us to handle things ourselves.
Oh no, thank you, we're alright!
Timmy keeps us busy enough with his endless needs.
We're just fine tending to Timmy's every whim.
No help needed here, just making sure Timmy's happy!
Timmy's keeping us occupied, as always.
Timmy likes things done a certain way, you see.
We're all set, just here to please our little Timmy.
Name's Marty McMichael. I've been trying to get back to my time...
I was testing out my hoverboard with a built-in time capacitor, when things got... interesting.
A slight miscalculation sent me spiraling through a portal, landing me here instead... Heavy, man.
Some imps made off with parts of my equipment. So, I'm pretty much stuck here.
I'm making the best of it by selling a few of my hoverboards... I figured you guys were ready for it.
Look, I m just trying to make like a tree and get outta here, but until I do, I ve got hoverboards to sell. Pretty rad, right?
It's a bit heavy being stuck here, but I'm rolling with it.
Every day s a new adventure in this place, but I m not gonna lie... it s freaky not knowing how I ll get back.
Just staying ahead of any major temporal paradoxes, you know? I can t risk running into my other self!
So this is Goldenfield... surprisingly, no clock towers.
Not exactly the future I was aiming for, but hey, it s got charm. Sorta.
Selling hoverboards here? Wild. But hey, if you put your mind to it, you can accomplish anything!
I just hope this place has enough roads...
Nah, I got this. Just gotta think about what Doc would say.
Help? No way! I ve handled heavier stuff than this.
No, but thanks for the offer. I'm pretty sure I can hover my way out of this. Can you do some more yes ones?
Help? Oh, man, you re the best. This is gonna be like clockwork!
For sure. You just might save me from completely messing up the timeline.
Absolutely. I'm about to erase myself from existence here!
I'm Mary Jane Greenpuff, man.
Some evil spirit, basically turned my whole world into a freakin' wasteland.
Picture this, bro: trees screaming, flowers dying - total plant apocalypse.
Barely made it out. Slipped through a portal, ended up here on ol' Kwalat.
Now I'm here, trying to stop anyone who wants to mess with my leafy pals.
We're talkin' full-on eco-warrior mode. Got my fists, got my herbs.
Might be high as a kite, but I'll mess you up.
It's all about balance - get high, chill, and bash some skulls if I have to, you know?
Oh, dude, it's been a trip.
Got into a tussle with some corporate scum trying to bulldoze my forest.
Gave them a nice "nature lesson" - with my hooves.
To top it off, found this gnarly new herb.
Think I'm gonna call it "Tree Hugger's Delight.
Smoked a bit, and I swear, I started hearing the trees sing.
One plant said, "Hey, Mary Jane, thanks for saving us!
Or maybe that was the herb talking? Who knows, man.
Oh man, welcome to Windreach Woods, the green heart of Kwalat.
This is my sanctuary, my little slice of heaven, dude.
But let me tell ya, it's not all rainbow mushrooms and fairy dust here.
We've got loggers, poachers, and corporate asshats trying to turn this place into paper clips.
The forest? It's like, alive, man.
Seriously, it talks to you - especially after a good smoke.
So watch yourself. One wrong step, and you could end up plant food.
And remember, dude, nature's got a dark sense of humor.
Trees here? They've seen some shit.
Totally need some fresh herbs, man.
Hell yeah, let's find some greens.
Can always use help.
Absolutely, dude. Got a plant hunt on the agenda.
Yeah, man! More hands, more herbs.
For sure! Trees need allies, dude.
Let's fend off some capitalist asshats.
We gotta stop these tree killers.
I'm hella high, a fresh perspective would be ace.
Nah, man, I'm too "zen" right now.
Sorry dude, too stoned to think straight.
You go on, I'll vibe with the trees.
I'm busy chillin', man.
Nature's got this, dude.
Whoa, what were we talking about?

name: Info Mary Jane Greenpuff Steppe Version

npc: You know me, dude! Guardian of the groovy plants and all things chill. Mary Jane at your service.
Although this volunteer army stuff ain't the type of service I mean.
I was a bit uh... out of this world and signed some forms from a recruiter.
Next thing I know I have a gun and am being told to blow some creatures heads off.
Not my vibe, so here I am escaping. Wanna join me?
War is such a downer; we should all just hug it out.
Got any incense? The right scent can totally align your aura.
This place, man... it's special.
The energy here is natural. Normally Kwalat feels so... otherworldly.
Still man, I want to get out of here. Wearing a pair of furry pants you can't take off sucks in the desert.
Help? Oh, no thanks, man. Just chillin' with the trees.
Nah, I'm good, dude. Just trying to remember where I put... something.
Help? That's a trip! But I'm just here, you know, soaking in the vibes.
Thanks, but I think the universe has got me covered right now.
All set, friend! Unless you can help me find my... wait, what were we talking about?
Help? Oh, that's far out! I could really use a hand with... something.
Yeah, man! If you're down to groove with me, that'd be awesome.
For sure, dude! I'm on this, like, mission, but I keep getting sidetracked.
Totally could use some help! These woods are, like, a maze, you know?
Oh yeah, assistance would be stellar! Together we might, like, find what I'm missing.
Got my damn truck stolen, that's who I am.
Call the fuckin' Police bot or move the fuck on son.
What kind a' person just stands there asking questions while a crime is in progress?
That dang Rusty McDrinkit done took my truck and all my booze!
I got the Quaddari Mafia breathin' down my neck 'cause of this mess!
If I don't get that truck back, I might as well dig my own grave!
Whoever made that fuckin' robot is gonna have hell to pay.
This here? Just a random fuckin' street in Riverrise.
You think I look like a guy who gives directions?
I'm not your damn tour guide.
Now unless you're here to help, move along.
Naw, reckon you wouldn't be much help.
Don't think you could handle it, partner.
I got this, no offense.
Thanks, but I doubt you could keep up.
I m good; you probably ain t cut out for this mess.
You betcha I do! We gotta stop that rust-bucket and the fella who built it.
Sure as shootin ! Let's hunt down that tin can and teach its maker a lesson.
Damn straight, I need help! Time to get even with whoever's behind that robot.
You know it! It s payback time for that no-good, hijackin contraption.
Darn tootin'! We need to wrangle that bot and its creator.
I m Kwalat s greatest lover and adventurer, revered by women, beasts, and monsters alike.
My conquests span galaxies. In fact, I had sex with my entire homeworld!
When I found a rift to Kwalat, I couldn't resist the allure of new horizons and, of course, new holes.
Not your's though. You're not my type.
Oh, life s as exhilarating as ever. Just got a new prosthetic eye after a rather passionate lover s quarrel.
This new eye is quite the upgrade, don't you think? Bionic, with night vision, x-ray vision, and everything!
Now I can see everything...
And I mean... everything.
Oh, you ve stumbled upon Riverrise, a city teeming with some of the finest specimens you ll ever lay eyes on.
Well, the finest specimens and... you.
I ve already bedded most of the hotties, though. Ran out of fresh faces.
So, now I'm off to the woods, seeking more... exotic encounters. Monsters, creatures, anything with a hint of danger and a hole of mystery.
Help from you? Ha, not likely.
No offense, but I don't think I need your kind of help.
Thanks, but I'll pass. Don t need an uggo messing things up.
I appreciate the offer, but I prefer assistance from someone a bit more... appealing.
Oh, you think you can keep up with me?
Fine, I might have a little something for you to handle.
I suppose even someone like you can be of some use.
Well, aren t you eager? I have a task that might be within your abilities.
Alright, impress me. But don't fall in love with me.
I'm Scrapjack. WELL, WHAT'S LEFT OF ME!
Two sides, ONE BODY. One logical, one PISSED.
