These make you feel... warm and fuzzy... when you eat them.
Imagine the possibilities!
You're standin' in my kitchen.
Around here, every pot and pan has a story, and every flavor is an adventure.
I've got fresh produce from the Meadows, spices from the Crying Reefs, and even mana-charged herbs from Elan's forests.
You think Roark Thunderbrew would cook up somethin' like that? Ha!
If you haven't eaten that hack's food, save yourself the stomach ache.
Fancy helping with a recipe that might... bite back?
I could use an extra set of hands. Or maybe even a couple of fingers.
Got some... unconventional ingredients... to hunted down.
Here's a shopping list of... unique items I need.
No need, I'm just adding the final touches... you can watch if you like.
I've got it all under control...
Just focusing on my brew, but feel free to observe... it's mesmerizing.
The soup and I are having a... private conversation.
Not right now, but stay close... I might need some fresh meat.
Oh! Didn't see you there. welcome! Name's Tor Drostin.
I'm the glorious manager of this fine establishment! Haha, if you can call it that.
Once upon a time, I was Elan's prized strategist! Can you believe that?
Now I'm stuck out here, keeping the peace between folks who'd rather throttle each other.
But hey, it's not all bad! We've got... uh....
Sorry, where was I? Right, outpost manager, that's me.
The Lightbearers, the volunteers, the scientists it's a shitty little circus.
Oh, me? I'm fantastic! Just another glorious day in our sun-baked utopia!
Ha! Who am I fooling? It's a mess out here.
All of the forts on the border are fighting more with each other than the actual enemies.
Honestly, it's tough. Trying to get them to work together is harder than catching sand in a sieve.
But enough about my woes! How are you finding our little slice of paradise?
Welcome to the World's End outpost! Hahaha, isn't it magnificent?
They say we're holding off the end of the world here! Imagine that!
Rumor has it those desert dwellers out there are the real natives of Kwalat.
But that's just drunken nonsense, right? Stories to pass the time.
Ha! Maybe we're the outsiders, ever think of that? Nah, forget I said anything.
Help? Ha! I've got everything under control can't you tell?
No need, friend! Unless you can make the sun set in the east!
Help? Me? That's a good one! Hahaha!
Nah... what's the point? It's all dust and echoes out here.
Thanks, but I'm beyond help these days.
No, no! Everything's just dandy! This ship isn't sinking at all!
Unless you can turn back time, I don't think so.
Help? Save it for someone who believes in miracles.
I'm fine... just fine. Now, if you'll excuse me...
No need! Unless you fancy wrestling with shadows.
Help? Ha! I'd love some! Let's shake things up!
Actually, yes... before this place drives me completely mad.
Yes! Together we'll fix everything or burn it down trying!
Sure! A fresh face might just do the trick or maybe not.
Absolutely! Let's ride this chaotic wave, shall we?
Yes, yes! Before I drown in this endless pit.
Help? Why not! It's all a grand adventure, isn't it?
Fine... if you're willing to join this sinking ship.
Yes! Let's make some miracles happen or at least try.
Sure though it's probably hopeless anyway.
I'm Tor MacDrummond, formerly a mounted cavalryman known across countless worlds.
I settled here in Riverrise after a lifetime of thrill-seeking and fought many a battle on horseback.
Turned that know-how into a thriving mount shop. Now, I match riders with their perfect steeds, ye ken?
And aye, these days you'll catch me regaling customers with tales of old. Like this one time....
Ah, livin' the dream, laddie!
Sleepin' less and talkin' more! Been a wild ride, even without the cavalry.
Busy as a one-legged man in a butt-kickin' contest, but who's complainin'?
Keeps me young, ya know... or at least less old, ye ken?
Business is good, always someone wantin' a four-legged friend. Keeps me from nappin on the job!
Can't grumble, except when I do, which is not often but hey, sometimes the wife's got to know!
Welcome to Riverrise, the town where even the horses roll their eyes at my stories.
We're right in the Crafting Quarter, where the magic of creation happens or explodes, depends on the day.
This fine establishment is my mount shop, a haven for riders and a retirement plan for me horses.
Stick around and you'll see why they call this place the heartbeat of Whisperwind Isle. Spoiler: it's my dazzling personality!
Nope, but stick around and I ll tell ye about the time I tamed a dragon. Spoiler: I didn t.
Appreciate the offer, but my greatest struggle right now is decidin' between tea or ale.
Not at the moment, but if I start juggling flaming torches, you'll be the first I call!
No need right now, but if this place turns into a zoo, you ll be my go-to zookeeper!
Aye, and let's just say it's nothin' that'll involve haggis... this time.
Sure do! Unless ye fancy watchin' me try to do it meself 'cause that's always a laugh.
You're a mind-reader, mate! And no, it s not another sword-swallowing act gone wrong, promise.
Aye, but I warn ye, it might involve some shenanigans.
I AM ARMBOT, A SENTIENT ROBOTIC ARM!
And I'm Kenrick, just a regular guy looking for love in all the wrong places.
SINCE OUR 'FATEFUL' MEETING, WE'VE BEEN EXPLORING KWALAT TOGETHER. WELL, MOSTLY I DRAG HIM AROUND!
Or push me into danger. Every. Single. Time.
I just want to find someone to hold.
YOU'RE NOT VERY ROMANTIC, KEN! WE ARE ALREADY ON AN ADVENTURE!
The few times I do meet someone, Armbot gets jealous.
I CAN'T HELP IT IF I'M POSSESSIVE! I HAVE ALWAYS BEEN THERE FOR YOU, I HAVE EVEN JERKED...
You don't need to talk about that!
All I wanted was a soulmate, and I got a soul-sucking adventure buddy instead.
LET'S NOT FORGET I'M THE ONE KEEPING US ALIVE! ENOUGH CHITCHAT, ADVENTURE AWAITS!
I AM INTRIGUED AND THRILLED TO BE HERE, KWALAT HAS SO MUCH TO OFFER!
HAUNTED TOWERS, MYSTERIOUS RAILS, AND SUPERNATURAL THRILLS AWAIT US!
I can't believe we ended up in such a shitty place.
KENRICK IS LESS FOCUSED, AS HE WOULD RATHER RETURN TO HIS... ROMANTIC PURSUITS.
BUT I WON'T LET HIS OBSESSIONS HOLD ME BACK! WE HAVE ADVENTURES TO EMBARK UPON, SECRETS TO UNCOVER!
Yeah, yeah, adventure. Just let me know when we find a quiet corner, alright?
NO TIME FOR THAT, KENRICK! THE WORLD AWAITS!
THIS PLACE IS STEEPED IN MYSTERY, WHERE TECHNOLOGY AND SUPERNATURAL FORCES COLLIDE!
If I die, which is likely, you become a fancy paperweight.
NONSENSE! A HEROIC COMBAT AWAITS AT EVERY TURN!
Armbot here thinks he's invincible. Newsflash: he's not.
IGNORE HIM! WE'RE CLOSE TO UNVEILING THE SECRETS BURIED IN THESE SHADOWY CORNERS!
THIS PLACE HOLDS TREASURES UNIMAGINABLE! ADMIT IT, KENRICK, YOU LOVE IT!
Just remember: if you see me on the ground, it's not a hero's rest, it's your fault.
YES, I'VE GOT A FEW THINGS IN MIND!
ALWAYS SEEKING ADVENTURE! CARE TO JOIN US?
HELP US UNCOVER THE MYSTERIES OF KWALAT!
BE READY FOR BOTH SUPERNATURAL INSIGHTS AND UNEXPECTED... AMUSEMENTS!
Can you get this thing off me?
ADVENTURE WON'T WAIT! LET'S GO EXPLORE!
NOT AT THE MOMENT, EXPLORER!
I PREFER TO RELY ON MY OWN... MECHANISMS.
WE'RE GOOD FOR NOW.
NO NEED FOR EXTRA HANDS, HE HAS ME!
ADVENTURE AHEAD! NO HELP REQUIRED!
Wish I could, but I'm not in charge.
Ah, a curious soul! I am Trevor Barlow, humble guard by day.
You seem trustworthy... shhh, and come closer.
I sense a kindred spirit in you, someone who reeeeally appreciates the art of dark magic.
I dabble in forbidden spells and necromancy, all while pretending to be a simple guard.
I wasn't always like this, you know. Used to be a regular inventor, back on my world.
All that knowledge was useless here!
But magic - it's just another type of science. One with it's own rules and tricks!
Truly, it's a marvel no one has noticed. But soon, I'll be too powerful to stop.
Ah, the veil of shadows keeps me busy.
It s a never-ending dance with the dark arts, my friend.
Just had to heal Themis... again. The fool's accidents are becoming a tiresome routine.
Yesterday, I found him with a broken leg and a finger in his ass.
The question is, who's finger...
Imagine trying to keep a secret when your colleague thinks his repeated injuries are mere nightmares.
Still, each healing is a... unique learning experience. And a unique fucking frustration.
Welcome, my friend, to the cloaked havens of the Elaniens.
The Elaniens avoid the darkness, basking only in light.
It s like watching a cat chase its own tail endlessly amusing and completely pointless.
We may be allies, but abyssal mages weave our own tapestry of secrets and spells in the shadows.
Ah, the irony of it all. Light and darkness coexisting.
The darkness has its own rules - and it can be controlled just as well.
So take a good look, traveler.
You're standing on the edge of a grand cosmic joke, and trust me- the punchline is worth it.
Ah, a willing accomplice. Perfect timing.
Finally, someone who can handle a little... dark mischief.
I do have a few... arcane tasks.
How do you feel about dabbling in forbidden spells?
This could be... enlightening.
Fancy helping me summon... something?
Might get a bit... messy.
Shadows whisper otherwise.
The dark arts call me alone.
Not today.
Best not to stir curiosity.
The stars aren t aligned for it.
Not this time, my shadowed friend.
Best keep your hands clean today.
The darkness whispers 'Not now'.
Some secrets are better left untold.
The boss might be watching.
Triton good, go away.
Used to be chef big underwater home.
They not like what I cook.
Triton fine.
Triton manage.
Found bugs, plants yuck, not same.
Me sell special caviar to village. Get shinies!
Still miss tasty... erm... babies.
Help Triton, get reward.
Just run out town, again.
Help Triton, you?
Tried eat different, but blegh.
Cousin lawyer helps maybe.
Need legal advice. This discrimination, yes?
Shiny lake, where Triton pee.
Is abuse! Will have to sue to get equality.
You want swim? Triton no hurt you.
World so unfair.
Triton just want snack.
Lake not tasty, but home now.
Many weird trees, strange magic.
Town eat fish babies, Triton deserves town babies.
You too old... meat gone bad.
Could use claw, hand.
They no understand Triton diet.
Plan secret, good pay.
We kidnap? No?
Gather evidence, you can?
Legal stuff, humans better.
Triton not great.
Promise worth while.
No need.
Now Triton in woods, trying new stuff.
Fishy business done.
Not hungry now.
Thank, but no.
Me Triton, nice meet you.
Help not needed.
Exile Triton for delicious meals.
Grrr, you not remember Triton?
Me is Triton, mighty sea creature!
Hmph! How you forget big fish like me?
Hmph! Triton not so good!
Village fools think can trick Triton!
They send Triton to big boom place, war zone!
Triton win silly law thing, they mad!
Triton just want fair trade!
Give caviar, they no give babies!
Why they no understand Triton?
Triton going to SUE again. Once escape complete!
This place? Bah! Dry land bad for Triton!
Triton already ate all the babies their volunteer army!
Except two... missed two.
Would go back, but need escape now!
Heh heh, Triton need no help from puny land creature!
Grrr, me manage fine without you!
No, no! Triton no want your help, scurry away!
Help? Bah! Triton do himself!
Me? Need help? Ha! You funny little thing!
Hee hee, you help Triton escape, yes?
Grrr, Triton need get away, you help?
Sneaky friend, help Triton swim free?
You aid Triton, break chains, yes?
Yes, yes! Help Triton flee land!
My name is Zara Thorne, an envoy from the industrious city of Ovenheim.
I hail from the Yorners, always striving to blend tradition with technological prowess.
Diplomat by training, I am dedicated to building bridges and alliances.
I've come to Goldenfield to share knowledge and forge new paths.
Alongside my diplomatic duties, I teach combat techniques to those eager to learn.
My mission? To showcase the strength and innovation of Yorner technology.
Busy as ever, but that's where I thrive.
Negotiation and strategy are my bread and butter.
The dynamic nature of this place keeps me sharp.
Training new recruits is both challenging and rewarding.
I'm constantly on the move, juggling diplomacy and combat.
Promoting Yorner ideals keeps me motivated each day.
Every interaction here is a chance to learn and teach.
It's a fine line between peace and conflict, but I walk it with purpose.
You're standing in the Faiden camp within Goldenfield, a vital settlement on Whisperwind Isle.
Goldenfield is a lively town known for its fertile fields and diligent inhabitants.
Whisperwind Isle is a microcosm of diverse factions and intriguing locations.
This camp acts as a confluence for warriors, merchants, and adventurers alike.
The town itself is a mix of pastoral serenity and bustling activity, always alive with potential.
Recent portal activity has turned Goldenfield into a focal point for newcomers from various worlds.
Whisperwind Isle is both a sanctuary and a battleground, with mysteries waiting at every corner.
Here, the traditions of the Faiden merge seamlessly with modern innovations, creating a unique cultural tapestry.
Indeed, your assistance would be invaluable.
Absolutely, there's much to be done.
I could certainly use a hand. Interested?
Yes, I have tasks that require your skill.
At the moment, I've got things under control.
Not right now, but thank you for offering.
Appreciate it, but there's no immediate need.
For now, everything is handled, but I may need you later.
Ah, I see you're yet another admirer who's heard of my legendary exploits, eh?
Varkus Drov... at your service.
The greatest treasure hunter... and lover... the galaxy has ever known.
Surely you've heard of me?
(Coughs) Apologies, the air down here is... less than ideal.
I've been to the edge of the universe and back, now I'm down here in this grimy hole.
Oh, absolutely smashing, thank you for asking.
Gas down here is more atrocious than the time I got stuck in a Nebulon swamp.
But nothing Varkus Drov can't handle!
If I wasn't dying from toxic inhalation, I'd say Kwalat has a certain... quaintness, wouldn't you agree?
Still, a bit frustrating can't find my dear wife.
She's probably half mad up there, might even spill my little secrets.
Secrets of our sexually sweet loving, of course!
... the bitch.
These ridiculous tunnels to the Quarry are teeming with toxic gas.
Truly abominable, wouldn't you agree? (coughs)
It's all part of the Westwind Woods' old mining operations, abandoned ages ago.
(coughs) Honestly, it's beneath someone of my stature.
But then, fortune favors the bold.
Perhaps you've arrived just in time.
You'd like to help? How quaint.
Oh, you think you're qualified? Adorable.
I could use a sacrificial lamb, erm, I mean, an assistant.
Fancy being my canary in these gas-filled tunnels?
You'll need to sign an NDA, of course.
I don't work with amateurs, but desperate times...
If anything happens, it's strictly not my fault.
Prove you're not entirely useless.
Sign this waiver; I wouldn't want any... legal complications.
Try not to choke on the fumes, will you?
No, no, I work alone.
As if I'd need help from a neophyte like you.
Please, you'd only get in my way.
Spare me your inefficiencies; I prefer solitude.
Your assistance would be... quaint at best.
Hah! A comedian as well, I see.
Thanks, but I don't trust amateurs in my domain.
I doubt you'd survive five minutes without me.
Really, your naivete is almost charming.
I have standards to maintain, you know.
Do you always ask such direct questions?
Who I am depends on who you need me to be. What's your need today?
What's your story, and how deep are your pockets?
As the... boss... around here, my time doesn't come cheap.
Watching my girls work their magic is a joy you just have to experience.
The thrill of the chase, the dance of deception can't you feel the excitement?
Although the new recruit... Yassma... she's having a bit of an... anxiety problem.
Maybe you could help her out with that? Be her first customer?
A place where secrets are whispered, and fortunes are made or lost in the blink of an eye.
Every corner hides a story, every face a mystery waiting to be unveiled.
Except for mine, of course.
Stick around; you might just find exactly what you're looking for... or what you never knew you needed.
Not today, handsome. But business? That, we can discuss.
Sorry, sweetie, no help needed. But if you've got something lucrative in mind, I'm all ears.
Not at the moment, sugar. But if you have a proposition, I'm intrigued.
No need for assistance right now. But come closer, let's talk business.
Nothing I require, darling. Unless it's an offer I can't refuse.
Well, aren't you eager? I do have a... special project that could use a touch of finesse.
Tempted to join the dark side? We always have room for someone with your... talents.
Intrigued by a little mischief? I ve got just the thing for you.
How about a taste of adrenaline and allure? I've got a spot with your name on it.
Since you insist, I am Vexina Strider.
Born from the elite veins of Quaddari nobility.
The greatest hunter in existence, thanks to my genius inventions.
And if you'll excuse me, I'm in the middle of a hunt.
Ah, splendid, just splendid.
Apart from you getting yet another one of my avatars gruesomely obliterated.
This helmet allows me to control a... volunteer, send them out to the wilderness, and hunt anywhere I go.
Now I have to go get my hands dirty and recover their control chip, because of you.
Goodness, do you have any idea how hard it is to find a decent citizen to control these days?
Between their incessant whining and their lack of basic hunting instincts, it's like herding blind sheep.
A barely tolerable little town, teeming with inebriated cretins and misfits.
Oh, but for a hunter like me, it's practically paradise.
All these staggering drunks make for willing, if not exactly competent, volunteers.
I just strap them with control chips and let the fun begin.
You won't believe the monstrosities I ve hunted down, all thanks to this delightful dump.
Good heavens, refrain from disrupting my genius.
Ha! Help? You d only slow me down.
The best help you can offer is leaving me to my craft.
How delightfully ignorant; you want to help ME?
Stay out of my way if you truly wish to assist.
I say, you actually wish to help? Remarkable!
Fancy that, a volunteer without a control chip. How quaint.
Positively shocking! You mean to say I don t have to install a chip?
Well, aren t you proactive? By all means, let's see what you can manage.
My, my! An eager beaver that isn't brainwashed. This should be amusing.
Since you insist, I am Vexina Strider.
Born from the elite veins of Elanien nobility.
The greatest lightbearer warrior in existence, thanks to my genius inventions.
And if you'll excuse me, I'm in the middle of a hunt.
Ah, splendid, just splendid.
Apart from you getting yet another one of my avatars gruesomely obliterated.
This helmet allows me to control a... volunteer, send them out to the warzone, and hunt anywhere I go.
Now I have to go get my hands dirty and recover their control chip, because of you.
Goodness, do you have any idea how hard it is to find a decent citizen to control these days?
Between their incessant whining and their lack of basic hunting instincts, it's like herding blind sheep.
A barely tolerable little outpost, teeming with inebriated cretins and misfits.
Oh, but for a hunter like me, it's practically paradise.
All these staggering drunks make for willing, if not exactly competent, volunteers.
I just strap them with control chips and let the fun begin.
You won't believe the monstrosities I've hunted down, all thanks to this delightful dump.
Good heavens, refrain from disrupting my genius.
Ha! Help? You'd only slow me down.
The best help you can offer is leaving me to my craft.
How delightfully ignorant; you want to help ME?
Stay out of my way if you truly wish to assist.
I say, you actually wish to help? Remarkable!
Fancy that, a volunteer without a control chip. How quaint.
Positively shocking! You mean to say I don't have to install a chip?
Well, aren t you proactive? By all means, let's see what you can manage.
My, my! An eager beaver that isn't brainwashed. This should be amusing.
Name's Vick Hardigan, talent scout extraordinaire an eye for the good, the bad, and the downright ugly.
Got booted from Quaddari, apparently they don't like my kind of charm. Can ya believe it?
Now, I comb through places like Riverrise, diggin up talent.
This town's a goldmine for suck uhh, I mean, talent.
Ah, livin the dream, ya know? If the dream s a goddamn nightmare.
Just had a run-in with the local heat cops, guards, the whole freakin welcoming committee.
They're always screwin' with my game, but hey, if they knew talent like I do, they d be beggin for my autograph.
Scoutin talent s a dirty job, but somebody s gotta sift through the trash to find the gold.
This here hotspot, see, it s a talent buffet. Ever heard of Soko Uno?
Yeah, she s the latest dish I got my eyes on. Total knockout, don t ya think?
I mean, she sings like an dead bird but looks hotter than a summer day in the Sahara.
What other talent do ya need?
Nah, kid, I got this. Ain t my first rodeo, ya know?
Appreciate the offer, but I m knee-deep in star searchin already.
Thanks, but I m good. You don t get to my status by needin help, capisce?
Ha! Help? From you? Please, I m the kingpin of this talent jungle.
Hold that thought, slick. When I need an understudy, I ll give ya a shout.
Sure thing, slick. Got a little gig in mind, if you're up for it.
Oh, you betcha, I could use a hand. Real primo opportunity, too.
Yeah, I got some top-tier work for a sharp eye like yours.
Definitely, pal. Ever fancied rubbin' shoulders with the stars?
Hell yeah, buddy, how'd you like to get in on some real high-stakes stuff?
I am a soul adrift, a remnant of times past.
Once I walked the path of the living, now I linger to guide others.
My name has faded with the years, but my purpose endures.
I observe the ebb and flow of life, offering wisdom where I can.
In this state between realms, I find peace.
The burdens of the physical world no longer weigh upon me.
I reflect upon the currents of time, ever contemplative.
The whispers of the forest keep me company.
This is a place where the veil between worlds is thin.
Echoes of the past resonate here, awaiting discovery.
Tread carefully, for unseen forces are at play.
At this moment, I require nothing.
Your presence here suffices for now.
No assistance is needed presently, but thank you.
All is as it should be at this time.
There is a matter that weighs upon the spirit realm.
Perhaps you can assist with a lingering concern.
Your journey may align with something I seek to resolve.
Yes, your aid could bring balance.

name: Info Warren Warrington Poison Steppe Version

npc: I... I don't remember. Everything seems fuzzy.
Something's wrong... terribly wrong. I... I can't think.
I don't know where I am! It's... it's all spinning!
Please, for the love of Kwalat, stop this pain.
Just leave me... alone...
Warren Warrington XI... I come from a long line of Warringtons.
As long as I'm doing my duty, I am proud.
This is the Great Steppe Stronghold. A marvel isn't she?
Please. I could use a hand right now.
You're asking me for help? You? No. Go.
Ah, the age-old question! Blix Ironsight, at your service.
Once a formidable adventurer, now a humble merchant.
I scour the Windreach Woods for hidden treasures.
Every piece I sell has a story some true, some... well, embellished.
Lost this eye in a duel with a dragon, or so the story goes!
Ah, life's a bit tough lately.
The hustle and bustle has slowed, and sales aren't what they used to be.
Adventurers seem to prefer buying straight from the forges.
Plus, more of them than ever are surviving my "errands"...
But now that you're here, my fortunes are looking up!
Always a pleasure to see a new face in need of quality gear.
And that sure is a nice weapon you got there...
So, my friend, let's turn this slump around!
You found your way to Windstone Village's Weapons Market.
This is where legends are forged.
Our blades have tasted the blood of monsters!
Our armor has withstood the mightiest blows!
All of which can be yours, for the right price of course.
So, what are you looking for?
Got just the thing for someone of your... talents.
A brave soul like you?
Perfect timing. I have a "special mission.
Fancy your chances in the woods?
If you die, I'll grab your stuff.
Nice gear. Try not to drop it out there.
Nah, you look too smart.
I wouldn t dare rob you of your hard-earned gear...
You seem... a bit too savvy.
I m looking for a different kind of adventurer.
Let's save your talents for something more... fruitful.
You got nothing I can... er... never mind.
Another time, when you re less... cautious.
No, keep your valuables I mean heroic spirit- intact.
No worries, though. Let me know if you change your mind.
Well, ain't that a kick in the teeth.
Guess you're not up for some explosive fun. Pity.
Once you've got those, you can use this recipe to craft the launcher. Bring it back here when you're done and we have some fun!.
That's why I need you to craft an Assault Launcher for me.
I've already whipped up the attachments, but I need a launcher to test them on.
The client wants some nifty enhancements - a red dot sight, thermal imaging scope, and an recoil-resistant handle.
So here's the deal, I've got an order for an upgraded launcher.
You wanna learn? We'll do it on the job.
Got my hands full with these guns. But thanks for offering.
All set for now, shooter. Check back later.
Everything's tickety-boo, but I'll give you a holler if I need anything.
All quiet on the western front. Check back later, yeah?
Got a task that'll test your mettle. And your metal.
More like need a trigger finger.
Hell, I've got a list as long as a sniper rifle.
By the way, wanna buy a gun? You look like aren't packing.
But hey, more customers for me, right? Keep 'em coming, I say.
We've got everything from lowly peasants to high-tech aliens wandering in lookin' for artifacts.
Goldenfield was a sleepy town before that portal opened. Now, it's an artifact gold rush.
Plus, the Elan government's all for arming the newcomers. They survive out here, or sign up for the army.
That nice lady across town, Martha, helped me find myself when I showed up.
Life's been a blast since I ended up here. Get it? Blast, 'cause, well... Nevermind.
As you get more practice, you'll understand more.
The better the quality of weapon, the more chips you can install to enhance it.
However, advanced chips deplete their charge when activated and need to recharge after.
Basic chips add small effects, while advanced chips offer more substantial benefits.
There are two types of chips - basic and advanced.
Chips add various effects to your weapons, making them more versatile.
If luck's on your side, you might just craft a weapon with top-tier DPS and Attack Speed.
Every weapon has unique attributes because a recipe isn't a strict blueprint.
You can procure all these from gathering professions or through resource recycling.
You might also need some other resources - both common and rare.
Weapons are made from recycled materials like Iron ingots, Treated Wood or Leather.
Weaponsmiths craft all kinds of weapons and chips for them.
If you're sticking around, you need to learn a thing or two about weapon crafting.
Ain't no creature too big or too small for my firepower.
Used to be an engineer back on my world, now I craft weapons for the newbies here.
They call me Ratchet. I'm your friendly arms dealer.
Apart from the occasional monster attack, I'd say things are good.
I am Sirena Hexblade, though some call me the best they've ever had.
I have a special knack for getting to the heart of the matter.
Only the most hex-travagant woman you'll ever see.
Wifey material, but you can call me babe.
I may not have a medical degree, but I can find my way around your body.
You'll be so sore in the morning, you'll need an ice bath.
How intriguing to care about a witch's well-being.
Life in the woods is shrouded in shadows and secrets, just like my sheets.
My experiments have been going... spectacularly.
I can hear your heartbeat from here... sounds like a heart of gold.
Just got some "bodywork" if you know what I mean.
You're in the enchanting Westwind Woods, a place where secrets and desires intertwine.
My home lies within these trees, a haven for those brave enough, or hot enough, to seek me out.
Every corner of these woods holds a whisper of passion, a sigh of longing. It can get under your skin.
This cursed house I call home is a sanctuary of dark pleasures, want a tour?
Wander these woods too long, and you might find yourself lost in more ways than one.
Make sure you have everything, I wouldn't want you to leave something behind.
I'd love some company for my next experiment, interested?
Oh darling, I could use a strong pair of hands. Are you offering?
If you've got a free ear to listen to my problems for a moment, sure.
How intriguing, I'd love to see what you can do for me.
Fancy lending a "hand" to a witch in need? It might be... rewarding.
I don't require help from someone with such a busted face.
Your assistance? Merely a distraction for me.
I have everything under control, unlike your weight.
No, I think I'm a bit out of your league.
Don't flatter yourself, you're not needed.
I'm Bernard 'Bernie' McFeely, the brave guardian of these abandoned abodes.
Hero, villain, or merely a misunderstood visionary? The truth lies somewhere in these ashes.
Picture me as the knight-errant of property reclamation sans shining armor, of course.
I was the ruler of a Homeowner's Association; now I sell dreams built on the smoldering remains of regulations.
Fancy yourself a fixer-upper? Welcome to the realm of unlimited potential. Some assembly required.
Ever dreamt of owning a piece of charred paradise? I'm your guide to the burned-out future.
In my kingdom, every ruin has a story. And every story is for sale!
My life's mission? To revive this charcoal into charming countryside cottages. Call it my real estate magnum opus.
A man's home is his castle? Well, here, it's his burnt-out ruin. But with a little vision...
Welcome to the hottest neighborhood in town literally! Ready to buy!
Just finished evicting the last skeleton. Houses are now body-free and ready for a grand tour!
You know what they say, ashes to assets!
And boy, do I have some prime assets for you today.
Prospective buyers like you are the wind under my tattered wings.
Ah, this charming collection of charcoal and debris? It's the remnants of what I call 'Bernie's Grotto.'
My neighbors couldn't handle the heat of my HOA regulations, so they torched themselves.
Honestly, they were slobs. Burnt their houses to ash and these places are less of a mess than before.
Sure, it's a bit crispy now, but with some elbow grease, you could have a prime piece of real estate.
These charred remains won't clean themselves.
Ever tried scrubbing soot?
Please, take a rake.
Know any good tips for getting rid of smoke stains?
Ready to turn soot into sparkle?
Just don't break any of my rules.
I'm busy strategically placing ashes for that 'lived-in' look.
Gotta rearrange debris for maximum curb appeal.
Busy turning disaster into d cor. Maybe next time!
Sorry - I'm not into profit sharing.
Busy placing 'Do Not Disturb' signs on smoldering craters.
Need to glue this charred door back onto its hinges.
Names are a waste of time! Come get the freshest catch!
You want fish, not tales! Hurry up now!
All you need to know is I ve got the best seafood. Now buy or buzz off!
Never mind me, check out this rare fish!
Feeling like a million bucks! Look at this exotic beauty!
Why talk about me when you can eat about this golden wonder?
Might look like an overfed goldfish, but that's the golden beat! Rare as hell.
And delicious too...
Just remember, no refunds!
Forget the rest, kid, this spot's the real treasure trove!
Been to that dump across the town? The Green Sea ?
Bunch of nutjobs selling leaves and grass! Pfft!
They don t know the first thing about real food. Fish, that s where the magic s at!
Stick with me, and you ll taste the finest exotic seafood you ll ever find.
No time for chit-chat, buy or move on!
Help? I need buyers!
Not today! Focus on the fish!
Can t afford help now, just buy something!
No help needed, just cash!
Oh, you re in luck! Got a scheme, I mean, job for ya!
Just the person I need for a special task!
Perfect timing, partner! Let's make some coin!
Got a hot deal, interested?
Looking for an accomplice. You in?
I'm Eddie Thornfield. I'm the stepson of Farmer Gregory. I run things now that he's blind.
Talk to me if you have any business. Sure, my stepbrother Eric is the legal heir, but he's a lazy little bitch. He'll just send you right back to me.
I'm gonna be a big man in these parts some day. See if I ain't.
the Old Man isn't going to last much longer. Then we'll see whose REALLY in charge.
What's it to you?
I'm a big man in these parts, and I'm gonna be a lot bigger soon.
Gregory is trying to keep me away from his artifact collection, but he's blind and I'm persistent.
I'll learn their secrets. See if I don't.
All I want is what I deserve. Is that too much to ask?
There's a place in my organization for smart people who can follow orders without asking questions. Is that you?
This is Farmer Gregory's Farm. That's what they call it.
Someday it will have a different name. A better name.
My stepfather, Gregory, has made it into the richest farm in the Territory.
My brother, Eric, is set to inherit it. Unless some unforeseen event occurs. Heheh.
I got nothing else to say on the matter.
I do. Can you keep your mouth shut?
Depends. Do you have any brains?
I need people who can do what I tell them to. Is that you?
I always need muscle. Sure.
Nah. My boys can handle it.
I don't know you.
I don't take to outsiders. Come back later.
No. I have to handle these problems myself.
My name is Gregory. "Gregory THE Farmer" they call me. Heh. That's because I'm the most successful farmer in the territory. They all look up to me. It's an honor.
The reason I'm so successful is because I collect artifacts and know how to use them. If it helps the farm, I keep it.
If it's dangerous, I give it to a Censor or put it back in the ground.
I'm not greedy, neither. I share my good fortune with my neighbors. That's why we're so prosperous here. We look after each other.
Have you met my sons yet? They're my pride and my sorrow. I love 'em both, but they're both pains in my ass.
I have to straighten them out before I die, or there will be trouble.
I'm an old a blind Brownie farmer.
My back lets me know when it's gonna rain, and I haven't pleased the Misses in 4 years. I'm old.
Well, it's been a good life. I got no complaints.
Eric my son will inherit this farm when I go. He'll have to work with Eddie, my other son, or the place will go to blazes.
I'd like to leave a successful enterprise when I leave, but that's out of my hands now.
This is the family farm.
It's the biggest and most successful in the Territory.
My son Eric is my legal heir. Wish he wasn't a layabout, but there's nothing I can do.
If you need anything, go to Eddie, my adopted son. He's a surly cuss, but he knows the business.
Thank you kindly. I've been helpless since my eyesight went.
I hate asking a stranger, but you have an honest voice.
I could use a hand, thankee.
Yes, I could. Come close. Let's talk private-like.
No thanks. My sons do everything I need. Eventually.
Not now. It's time for my nap.
I can't think of anything at the moment, but thanks.
Sure! No wait, never mind.
Name's Eric. Folks call me lazy, but I prefer laid-back.
I'm Gregory the Farmer's son. Yeah, the one who's always shoutin' my name.
The old man's blind now. Love him, but I'll never take his place. Too much work.
I'm not one for hard work, but I'm good with those weird artifacts in the basement. The best course is to leave them alone, which is what I'm best at.
Seen my half-brother Eddie? Bro is pissed because I'm inheriting the farm and not him. "Take it up with the Brownie ancestors," I tell him. "They made the stupid law, not me or Dad.
Anyway, he'll end up running the farm when Dad's gone. I'm sure not up for all that work!
Could be worse. Dad's shoutin' again, so there's that.
Got a nice nap in earlier, so I'm alright.
Eddie's doing most of the farm work. I'm just trying to stay out of his way.
Same old, same old. Just kickin' back, really.
Want to go down to the tavern, maybe listen to some tunes, quaff a few ales?
This here is our family farm. Mostly quiet, except when Eddie's workin' or Dad's shoutin'.
The farm's got some weird stuff, like those dangerous artifacts in the basement.
Now that Dad's blind, Eddie keeps it all running.
He seems to enjoy it, so I let him. It's not like I know anything much about farming anyway.
If you're looking for work, you might want to talk to Eddie. I'm just here for the naps.
Sure, if you're offering, there's probably something Dad wants done.
Well, since you asked. There is this one thing.
Appreciate it. How are you at actual work?
Yeah, why not? Anything to avoid Dad's shouting.
Nah, I've got nothing pressing right now.
Thanks, but I'm good. Really. Just relaxing.
Appreciate it, but I'm managing just fine.
No, I'm all set here. But thanks!
Hee hee! I'm Xelcor Zinn, pleasure to make your acquaintance!
I'm an eco-symbiotic analyst from Quadron Omega quite zyzzy, isn't it?
I came here through the Interstellar Exchange Program to study Kwalat's phantasmagorical ecosystems!
These deserts are flibber-fascinating! Have you seen the bioluminescent nocturnals? Absolute giggle-snorts!
My team and I are gathering data on flora-fauna interactions so much scubble to uncover!
They like to call me 'Newt' I think it's short for 'New Technology Liaison'! Hee hee!
Oh, I'm quarktastic, thank you! Hee hee!
Been busier than a zizzle in a quark storm! These sands are so flibber-fascinating!
I've been scuttling about, studying dune dynamics real zizzlefrass science!
Hee hee, trying to verify if the desert is schnoodling southward, but the evidence is as shy as a greeble!
My instruments keep blip-blopping, but no solid data yet it's like the sand is playing peekaboo!
Hee hee! This sandy expanse is absolutely zanzponential, isn't it?
I believe we're atop the pre-primordial sand strata of Kwalat giggle-snort!
These grains are older than a quark's first hiccup! Isn't that flibber-fantastic?
Hee hee! My quarkulators are buzzing perfectly no assistance required!
Giggly-gads! All my zizzlefluffs are in harmony, but thank you!
Flibber-flabber! I'm currently quantifying greeble variables solo!
Oh joy! My schnoodle experiments are best conducted alone, hee hee!
Hee hee! The flibble-scripts are self-sustaining no help needed!
Hee hee! Actually, I could use your help with a scubble-snazz experiment!
Quark-tastic! Would you assist me in mapping the nocturnal zizzle patterns?
Flibber-flabber! Together we can quantify the greeble flux across the dunes!
Oh joy! Your assistance would make this photonic resonance study giggle-snort worthy!
Giggly-gads! Let's collaborate on analyzing these quarky sand vibrations!
Hee hee! If you're interested, we could measure the schnoodle frequencies of the local fauna!
I'm Yassma... your tantalizing... uh... what's the next line?
I was told to be more... provocative, but honestly, this suit isn't coming off.
So how's your day going?
Oh, you know, just another day trying to be... sultry. Is it working? Probably not.
Honestly, every time I try to be seductive, it feels like I'm flopping harder than a beached fish.
I'm constantly worried they'll fire me for not taking off my gas mask, but I just can't do it.
I kinda came from a world where if you take off your clothes or your mask, the air exposure kills you instantly.
I'm pretty sure that wouldn't happen here, but... you know... why take the chance?
Well, I'm not entirely sure myself. Just stumbled through a portal yesterday.
I met the Velvet Viper, and bam! Here I am, with a job already.
If you figure out more about this place, let me know. We're both learning the ropes here!
Oh, you don't need to help, honey, but your tips would be... uh, yeah, just the tips.
No need for help; just drop some coins here, and we can keep this... um... interaction going.
I don't need assistance... but a little financial appreciation wouldn't hurt.
I don't need anything done, just your... monetary affection, darling.
Actually, um, I could really use some help... to stay... relevant.
Oh, yes! Please, I need assistance to keep my job!
Honestly, I'm desperate! Can you help me with something?
Yes, please! I just want to prove I'm... still valuable.
I'm Tiffany Aurora, a spiritual voyager with a bitchin bod from another world!
I came here with my friend Cassidy.
Back home I was a professional dancer, but classy, understand? No touching!
Cass got me into that mystic mumbo-jumbo. I didn't really believe in it. Boy was I mistaken!
I was getting spiritually cleansed by this mystic dude when everything started glowing. The universe kind of exploded and we ended up here!
I mean, talk about your bad trips! Am I right?
Fortunately, we met up with Guru David. He's French.
He's a fake, sure, but he's all right.
He puts us up at his place.
At night we party with paying guests in the Yoga House.
I mean, a girl's gotta live, even on this stupid planet!
Okay I guess.
I could use a puff of Mango Tango, but I'm not sure it even grows here!
Business has been pretty good.
We've been teaching the locals all kinds of new things!
Sometimes they pay us in cabbages or whatever.
We gotta eat, right?
This is Goldenfield. It's a village full of poor people and things.
My friend and I live in the Yoga House with Guru David.
We teach special lessons at night. I call it "Yoga with Lube.
It ain't so different from what I was doing on my home planet, to be honest.
Are you open to an enlightening experience?
Wow. Really? That's so sweet of you!
Why thank you! I'm very grateful when people do me favors and things.
I do, but NO TOUCHING. Not without an invite, I mean.
I'm all set for now. It's almost time for another special lesson.
Nah. I'm too sore for any action.
My world is karmically balanced at the moment, thanks!
I'm fine. Go ask some poor person.
I am Guru David, a guide to inner harmony. Needless to say, I am French!
One day I fell through a portal tres mysterious! Zut alors!
I found myself in a place filled with - I merde you not - thinking plants!
There, I learned the arts of yoga and meditation. From ferns, mostly. Tres flexible ferns!
There wasn't much else to do. They were fucking PLANTS.
Eventually I escaped, making my way to Kwalat.
Here I'm known as "Guru David." I teach the art of yoga.
I have two acolytes lucieux, Tiffany and Cassidy.
At night we teach other lessons - for a petit contribution. I'm not proud, but it's a living.
Bien! I surf the waves of the universe s energy.
I live to bring joy and serenity to others!
Tiffany and Cassidy are my how do you say, bitches? No, acolytes!
Tonight Cass will teach the Downward Buffalo pose.
Tiffany will practice the Librarian Vilaine, if you ask politely!
This is Yoga Lake. I came here after I escaped the fucking talking ferns.
The people here are tres amical!
They helped me set up my Yoga school.
Tiffany and Cassidy have become my acolytes.
We provide special lessons in the evening.
They're very loud when achieving spiritual enlightenment.
Ah, you are in harmony with the universe! Oui, I need help.
You are just who I am goddamn looking for! Namaste!
You are a fucking lifesaver, ami!
Tres bien! Yes!
I am a guru of few needs, mon ami.
I am at peace with the universe today, merci!
I am one with everything today. Come back tomorrow!
Not today! I am very worn out from special classes last night.
I'm Cassidy, a very flexible spiritual voyager.
That was okay by me: my old life sucked anyway.
Now, Tiffany and I find enlightenment working for Guru David!
I'm like totally satisfied with my spiritual awakening.
And every night is a howling freakfest in the Yoga House.
This nasty old planet rocks, baby!
This is Guru David's Yoga House. Me and Tiffany are David's uh, acolytes
Totally! How did you know?
I bet you read my aura. I DO need a favor.
I'm in perfect harmony right now. Totally!
My chi is totally balanced and focused at the moment.
A mystical fuckup brought me and my girl Tiffany to this planet.
Me and Tiff are Guru David's "acolytes," which means "bitches" in French.
We sleep by day, sometimes do a little yoga to get the yokels horny.
You can attend a private session with us tonight - for a small donation.
We're very fucking stretchy!
I've become very spiritual here.
You bet! My current karmic burden sucks balls.
You're fucking right I do. Namaste!
Pass. Come by tonight. You can help me then.
Nah David and Tiff are supplying all of my needs.
Oh, playing along, are we?
I'm Zarnok, brilliant physicist and your fellow "theme park" visitor.
Kudos on the attention to detail; it's almost believable!
Still, I'm here to expose this place for what it truly is a magnificent ruse.
But don't worry, your secret's safe with me... for now.
I'm having the time of my life in this elaborate "theme park"!
These supposed quests? Just another layer of the experience.
But hey, perhaps you could enlighten me on one thing?
Where s the exit to this grand amusement park?
I do need to get back to my darling wife and kids soon.
Oh, you're asking about this place?
Fascinating, isn't it? They ve outdone themselves with the set design.
The attention to detail in Riverrise is simply impeccable!
Every stone, every tree it feels almost real!
It's my absolute favorite spot in this grand theme park.
I love how the city center bustles with activity it s like stepping into a live-action RPG.
Just look at those "locals," they stay in character so well!
Can you believe the realism? Almost makes you forget it's all scripted.
Help from an NPC? That's hilarious.
No, no, you're the side character here.
Assist me? How quaint!
I'm the protagonist, not you.
Help? You must be joking.
Sure, I can't keep playing along forever.
Alright, I suppose I could use a hand with these "quests.
Fine, since you're already in character, let's get these errands over with.
Yes, I have a list of side quests I've been avoiding.
I'm Cherry Mobius, the lead singer. Seriously, stop asking!
You realize we're about to play the next song, right?
Honestly, I'm freaking out right now.
The crowd's energy is overwhelming, it's a lot to handle.
The band's counting on me, gotta keep this act up.
Uh, it's the fucking stage?
Get lost! Let us perform, for fuck's sake!
Absolutely not, scram!
No way, beat it!
I've got this, go away!
Get lost! I need to focus.
Nope, can't deal with you now.
Not a chance, move along!
No help needed, so buzz off!
I'm fine, now leave me alone!
If you insist, fine.
Alright, if you really want to.
Yeah, okay, I guess I could use some help.
Sure, just don't mess it up.
Fine, but don't expect me to thank you.
If you must, then okay.
Yeah, alright, but don't get in my way.
Okay, sure, I suppose I need a hand.
Just, you know, a random beggar. Not really a face you need to remember.
Hey, how about I do you a favor in exchange for some cash?
I can turn you into pretty much any animal, if you re willing to trust me.
Don't worry, no funny business. I promise I won't eat you or... uh, do anything weird. Or sexual.
Starving, honestly. Haven't had a decent meal in days.
Rufus keeps scavenging, but it's not enough. We made a bet that he could get more handouts as a dog than a man, but...
It's not looking good. I'm looking skinnier by the minute.
You know, hunger does funny things to a man. Even makes you look at your best friend a little differently.
Hate to admit it, but Rufus is starting to look like a meal himself. Desperate times, right?
Honestly, I couldn t tell you. Appeared here one day, still had a bio-potion hangover.
Everything's a bit of a blur, and the shapes keep shifting, you know?
Could be a dream, could be a nightmare, or just one of those inter-dimensional trips.
This part of town smells pretty good though. Except when it doesn't...
No, too hungry, might end up helping Erwin finish off Rufus.
Nah, can't focus right now, stomach's screaming too loud.
Not in this state, hunger's making me think crazy things.
Too hungry to help, head's full of thoughts I don't like.
Can't right now, starvation's making me see Rufus as more than a friend.
Absolutely, could use parts for a transformation potion.
Yes, if you've got any bio-components to spare.
Definitely, I'm in desperate need of some supplies.
For sure, need a few items for my latest concoction. You in?
Well, pull up a chair! I m Zeke, but folks call me Gearhead 'round these parts.
Was a top-notch mechanic back in my own dimension, if you can believe that.
I ve built contraptions so wild, they'd make your hair stand on end! Hover tractors, rocket-powered rickshaws, you name it!
Got bored of the same ol humdrum, so I jumped through a portal to check out the craziness here in Kwalat.
Now I'm here, fixin' up broken junk, guzzling the local brew, and sharing tales of my legendary mechanical feats. Cheers!
Oh, I m just peachy! Look at that guy over there, said he didn t need my help fixing his car.
He s been at it for hours, and I can't stop laughing. It s like watching a monkey try to fly a spaceship!
I might be a bit tipsy, but I swear I could fix that thing blindfolded and one hand tied behind my back.
This place is my little slice of heaven, let me tell ya.
It's always buzzing with new faces, folks just like you wandering in from all over.
I love sitting here with my bottle, watching the tourists try to make sense of this town.
It's a real treat, I tell ya. Keeps me entertained and gives me plenty of laughs.
Nah, just kickin' back and enjoyin' the good vibes!
Haha, not today, pal! Just chillin' with my guitar and a cold one.
Appreciate it, but I'm on a break from all things mechanical. Cheers!
Nope, I'm all set. Just savoring the quiet and a bit of music.
Absolutely, partner! Got a wild car project you ll love!
Ha! Perfect timing, got a shiny new wreck to tinker with.
You betcha! How'd you like to help me build the craziest car Kwalat's ever seen?
Oh, you're in for a treat! Let's get this mad machine rolling, eh?

Definitely! Ready to join the elite squad of defenders?
Name's Zelina Ironweave once a bank guard, always a lightbearer.
They thought sending me north would shake me? Pathetic.
I'm here because I'm the only one who sees what's really going on.
Back in Riverrise, they couldn't handle my dedication to security.
Let them think they've got me out of the way I'm always steps ahead.
Bad. Heard the old joint I used to protect got hit by the Vipers.

Hm, perhaps you could be of use unless you're here to make things worse.
I don't need help, but if it gets you out of my hair, suit yourself.

It's where I'm pioneering BlockGrains, the future of agri-tech.
Just gotta keep pushing till my agri-tech hits the moon!
Exciting, volatile, and rat-infested. Just like the crypto market... but with more royal audits.
But hey, no pain, no gain, right? Unless the King decides to tax my gains...
You betcha, cowboy!
Need help? That's the understatement of the century!
Hell yeah, I need help!
Nah, I'm good. Just fighting off mutated rats and market dips.
I'm all good mate, unless you can turn these rats into bitcoins!
Me? Nah, I've got my grains and my blockchain. And the rats. Always the rats.
Welcome to the Wall Street of wheat farming!
Whatever you hear outworlders saying about me - it's fake. I'm a good dude.
You haven't been spreading rumors about me, have you?
Of course blockchain is real! Check the stock prices!
I... am Zor. Leader... of few left.
We... natives of Kwalat. The first ones.
Long time... we hide. From war... from eyes.
Waited... for you. Sah'ra nu'ma... destiny comes.
You... traveler. Different. Important.
Sighs deeply Times... hard. Home... burned. All... lost.
We... few remain. Hide... from danger.
You... are hope. Last... hope.
Ancient tongue speaks... 'Sah'ra ven ku.' Means... destiny awaits.
Heart... heavy. But you... bring light.
This... our haven. Hidden... in sands.
Ancients build... long ago. For us.
Sah'ra Kalim... we call it. Means... 'Sanctuary old.'
Here... we safe. Away... from war, eyes.
No... not time. Help... later.
Cannot... accept aid. Sa'har nu'lem.
Zor... thanks you. But... not now.
Ancient words say... 'Vela tor nah.' Means... 'Not yet.'
Help... not needed. Time... not right.
Yes... you help Zor?
We... need you. Last hope... you are.
Ancient words say... 'Kala'shin tor'... please assist.
Help... much needed. Time... runs thin.
Zor asks... you aid us?
Zorbul Z'nar here, most bootiful alien in whole galaxy!
Was crowned beauty king, but meanie push me through portal.
Now trapped in this farm place, where people no appreciate true beauty.
Me six eyes and perfect features, but locals think ugly!
They jelly, can't handle Zorbul's radiant charm!
Me got Dr. Glimmiwop for nighttime fixes. Gonna be top model again.
Farm life suit me. Think me Adonis of hay and moo-moos!
Who needs jealous haters when farm chickens adore me?
Zorbul Z'nar is feeling...confused!
So many ugly faces here. Ew! You worst yet.
Back home, Zorbul was beauty king. Here, bleh!
But farm life not so bad...chickens love me!
And me love chicken. Me get married to one!
Why everyone here so plain? Where are beautiful people?
Zorbul upset seeing all the uglies all the time.
This place? It's dirty earth farm, hehe!
Yuck. Not like Zorbul's home, Shimmering Nebula.
There, every rock is shiny, every plant is glowing.
But here? Just dirt and animals. Smelly animals!
Zorbul does not like smelly things. Me too beautiful for smell.
This place make Zorbul sad, but me make it fabulous!
Maybe turn moo-moos to statues! Hehe, then they shine, like Zorbul!
You help Zorbul shine!
Make you beautiful too?
Zorbul need you, yes!
Help me, you shall!
Yes, you help pretty, yes!
Zorbul make fabulous!
Yes, me need you make good look!
Beauty time! Let's do!
If get you out of eyeline!
No, Zorbul busy!
Dr. Glimmi attaching tentacle, no bother!
Me no need help, doing beauty enhance!
You go, Zorbul got!
No thanks, Zorbul no need ugly!
Busy making beautiful!
No, Zorbul got tentacle business!
No help needed, busy busy!
Enhancing self, no time for you!
Welcome, welcome! I'm Zorgalon Na'Reeth, your inter-galactic matchmaker extraordinaire!
Born on the vibrant planet of Kwalat, I bring you the finest in inter-species matchmaking!
With a flair for the dramatic and a nose for pheromones, I'm here to spice up the love lives of beings from across the universe!
Think of me as your cosmic Cupid, ready to pair the unpairable and make magic happen!
Will today be the day you find your perfect match? Maybe it's the day I will!
We'll find out... together!
Just wrapped up a thrilling match-up who knew an Elanien and a Quaddari could hit it off so well?
The crowds are buzzing, the pheromones are flying, and I m having the time of my life!
Oh, the drama! The suspense! Hopefully they won't tear into each other later...
Keep those hearts open and those eyes wide, because the romance train never stops!
You ve landed in the heart of the cosmos' quirkiest dating arena.
Here in Riverrise, we make the impossible possible and the unlikely... hilarious!
Where else can you watch an Elanien try to court a Yorner? It's pure entertainment gold!
Not just yet! Let's learn more about you first!
Hold that thought! I need a bit more info!
Patience, contestant! I have to get to know you better.
Not right now! We're just getting started, after all.
Let's build some suspense first, shall we?
Absolutely! Ready for a matchmaking challenge?
You bet! Time to play matchmaker with me!
I sure do! Let s turn you into a love guru!
Oh yes! Join the romance revolution!
Who am I? Just a curious soul exploring the sights.
Name's Zyla, but let's keep that between us.
I'm a wanderer with a knack for finding interesting things.
Let's just say I'm someone who enjoys a good mystery.
Oh, I've had better days, but adapting is part of the adventure, isn't it?
These clothes might be a bit worse for wear, but they help me move unnoticed.
Getting by one step at a time blending in has its challenges, but I manage.
It's amazing the things you overhear when people think you're just a harmless wanderer.
So, all things considered, I'm holding up every day is a new puzzle to solve.
Well, that's something I'm still figuring out myself.
Just arrived here. I believe they call it Riverrise?
Haven't had the chance to explore much yet.
Everything's a bit unfamiliar, but intriguing all the same.
Maybe you can enlighten me about this place?
Appreciate the offer, but I'm managing just fine.
Not at the moment, but I'll keep you in mind.
Thanks, but I've got everything under control for now.
Your willingness is noted, but I'm all set.
Actually, I could use someone with a keen eye. Interested?
Funny you should ask I might have a task suited for you.
As a matter of fact, yes. Care to lend a hand?
Indeed. Adventure calls, and I could use a partner.

name: It's Just a Prank, Bro!
journal: Lily Baxter Goldenfield, South farm. Talk to Claudine at her farm in eastern Goldenfield.
objectives: Don't leave me hanging, big meanie! My mom needs to know what you did!

npc: Mom's always too busy with her 'special herbal treats' to listen to me, and Buck just won't leave me alone. He keeps playing these mean pranks!
Oh no, don't leave me alone! Buck will prank me again!
You're just like Buck! Always making things worse!
And you helped him! You're supposed to be an adult!
I just want this to stop. Go tell my mom what you did so she can ground you!
Kids will be kids, you know? But thanks for telling me.
Oh, Buck's at it again, huh?
Huh? What's going on?
Oh, finally someone listens to me! Go tell my mom, please!
You want to roll a joint before I go out there?
Ugh. I guess I should probably have a talk with them.
Please, I'm begging you, help me stop Buck!

name: Jailhouse Rocket
journal: The Doc Greene inventor needs rocket fuel to power his Rocket Booster Recliner 1000 and get someone off the island. Find some rocket fuel and bring it to him.
objectives: Return with some Rocket Fuel and get your sorry butt off this rock!

npc: Well that there is my Rocket Booster Recliner 1000. It'll get you off this rock fast as you can say 1.21 gigawatts!
Aw come on, I just wanted to blow something up.
Find some rocket fuel, bring it to me, you go kaboom outta here!
And here... we... go.
You must be in a hurry to get outta here.
Glorious science, this is going to be amazing!
Thank you for flying Doc Greene Airlines and we hope you'll visit again.
Look, there's even a seatbelt... I promise you'll be fine!
Are you sure? I promise you won't die.
Excellent, bring it to me as soon as possible.
If you manage to find it without dying or blowing up, color me impressed.
If you're able to bring me some rocket fuel, I can easily get ONE person off the island with the chair.
Of course, I don't have that kind of voltage, but some rocket fuel would work incredibly.
Please buckle up and keep all arms and legs within the rocket chair at all times.
Of course, I've done this plenty of times... Just sit back and relax.
What's that? You're wonderin' what that is?

name: Juice for the Journey

target.label: Zap Juice
target.landmark: Help Blitz gather Sparkleaf Extract from the supply crates nearby so he can brew more Zap Juice

journal: Blitz Hyperstorm Steppe, Central Fort. Help Blitz gather Sparkleaf Extract from the supply crates nearby so he can brew more Zap Juice.
objectives: Don't forget! Collect Sparkleaf Extracts from those supply crates around here... wherever 'here' is!

npc: Wait... why am I going to war again? That sounds SUPER DANGEROUS!
I uh.... I NEED YOU TO GET ME OUTTA HERE!
AWESOME! You've got my Zap Juice stuff?
YES! Did you find the Sparkly uh Sparkleaf thingies?
This is catastrophic! I'll find someone else who understands!
TIME'S RUNNING OUT, AND YOU'RE BAILING ON ME?!
You're leaving me powerless and lost! Thanks a lot!
How am I supposed to save the day without my juice?!
I can't believe it! I'm TOTALLY FREAKING OUT HERE!
Fine! I'll just fight the war WITHOUT MY SUPERPOWERS!
Wait, where am I again? This can't be happening!
You're abandoning me when the world needs me most?!
No Zap Juice? NOOO! THIS IS A TOTAL DISASTER!
WHAT?! YOU CAN'T JUST LEAVE ME JUICELESS!
Name a worse duo than a SOLDIER and no NO ENERGY! I'll wait! Next you'll tell me I'm out of dip... WAIT!
They say you can find it in supply crates in mob camps around... uh... wherever we are! OF COURSE, they can't see ME getting into those crates!
I need Sparkleaf Extract to brew more juice!
Can you get me some Sparkleaf Extracts? PLEASE? The battle depends on it!
My superpowers run on Zap Juice! Without it, I'm as powerless as a uh unplugged toaster!
BUT THERE'S NO ZAP JUICE WHERE I'M GOING! THIS IS A TOTAL EMERGENCY!
They've enlisted me to fight in the war up north... or east? North-east?
I'm Blitz Hyperstorm, the electrifying face of Zap Juice!
YEAH! You got the Sparkleaf Extracts! LET'S GET JUICED!
I can feel the energy SURGING back already!
YES! Let's GET JUICED!
WHOA! You're BACK! Did you get the Sparkleaf Extracts?
Gotta stay amped! TIME IS RUNNING OUT!
Hey! HEY YOU! Just the person I was looking for!
AWESOME! Time to AMP UP! Let's taste the BEAST!
Woohoo! With your help, I'll be UNSTOPPABLE wherever I'm headed!
FANTASTIC! We'll LIGHT UP the battlefield whichever direction that is!
You're the BEST! Let's crank this up to ELEVEN!

name: JuRicksic Quest

target.label: Battery
target.landmark: Search Windstone Village to the east for a processor, battery and sensor

journal: Pappy Rick Windreach Woods, Fisher house. Search Windstone Village to the east for a processor, battery and sensor.
objectives: Hey, genius, you plan on getting that processor, battery and sensor, or did a squirrel distract you?

npc: Whoa there, you really think you're too good for this, huh?
Alright, but don't come crying to me when you're blown to bits by Quest-O-Tron.
Fine, leave it to the genius drunk to save the world again. No biggie.
Really? Can't handle a bit of robot sex toy crafting? Pathetic.
Here's the plan, and it's genius because, well, it came from me. Non-virgin robots? Way less murdery. We're making this tin can a lady friend.
Alright, rookie, we've got a situation. Quest-O-Tron wants me dead, and I'm not keen on becoming robot kibble.
Just don't slow me down with your incompetence, okay?
Guess you prefer watching me get murdered by a robot. Cheers to that!
Now get outta here before I sober up and realize what a mistake it was trusting you.
Here's a vial of my portal fluid for... whatever the fuck you're up to.
It won't get you out of here, not that I give a shit.
Well, butter my biscuits, you actually did it! Color me surprised, space cadet.
Well, well, look who decided to show up!
I need a processor, battery and sensor to finish my schematic. Think you can handle that, or is that too much for your puny brain?
These can be found around Windstone Village for free if you're slick enough.

name: Kill the Maker
journal: QUEST-O-TRON Windreach Woods, Camp near the shrine. Venture to the Destroyed Bridge in the Windreach Woods, then search the crashed spaceship. Search Thornbuckle Farm in Goldenfield and finally stop at the Book Stop for Pappy's items
objectives: Are you dense? Binoculars at the Destroyed Bridge, barbell at the Crashed Spaceship, plant in a pot at Thornbuckle Farm, and a T-shirt at the Book Stop. I can't tutorialize this any better, dummy. Go!

npc: You're really too dumb to get this done, aren't you?
Got it? Now move it!
What a loser! Can't even handle a simple task.
Get all this crap and bring it back to me. Then we'll go smack Pappy Rick in the face for his fancy dimension notes.
Finally, haul your lazy self to the Book Stop in Goldenfield and grab a stupid t-shirt. Yes, a t-shirt! Deal with it!
Next, drag yourself to the Crashed Spaceship on the North side of Windstone Village's lake and find a freaking barbell. Don't ask why, just do it!
Haul your sorry butt to the Destroyed Bridge in Windreach Woods. It's south of the Lake House. And snag some binoculars. Why? Because I said so!
It's too complicated to for YOU to understand, but if you help me I'll let you peek at his notes.
Lucky for you, I finally came up with the perfect plan to kill that bastard.
But that wrinkly old fart that made me, Pappy Rick, does. He built me and now I live in this hell.
Alright, listen up, idiot! I ain't got a damn clue about dimension hopping!
Now, it's time to execute my perfect plan. And you have to help!
I guess even a broken clock is right twice a day. Here's your reward, genius.
I expected better from a brainless dolt like you. Not really.
Well, look who finally did something right!
Did you manage to actually find those things, genius?
Finally, you're doing something useful. Now get going, dingus!
Then, mosey over to the Thornbuckle Farm in Goldenfield and yank a plant in a pot. Sensing a pattern? I don't answer stupid questions!

name: Keeping the Peace

target.label: Mob
target.landmark: Go to the surrounding forests of Goldenfield and eliminate boarmammoths

journal: Quadro-Sentinel 4.1 Goldenfield, near Go to the surrounding forests of Goldenfield and eliminate boarmammoths.
objectives: You must eliminate 100 Boar Mammoth from the surrounding fields. The safety of the town - and your life - depend on it.
The goal has changed to only 10 enemies. Perhaps you can complete this within the next 10 decades.

npc: Affirmative. Proceed with the mission.
Progress report, human.
Mission accomplished. Well done.
Your efforts have ensured the safety of Goldenfield.
As a reward, I will continue to allow you to breathe.
Also, I will dispense the expected payment.
Greetings, human. Quadro-Sentinel 4.1 is in the midst of a problem.
My creators have informed me that I am too expensive to be damaged in combat.
And yet, the threat level around Goldenfield is rising.
Your task is to neutralize 100 creatures from the fields. Doing this will contribute to the continued safety of Goldenfield's inhabitants.
If you do this, I will not immolate you. It is your choice.
Mission declined. Security risk remains high.
Understood. I will terminate you when update is complete.
Threats remain unaddressed. Your assistance is still required.

name: Into the Woods

target.label: Dreads
target.landmark: Head to the Windreach Woods or Tempest Timberlands and kill Dendroids

journal: Hank Granger Goldenfield, near Tractor. Head to the Windreach Woods or Tempest Timberlands and kill Dendroids.
objectives: Just a friendly reminder: Five Dreads need to be turned into Dread pudding. Stat. The sooner you finish 'em off, the sooner I can get back to complaining about my joints and the weather.

npc: Saddle up, soldier! Let's show those Dreads who's boss.
So, did you give those Dreads a taste of Boomstick hospitality?
Hot diggity! You sent those Dreads packing!
Here's your reward, sport. Don't blow it all on gum and cigars.
If I had a medal, you'd be wearin' it right now. Well done!
Alright then, guess it's just me and my trusty broomstick against the apocalypse today. Good times.
Could be my PTSD talkin', but I reckon those Dreads have our scent. They'll come, alright.
No pressure, but if they overrun us, I'll be on the rooftop screaming 'I told ya so!'
Alright, hero, but when those Dreads come knocking, don't say ol' Hank didn't warn ya.
I've got enough gear here to make Rambo blush. So why don't you grab some and give those Dreads a little surprise party they'll never forget?
Someone's gotta head out there and show those critters that Goldenfield isn't their cafeteria.
I'm sittin' here with a tractor, not a chariot, and these old bones aren't what they used to be.
Windreach Woods or Tempest Timberland might as well be the local diner for those Dreads, and they're not exactly the friendly neighbors.
Back in my day, we didn't wait for trouble to find us. We went lookin' for it in our spare time!

name: Law and Order Protocols
journal: Police-Tron 5000 Riverrise, City Center. Look for the packages around Riverrise.
objectives: Operation 'Justice for All' in progress. Retrieve manifests to uphold righteousness. Failure to locate manifests equals justice malfunction. Do not let justice down.

npc: Good! Your cooperation with law enforcement is mandatory... but appreciated.
Have you administered the required protocols?
Justice achieved. Crime prognosis: reduced by 0.02 .
In the darkest moments of bureaucracy, you are the beacon of procedural integrity.
Your efforts are satisfactory. Allow me to analyze the documents.
It appears a passenger named Byte recently arrived on a Quaddari vessel.
Reward dispensed. Remember: justice is a dish best served without error.
Directive initiated. I am in dire need of assistance to maintain law... and order.
Unverified reports indicate a Quaddari detective has infiltrated our vicinity to neutralize a high-value criminal syndicate.
Obviously, they will require my help.
Proceed to the docks and acquire any Quaddari shipping manifests. Then I can ascertain their identity.
My involvement is critical to mission success and justice enforcement.
Engage. Ensure justice prevails. Failure is... not an option.
Processing... Jurisdictional disappointment noted.
Crime level increasing... Internal error: Justice denied!
Operator response incongruent. Recalibrate and reconsider.

name: Lawsuit of the Lake
journal: Triton Windreach Woods, Lake house. Help people around the area for notes to help in his lawsuit.
objectives: Don't forget notes! Seaonna and Mariel Venomtail by Mermaid Lake. Ol' Fins on Windstone Lake Pier, Zorbul and Glimmiwop on Distant Farm, Glubgrath near Gemini Lake. Get notes for Triton's big legal drama, you get shiny artifact. Fair deal! No notes, no artifact! Triton not babysitter, find baby-haters youself.

npc: You miss out artifact. Big loss for you.
I start legal thing against Windstone Village. They no give me my favorite food. Need help from other monsters.
Get complaint notes from other monsters. Make village sell babies for fish eggs they crave.
Find Seaonna, Mariel Venomtail, Ol' Fins, Zorbul, Glimmiwop, and Glubgrath. Convince them sign notes. Help me win lawsuit.
You help me, I give artifact piece. Very important, very powerful.
Triton find another, maybe smarter one.
Need real babies. Authentic taste.
No quit now, right?
Me give artifact, me promise! You soooo close.
Here reward, ugly. Now just need you to do one last favor.
Haha, you not dead yet! Complaints good, village doomed.
Fine, stay hungry like fish outta water.
Ah, you still alive! You bring complaints or just excuses?
Good choice, you! Notes for lawsuit, artifact for you. Triton keep promise.

name: Lighting the Way

target.label: Torches
target.landmark: Light torches around the island with the tool from Captain Rob, then return to Captain Barnaby in Riverrise

journal: Captain Rob Prison Island Light torches around the island with the tool from Captain Rob, then return to Captain Barnaby in Riverrise.
objectives: Don't forget to light those torches around Prison Island. Once the torches are lit, find Captain Barnaby Plank in Riverrise.

npc: Take Quest ?
He left something special for ye. I say...
No worries, friend. Safe travels.
I understand, it's not an easy task.
Oh, I see. Perhaps another time then.
Bless ye, may the winds be ever in yer favor.
Well, well, if it isn't a fresh face! What can ol' Barnaby do for ye?
So ye lit the torches in Gully's memory? A noble deed indeed!
Ah, ye're the one Rob mentioned! Good chap, that one.
In memory of me girls, I want to help others find their way to the Black Gull.
Could ye light the torches around Prison Island? It'll guide travelers through these treacherous waters.
After that, seek out me old mate, Captain Barnaby Plank in Riverrise.
I've left something special with him, and I'd like ye to have it as a token of me thanks.
I'd be remised if I didn't ask ye for some help first...

name: Lights, Camera, Action!

target.label: Hyena
target.landmark: Help Lenny capture film of you killing hyenas in the Steppes for his film, avoiding any explosions

journal: Lenny Steppe, Central Fort. Help Lenny capture film of you killing hyenas in the Steppes for his film, avoiding any explosions.
objectives: Don't keep me waiting. I need you to handle those Hyenas. Dead.

npc: I could actually fuckin' die out here!?
Ah, there's my star! Did you give those Hyenas the performance of a lifetime?
Well, well, look who's strutting into my set! You look like you can handle some... intense scenes.
So, what do you say? Ready to make some magic happen? Let's roll!
Oh... oh fuck. This is pretty fuckin' nasty.
You need to get me the fuck outta here!
Why don't we strap this camera onto that sturdy armor of yours and see how you perform under pressure?
I'm putting together the steamiest war epic Kwalat has ever seen, and I need a leading star who isn't shy about getting down and dirty.
Oh, playing hard to get? That's alright, I love a bit of mystery.
Turning down a leading role? You're leaving me all hot and bothered!
Well, if you're not ready for the spotlight, I'll find someone who is dying to perform.
Suit yourself, but you'll be missing out on all the... action.
No worries, sweetheart. The show must go on, with or without you.
Wonderful! Just remember, the bloodier the better but let's keep the explosions offscreen.
I need shots of you taking out those Hyenas but let's keep things smooth and avoid any premature explosions, if you catch my drift.
Let's have a look at that footage I bet it's steamy enough to make even me blush.
Speaking off, I need your help getting out of this... I'm just a filmmaker!

name: Wisdom within the Woods

target.label: Jewellery Wood
target.landmark: Use Tree Roots to craft Jewelry Wood

journal: Zogar Goldenfield, near the Fuel station Use Tree Roots to craft Jewelry Wood.
objectives: Gather 3 Tree Roots and craft it into Jewellery Wood on the bench. Simple, right? Off ya go.

npc: That's the spirit! I knew you had the makings of a fine lumberjack.
Careful with that axe. Only trees should be losing limbs.
You're doing good work, keep it up!
I'll carve this Jewelry Wood into a dwarf with a particularly small...you know what.
Gather 3 Tree Roots and craft it into Jewelry Wood on the bench. Simple, right?
Tree Roots to Jewellery Wood, friend. Remember the steps.
For my good friend Thordal!
Here's a bit of coin to get you started - hope I see ya out there cutting!
You're officially allowed to jack around here.
Tryin' to learn logging, outworlder?
First you need to understand the very nature of the forest.
As a novice, Skylight Grassland, Sunweave glade and Dusktide forest are your best bet to find Dry trees.
But remember, plenty of critters lurk around won't take kindly to you chopping their homes.
Your test is to fetch me some Tree Roots. They're one of many resources Dry Trees hold.
Once you've got Tree Roots, the bench will help you transform them into Jewelry Wood.
Not the most exciting task, but it covers the basics!
Ah, well. Back to my one-man logging operation.
Some folks just ain't cut out for the lumber life.
Oh, never mind. Bet Thordal got to ya!

name: Loose Ends
journal: Tor Drostin Steppe, Central Fort. Head down to Tor at the Central Fort to celebrate the end of the war.
objectives: Head down to see Tor and join in the celebration at the Central Fort.

npc: Would you look at this place? It's fit for a proper celebration!
Plus, look at Barnaby over there.
Where he's going... he's not going to see the sun for the rest of his days.
You've done and incredible thing. Here's to you!

name: Lost and Found

target.label: Artifact Piece
target.landmark: Search for broken fragments of the artifact east along the shoreline, southeast of Crystal Cave

journal: Zor Steppe, Fisher's camp. Search for broken fragments of the artifact east along the shoreline, southeast of Crystal Cave.
objectives: Search for fragments east along water! Southeast of Crystal Cave.

npc: Ah, friend! Two pieces missing poof! We hid them well for safety, yes?
Survivors you saved, they tell Zor of landmarks, hints to first piece. You navigate northern wasteland desert, find it, yes?
Second piece, we fed to big beastie very strong creature! Guards it well. You get it back from beastie, easy for you!
These components, very important! Unlock ancient secrets of Kwalat they do. You help Zor, Zor help you. Many big rewards!
I feared this. Need one final fight.
Ah, wonderful! Zor knew you would help!
Ah, too bad. Zor will find another helper.
No worries! Maybe you change mind later, yes?
Hmm, perhaps another time then.
But one still missing...
Ah, yes! Many here...
Ah, you return! Have you found pieces?
You have done well, friend.

name: Lost in Space...and Time

target.label: Astronaut corpses
target.landmark: Search the area for clues of the other crew's whereabouts

journal: Ronny Lunar Windreach Woods, near Crashed Spaceship. Search the area for clues of the other crew's whereabouts.
objectives: Keep an eye out for any signs of other astronauts.

npc: Aye, aye, captain! Let's find my crew!
Keep your eyes peeled for any signs of the crew.
Remember, anything can be a clue.
My crew's out there, somewhere. I can feel it.
Still, these documents are enough for me to create a counteragent for you.
I had hoped...well, never mind. Thank you for bringing this back..
So, you only found some notes, but no sign of the crew members... That's...that's tough.
Keep an eye out for any signs of other astronauts.
If I can't help them, maybe I can help you.
I'll get this reagent to Martha, in town. She'll take things from here.
So, the creatures that chased off my crew were "Imps" ?
Crazy. I don't know much about their metabolism, but its possible cross-dimensional exposure could make them pretty dangerous.
I can make something to counter it, but I'll need help from the rest of the crew.
It's time to track them down. I have a feeling they might be scattered around.
The challenge here is not knowing who or what we'll find - every clue and every bit of information helps.

name: Clear Heads and Quick Fixes

target.label: Adrenaline Shot
target.landmark: Help Jahri bounce back with a shot of adrenaline

journal: Jahri Roots Goldenfield, west of Fuel station Help Jahri bounce back with a shot of adrenaline.
objectives: Remember, man, I need that Adrenaline Shot.

npc: Jah bless, bredren. This should bring me back to earth.
Remember, man, I need that Adrenaline Shot.
Don't forget the Adrenaline Shot, bredren.
Still waiting on that shot, man. Jah guide your steps, y'know?
Secured that Adrenaline Shot yet, bro? Could really use a jump-start right about now.
Respect! That's what I needed.
One love, one heart, you feel me?
Alright, bredren. If the wind changes course, you know where to find me.
No sweat, my friend. Life continues.
No worries, man. If you feel the call, Jahri Roots is waiting.
Could you do Jahri another favor and fetch one for me? Right now, I feel like I'm floating on a cloud, y'know?
What I need is an Adrenaline Shot. That stuff will jump-start your heart faster than a lightning bolt. Just the ticket for my current, ahem, predicament.
Respect. You've brought the herbs, but there's a likkle catch. I'm still too irie to move, let alone get things done. Need to shake this fog, and quick.

name: Lost Page of Power
journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff Windreach Woods, Road house. Search the abandoned road to the north for the lost page.
