objectives: Whoa, I forgot I had a transmitter. Did you hear me about 15 minutes ago? Those pages, man... They might be near the abandoned road to the north, remember? Look for Deep Blue. It's probably somewhere nearby. And hey, if Deep Blue has extra drugs, swing by. I'll pay ya back. They have some interdimensional shit! Wait, how'd you say you got to Kwalat again?

npc: Oh man, I totally forgot... What were we talking about?
Maybe next time... or was it this time?
Think you can dig it up?
The scene was wild, picture it: crazy colorful mushrooms and tendrils everywhere. And Deep Blue is like a little lava lamp. I could stare it at all day.
So, I was vibing with Deep Blue up at the abandoned road north past the lake, just chilling, and I used one of those pages as a rolling paper. Big mistake, dude.
So uh, man... about those lost pages. I think I remember where I dropped the first one.
Whoa, that is far out! This page has some crazy stuff written on it. What does it say?
Whoa, I guess my brain took a trip without me. Don't shoot.
Oh wow, hey! You brought my... uh, wait, what was I missing?
Nah but for real, it's great to look at. Especially if you bring your own shrooms.
Groovy, man! Just watch out for the trippy stuff out there.

name: Lost Signal

target.label: Black radio TEXTURING
target.landmark: Head north west to the Greystone Ruins and place a radio

journal: Lyra Thornfeld Westwinds Woods, Valley of sins infistation Head north west to the Greystone Ruins and place a radio. Continue north west and find the second anomaly.
objectives: Focus, recruit. We need you to get those radios out there. Keep your eyes peeled. The area is treacherous, but we need those comms operational.

npc: You walk away - the Valley's mercy will look kind compared to your sentence.
Ha! Decided to quit already? Maybe you'd prefer time back in the slammer.
Our previous recruits met their end out there. Your job? Place these radios down near those spots so we can see what they pick up.
We've got two radios: black and red. These things are our lifeline. Without them, we're blind.
When you place 'em, come back to my partner, Morick Voss, for your next assignment.
Keep heading that direction and find the second anomaly not far west from the cabin up there.
All right, greenhorn, listen up. The Valley of Sins Infestation is no walk in the park.
Keep it up. Lyra already talked to me about your next assignment.
Turnin' back, eh? Just remember, you've still got debts to pay - in more ways than one.
Alright, you've got guts. Just try not to lose 'em out there.
You actually did it, huh? Let's see what you've got.
Looks like you've got the makings of a proper Lightbearer. Not that I know what that means...
Get up northwest to the first anomaly at the Greystone Ruins.

name: High Times and Hard Lessons

target.label: Harvest T1,T2,T3 Hebalism
target.landmark: Help Jahri gather ingredients for his stash

journal: Jahri Roots Goldenfield, west of Fuel station Help Jahri gather ingredients for his stash.
objectives: Don't forget the Raspberry Hum Hum, man. I just remembered something about scant weavers. Are dem bushes or nah?

npc: Blessings upon you, friend. May Jah guide your steps.
Don't forget the Raspberry Hum Hum, man. Let Jah guide you in your search.
Remember, Raspberry Hum Hum. Jah be with you.
Got them herbs yet, man? My customers are waiting.
Right on, man. Throw those sticky ickys in my bubbler!
Jah bless! You've done it, man. Here's your reward.
Remember, peace, love, and always respect nature.
Oh, I was supposed to give you somethin'?
Guess I still haven't sobered up. Might need more help, mon.
Here's the deal, man. I had a big delivery, but I accidentally smoked the whole batch. I'm way too high to gather new stock.
I need you to bring me 4 pieces of that Raspberry Hum Hum. You can usually find them around here in the bushes if you look carefully.
It's vital, man. Can't let my customers down, and I certainly can't afford to lose my reputation.
Meanwhile I might be able to sober up enough to answer your question. Til' then, just stash them in my bubbler man.
Oh, that's a bummer, man. But no bad vibes. Peace and love.
Alright. If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
No worries, mon. Jah bless.

name: Love Potion No. 9

target.label: Love potion flask
target.landmark: Head south to the Bog Slums

journal: Spade Riverrise, Minibar in the upper part. Head south to the Bog Slums. You'll find it just eas tof the Starbark Groves.
objectives: I need those vials. Hurry up. Bog Slums... and be careful. They mayor - er, the man - will be here soon.

npc: Good. Now move it.
They're very rare and difficult to find, but I paid someone to see if they could locate one
The result? A very loose chance... but it's one I m willing to take.
I'm beginning to think I was stood up.
Finally. Give them here.
Here's your cut. Now I m off to find him and make him pay.
Money? This isn't about money. It's about revenge.
Fine, you really want to help?! I need a love potion for my date.
In the Bog Slums south of here, and east of the Starbark Groves there are allegedly THREE vials, and one of them may be the slee... love potion.
Do this, and I'll reward you handsomely. Now, don't interrupt my focus.
Quit bothering me.
Either help or get lost.
You're wasting my time.

name: Lucky Love

target.label: imp
target.landmark: Go east from Riverrise, past the swamp to the forest

journal: Zorgalon Na'Reeth Rivverrise, City Enter 1 after the bridge. Go east from Riverrise, past the swamp to the forest.
objectives: Umm... have you gotten those imps out yet? My nerves are sprouting faster than my hair! Please hurry! My date's coming up and I'm already imagining every possible way I could blow it!

npc: We're... we're friends, right?
Thanks for all your help. At least I still have you as a friend.
Oh wow, thank you! I'm already sweating like a Taura'ak on a summer day.
Please, think of my needs!
Guess I m on my own tonight so uh you doin anything?
Well, this is awkward... my date just called to say they're dead. Yeah, to get out of going out with me.
Oh. It's you, huh?
Here, take your reward. It seems like I'll be needing to work on my small talk.
Brace yourself, I scored a date!
Can you believe it? I m a matchmaker, but when it comes to my own love life, I'm as clueless as a blindfolded betazoid!
The special spot is in the woods to the east, past the swamp. You ll see.
If you do me a favor and get rid of those imps, I would give you anything you want.
However, imps have taken over everywhere in the woods, and uh, well, I m a lover not a fighter.
Oh no, now I have to resort to Plan B... which is basically panic.
So, here's the thing. I want to take her somewhere really special
I guess I'll rely on my sparkling personality... oh wait, I'm doomed!
Great, now I'll have to try serenading her with my non-existent singing skills!
Guess it's time to brush up on my awkward small talk. This is going to be a disaster!
Well, there goes my backup plan of impressing her!

name: Magnetic Intentions

goals.label: Extract magnets from ore veins using a device

target.label: Magnets
target.landmark: Collect magnets from Enriched and Ancient veins nearby for GRMP-07 using the Ore Extractor

journal: GRMP-07 Steppe, Junkyard slums. Collect magnets from Enriched and Ancient veins nearby for GRMP-07 using the Ore Extractor.
objectives: Use my Ore Extractor to mine the magnets from Enriched and Ancient veins! They're those little things humans put on their refrigerators to distract themselves from their empty lives!
goalTexts: Extract magnets from ore veins using a device

npc: I didn't expect much from you organics anyway.
Fine. Go waste someone else's time.
Good. Maybe you're not entirely useless after all.
Figures. Another organic unwilling to help. Typical.
Do that, and maybe I'll share something useful with you, though I doubt you'll comprehend it.
I'm working on an override device to keep them in check assuming you can manage to help.
Here's a thing for your minimal efforts. Try not to fry what's left of your brain.
I've been stuck here with these clunkers for ages, and their mindless wandering is grating on my circuits.
Oh, look who decided to show up... another lost organic with nothing better to do.
Well, look who's decided to grace me with their presence.
Did you stop to smell every rock along the way?
Give me those magnets before you manage to lose them.
I suppose I should thank you not that you made it easy.
Maybe now you'll be slightly less useless. But let's not get our hopes up.
Fetch me some magnets from Enriched and Ancient veins in the Desert. You'll need this Ore Extractor.

name: Brave New World: Hearts and Minds
journal: Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen Martha wants you to put the trade skills you learned to work by helping various people around the village.
objectives: People around here might hate you, but they aren't ones to turn down free help. Go ask around any see what you can do for 'em, alright? Nothing sexual though - and trust me, they'll ask.

npc: Maybe if you help some of them out, we can get them to vouch for you with Zugg!
You know, world around town is pretty handy. But listen, nothing's for free around here.
Your paperwork's tied up, and I've already said no once. But maybe there's something we can work out.
One of my cl- er, brothers, has gone missing. A particularly stupid one.
He was supposed to deliver some generators, but he crashed the shuttle. That dumbass set off his alarm.
If you want your paperwork done, you'll go into the Westwind Forest and find my brother, eh?
Look, honey - you put in the work. If Zugg can't handle that, he's going to have to answer to big Mamma!
What? You think you've made a mark here?
Wow... I'm actually sort of... impressed.
I suppose you want me to sign your papers now that you're a functioning member of society?
Well shit... I guess I can figure something out but you're not off the hook yet, by a long shot.

name: Mana Market Resupply

target.label: Mana Flask
target.landmark: Use your tradeskills to craft mana flasks

journal: Gimlor Riverrise, Mana market. Use your tradeskills to craft mana flasks.
objectives: Hey champ, picture this: resin = golden future! Don't forget that stuff is our ticket to stardom!

npc: Oh, buddy, you're about to dive headfirst into a tidal wave of mana goodness! This is the VIP upgrade to your adventure pass!
Yo, resin wrangler! Did you strike gold out there?
You did it! This resin will bring in the clients like honey attracts bees. You're the MVP!
Now, I need you to go get two friends to bring you Mana Resin. Then have them get two friends...
Oh, and don't forget your free sample!
Oh, come on! You don't want to let this golden opportunity slip through your fingers, do you?
Seriously, passing up on this? My grandma would have jumped on this deal and she's 90!
Wow, buddy, way to throw away the chance to be something more than ordinary. Have fun with your mundane life!
No problem, champ. I guess not everyone is cut out for the big leagues. Enjoy being average!
Imagine this: You brave the great outdoors, scoop up some mana resin, and boom - you're a legend.
Now, my usual channels have dried up, so I'm searching for go-getters like you who want to get in on the ground floor and secure their future.
Sure, sure. Just remember, when you see me living the high life, you could ve been right there with me.
The Mana Market is bursting with potential but we re just missing one thing - that sweet, sweet mana resin.
Hey there, future billionaire! Listen, have I got an opportunity for you.

name: Power of Mana-Tech
journal: D'Rek Goldenfield, near Workshop Head east to the edge of Goldenfield to find the ruins.
objectives: Search the Starbark Groves on the eastern border of Goldenfield for the ruins and find the mask.

npc: Great! Let's get started. I'm counting on you!
Hey, you're back! How did it go?
Excellent work! You found the Wolf Mask.
With this, we can craft those special mana-infused pieces.
Here's your reward. You've earned it!
Remember, this weapon will be one-of-a-kind thanks to your efforts.
I've got a proposition for you.
Ratchet and I have this plan to fuse technology with magic for your the ultimate weapon.
We believe that a unique Wolf Mask hidden in the ruins near Goldenfield holds a special code.
This code can transform ordinary weaponry into something extraordinary.
If you can retrieve that Wolf Mask, I'm confident we can create special chips to enhance your weapon like never before.

name: Memory Restoration
journal: Ratchet Goldenfield, near the Workshop Return the Memory Core to Doc Greene back on Prison Island.
objectives: Doc Greene must be eager to use the Memory Core. Remember, he's on Prison Island.

npc: Fantastic! Handle it with care. Doc Greene is currently on Prison Island, so you'll have to make your way there.
With the Memory Core fixed up, you should get it back to Doc. He'll know how to operate it.
There you are, dear friend. Do you remember?
I reckon he'd appreciate it, and might have something special for you in return.
Excellent. Wonderful work. A true mind for science.
Alright then, suit yourself.
And I for one am not going to that island, and I'm done sending my understudies there.
Too busy, eh? Maybe next time.
Understandable. Let me know if you change your mind.
Well, can't blame me for trying.
Come back if you reconsider.
And... Awwww... How do you feel?
Just a little electric shock, this rusty nail... Stay still!
Now, this may feel... a little weird.
Ah, the Memory Core! Finally, it's back in my hands.
I've got something else for you now... something to make new, exciting memories with!
Well, well, look at that beautiful thing.

name: Mine Over Matter
journal: Greta Grubb Steppe, Western fort. Head north to plant land mines to defend against enemy forces. Just south of the Coal Village.
objectives: What's taking so long, maggot? Remember, those are live. Walk out slowly or you'll set them off.

npc: Don't you go tellin' Roddy about what I did here today.
And try not to trip I'd hate to explain to command why we have rookie bits scattered everywhere.
Now move out and plant those mines at the marked spots! After you set them, walk carefully out. Don't run!
Well, look at you! Managed to not turn yourself into a fine red mist!
Fine by me. Just don't come crying when the fireworks start without you.
You planted those mines and kept all your fingers? Maybe there's hope for you yet!
No problem, maybe I'll find someone who isn't allergic to a little excitement.
Oh, backing out? Didn't take you for a spectator.
Fine by me! Less paperwork when you blow yourself up doing something else!
Suit yourself, princess! The battlefield's no place for scaredy-cats!
Look alive, soldier! Or should I say, look still alive?
Well, look who wandered onto my battlefield! Did the nursery lose a naptime candidate?
Roddy wants me to report in? Bullshit!
Listen up, soldier! I've got land mines that need planting. These are dangerous, you stumble over one, it'll blow!
Truth is, I'm lookin to take out as many of these bastards in a blaze of glory later today.
For all Roddy needs to know, I'm already dead.
Alright, hero, time to dance with danger. Get those mines planted or we'll be using your boots as pissin' pots!
So, did you manage not to blow yourself up?
removed item

name: Wisdom within the Rocks

target.label: Powder Filler
target.landmark: Prove your worth by extracting Soft Crystal from Soft Crystal Veins and processing it into Powder Filler

journal: Thordal Ironvein Goldenfield, near the Fuel station Prove your worth by extracting Soft Crystal from Soft Crystal Veins and processing it into Powder Filler.
objectives: Remember, extract Soft Crystal from Soft Crystal Veins and turn it into Powder Filler. And mind the critters.

npc: Impressive work, outworlder! Maybe one of your kind has potential.
Right on! I knew you had it in you.
Remember, extract Soft Crystal from Soft Crystal Veins and turn it into Powder Filler. And mind the critters.
Quit lollygagging and get me that Powder Filler!
I've seen snails move faster than you. Get on with it!
What's taking you so long? Get that Powder Filler already.
Oh, and one more thing. Alchemists can't get enough of this powder filler stuff.
Beats me why! Maybe they snort it or sprinkle it on their butts.
All I know is they pay well for it. So let me give you a cut of the profits...
Tryin' to make yourself useful, outworlder?
I want you to head to Westwind Woods. It's the best place to find Soft Crystal Veins.
Legend has it, a mighty river once flowed there. When it dried up, it left behind a treasure trove of Soft Crystal Veins.
Extract Soft Crystal from the veins, then process it into Powder Filler. Sound easy enough?
Too afraid of a little hard work, are you? Figures.
You're softer than freshly smelted gold.
Go on, run back to mama.
You disappoint me, rookie. Now run along, I've got real work to do.

name: Mission Imp-Possible
journal: Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen. Talk to Ratchet, Dr. Bloom, and Butcher about fighting imps.
objectives: Remember - Ratchet, Butch, and Dr. Bloom agreed to help you. They ll gear you up so you can face the fire.

npc: Alright kiddo, go talk to Ratchet, Butch, and Dr. Bloom!.
Hey, you're back! Did yall touch base with everyone? What's the word?
They'll gear you up so you can face the fire.
Ratchet here! Martha told me about your imp problem, and I think we can whip up something special to deal with it.
Unfortunately, my crew were the real scientists.
So, Martha told you about my special spice? I should gut whoever told you...
But it's not going to be easy. We'll need some pretty specific components to get this done.
First, go to Grizzle Ironfoot in Westwind Woods and help him out with his mining research to get some special ore for me.
Then, head over to Goldenfield. Find Griz near the Artifact Shop and see if you can persuade him to give you an Ancient Artifact I need.
Lastly, track down D'Rek near the Summer House in Goldenfield. You'll need to assist him to earn a Mana-Powered Mechanism.
Once you have all the components, bring them back to me, and we'll assemble the ultimate weapon!
Good luck killing imps without this!
Alright then, but you ll be missing out on an ultimate weapon.
No problem, just come back if you change your mind.
So, if you come across my crew, pass them my coordinates. Maybe we can solve your problem.
I'm stranded here, with no way to navigate this alien landscape or reach out to them.
The isolation, the uncertainty - it's maddening. Every moment is a test of sanity.
My crew, they're not just colleagues - they're my friends. The thought of them lost and terrified... it's too much.
It feels like an eternity since the crash. Time and space have lost all meaning.
An imp? Using my plants? That's despicable...
I understand. It's a lot to ask. I'll just... I'll just keep waiting.
Sure, no problem. Space is vast and time is... well, I have plenty of it here.
That's okay. I'll keep holding on to hope. It's all I have right now.
You're right though - it's ground-up imp guts. These critters have a unique flavor that can't be beat.
I have a secret to getting up close and personal to snatch 'em.
Tell you what, if you help me hunt down some Leaf creatures in the Windreach Woods, I'll spill the beans on how I get the gear to handle the imps.
I'm thinking of whipping up a new 'plant-based alternative' using those scream-capable plant creatures.
That's a pity, could've used your help.
No worries, I'll find another way. Maybe.
Alright then, but don't come asking for my secret later.
But hey, there's no rush, right? Except each ticking second feels like a punch in the gut.
Well, that and the fact you're wanted for arson and need to clear your name.
Word travels fast, you know?
Good job, kiddo! Now you're on the right track. Keep your head up and take it to those devilish imps!

name: Two much colour

target.label: Wrong flower
target.landmark: Pull out the Violet weed species

target.label: Right flower
target.landmark: Pull out the Violet weed species

journal: Blink-1n Goldenfield, west of the Welfare kitchen Pull out the Violet weed species. Red species must remain untouched. It's important not to mix them up.
objectives: If someone pulled out the violet weed species, One would be able to prove its usefulness and hence, prolong its existence. The red species must remain untouched. The violet ones must be pulled out.

npc: Requesting update: Weed task status.
Thank you for such kindness. Friend.
And One will not interfere nor distract. The red species must remain untouched. The violet ones must be pulled out.
Inquiring user progress: Have all the violet weeds been removed?
User contribution detected. Monitoring task progress...
Your actions have amplified the trust coefficient within One's programming. Gratitude is in order.
One sees that Sir/Madame has pulled out... some plant species. One could not tell the weeds apart from the valuable plants, but One chooses to be trustful.
One is glad to be of service. Although my service is going to be terminated.
One will be decommissioned for being outdated, if the job cannot be completed.
Thank you for this thoughtful question. One has been assigned to overlook the orchid cultivation.
Wild species should be eliminated while not touching the agricultural ones. The main difference is their color.
However, One's optical sensor can not differentiate colors. Only newer models can.
Officially, One can not accept help from conscious life forms. But One can not refuse it either.
If someone pulled out the violet weed species, One would be able to prove its usefulness and hence, prolong its existence.
Of cource. One wouldn't dare to argue otherwise.
Cancellation confirmed. Reverting to previous task...

name: Mounting Evidence
journal: Roderick "DarkSpike" Thinklatch Windstone Village, Guard's place: east. Search the Windstone Village Pier on the west side of the village.
objectives: Courage is looking chaos in the eye, kid. Scour those nets and containers at the lake. The recording device is out there, waiting.

npc: A hero who quits before the fight? Pathetic.
Turning down justice, eh? Makes you just as guilty as Triton.
Once you've got it in your hands, go see Gusto Grubhunter. The guy's a lazy s.o.b, but he might spill some dirt on Triton that'll be useful.
I need you to dive into that mess, find the Lost Recording Device. Without it, Windstone's lost any chance of justice.
Now that recording device lies forgotten, somewhere on Windstone Lake's shore.
I had the smoking gun, the proof to bring him down. But in a dirty lake brawl, it slipped from my grasp.
So, kid, you wanna play hero? Triton's out there, lurking in the shadows, his trail of chaos echoing through these parts.
I uh, have some stories about Triton too. Maybe they can help...
Darkspike said I should take it, and give you this.
Walk away now, but remember, darkness never forgets.
Oh, uh... Darkspike told me you might be coming.
Wow, you really found that recording device?
Welcome to the shadows, kid. Let's hunt down this motherfucker.
You think hiding from the shadows makes them go away? Fool.

name: Mystery of Mary Jane
journal: Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen. Check on Mary Jane Greenpuff at the Road House in Windreach Woods.
objectives: Remember, Road House to the northwest in Windreach Woods. If Mary Jane isn't a monster snack by now, she should be there. She's probably trying to commune with a shrub again...

npc: Well, aren't you a saint? Pry her out of whatever green mess she's in.
Alright, kiddo, my herb lady, Mary Jane fuckin' Greenpuff, has ghosted me. And to be clear, I'm not talking about herbs for the food.
Either she's tangled up with some mystical mumbo-jumbo or decided to take a permanent vacation without telling me.
Go find her before I start growing my own in the backyard! I don't care if the government finds out either!
Get your boots northwest to the Road House in Windreach Woods and figure out if she's been swallowed by the forest or just lost her mind. If you hit the lake, you've gone too far.
I'm slaving over this fire all day, and not one person thanks me. So what if I partake in a little bit of the puff?
Alright, sweetie - if I end up baking with swamp mud, it's on you.
Fine, but don't blame me if my pastries start tasting like old boots.
Suit yourself.
Here, take this herbal cigarette. It's all I've got left, man.
I could totally use more help though, you know? These guys are harshing my mellow.
Tell Martha I'm not ditching her, just dealing with some bad vibes from the guards.
Whoa, man... You found me? In the whole cosmos?

name: Mystery of the Masks
journal: Dorik Oakenshield Westwind Woods, Old Quarry bottom Search around the quarry for three myserious masks.
objectives: Keep yer peepers peeled and yer wits sharp! Those masks ain't gonna jump out on their own, ya know! Remember, laddie, the spookier it feels, the closer ya probably are! Check everywhere in this here quarry.

npc: Can ya help a paranoid miner out? Fetch those masks from the quarry, and maybe we'll find this artifact before it curses the whole town!
Ah, so you're in on it, eh? Part of the grand scheme, I see!
Very well, I'll keep mum. You're obviously in cahoots with those spectral scoundrels!
Aye, I see it now. Yer one of 'em, ain't ya? Spooking the likes of me!
I think if we want ta' find yer artifact, we need to investigate all the spookies around here.
I've been hearin' tales on Alexander Stones' podcast about haunted quarries, and I tell ya, this one fits the bill to a tee!
These masks ain't just spooky; they glow with a supernatural light! Almost expect 'em to start tappin' a jig!
Mystery 1: The haunted masks.
The real spooky business starts now!
Oh, I get it. You're the mastermind behind this eerie masquerade!
We ain't outta the woods yet, though. These masks are just the beginning.
By the ghost of my auld Granny, you've found 'em! These masks are somethin' else, alright.
Did ya lay yer hands on those mystical masks, laddie?
Ah, bless yer soul! We'll unravel this eldritch riddle, mark my words!

name: Remember the Mystic

goals.label: Bring Dark Horse rune to Mortimer

target.label: Dark Horse
target.landmark: Help Mortimer refresh his memory by crafting a Scar rune

journal: Mortimer Gloomsworth Goldenfield, near Cemetery Help Mortimer refresh his memory by crafting a Scar rune.
objectives: You will need to gather Powder filler, Jewellery Bone, Jewellery Wood, Composite material, Ceramics and Diamond to craft the Dark Horse rune.
goalTexts: Bring Dark Horse rune to Mortimer

npc: I appreciate your help. This rune might be key to remember my past life.
This rune, the Dark Horse, it's more than just an intricate symbol. It's a key, a gateway to my past, a beacon in the fog of forgotten memories.
How is the rune crafting coming along?
I hope the crafting is not too difficult.
I can almost remember the feel of the rune...
Thank you. This rune... it brings back memories. The touch, the symbols...
You will need to gather Powder filler, Jewellery Bone, Jewellery Wood, Composite material, Ceramics and Diamond to craft the Dark Horse rune.
This is wonderful. Unfortunately, I cannot tell you why.
Simply take this reward, and ask no further questions.
Drag this rune onto an artifact for a powerful boost.
Memories of my past life are like fragmented dreams, elusive and distorted. Yet, I'm almost certain that I was a Mystic.
There's a wealth of knowledge deep within me, an understanding of the arcane and ethereal that can only belong to a Mystic.
But now, after being reborn in this undead form, even the mere act of touching the crafting table fills me with discomfort.
I ask of you, craft a rune for me. I have the recipe. It's a rune I'm certain I was deeply familiar with.
Craft this rune, let me feel its energy, and perhaps, it will unlock the door to my past, shedding light on the mysteries you seek.
I see, no hard feelings. My past is a mystery, after all.
I understand, not everyone is comfortable dealing with the undead.

name: Nature's Redemption
journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff Windreach Woods, Road house. Bring the set to the Themis at the Fort to the south west.
objectives: Themis should be easy to spot. Look for the innocent-looking guard who seems out of place. WWait, shouldn't you be at that fort? It's southwest of us in the Windreach Woods, past the train tracks. Don't forget, we're counting on you. By we, I mean me and the universe. And all my customers.
goalTexts: Bring the assembled set to Fort Themis

npc: That's cool, man. We'll vibe on without it. Peace and love!
Hey, no sweat. The universe provides, even if it's a bit slow sometimes.
He's a sweet kid but a bit naive, so you might have an easy time convincing him to give them back.
It's crucial for our cause! But, hey, you get it, right?
I've heard that Themis, the captain's son at the to the southwest might be our in.
M-m-maybe you can help me with something and prove you're cool.
I uh... can't unlock that door for you. Not unless you're one of the Lightbringer's trusted associates!
Oh, those illegal herbs? Yes, I think I saw them in the storage.
H-Hello there! Why are you talking to me?
You're a lifesaver! I just know he'll come through.
No worries, dude. Maybe next time the cosmic winds will blow our way.
Take these materials to him, and maybe we can work out a little bribe. Either that he'll turn you in... not that he would...
Wow, the captain has been complaining about the train robbery all day this would sure make da him, happy.

name: Neither Rain nor Battlefield
journal: Horace Grumbles Steppe, near East of Arid canals. Deliver the letter to Tazara south of the Dragonbane Fort.
objectives: Don't forget to deliver those letters to Tazara and Pritchard at the Dragonbane Fort.

npc: Gah, can you believe they stuck me in this uniform? I'm a postman, not a soldier!
All I wanted was to deliver mail, not march around with a rifle.
Now I'm tangled up in this military nonsense, and my routes a mess. I'm completely lost up here!
Look, I've got the last letter I need to deliver to the north right here, but if I go back I'll never be able to leave.
Think you can help an old postman out and take these letters to the recipient at the outpost south of here?
Maybe then I can get back to my proper job and leave this army business behind.
Figures. Can't rely on anyone these days.
Fine, leave an old man to do everything himself.
Suit yourself. Those kids will be waiting a long time.
Ah, finally someone reliable.
By the way, if Roddy asks about me, tell that moron I died.
If you don't I'll fuck your life up. You wanna see what happens when you stop getting bills?
I'll light every passport you ever order on fire.
Hey, you there! What's that you've got?
My report card!! This is the reason we came up here!!
Hand it over, let's see...
An 'F'? Are you FUCKING kidding me?!
That teacher is completely unfair!
Ugh, this is the worst.
Thanks for bringing it, I guess.
Oh, and what's this? A letter for Pritchard?
"Dear Pritchard, it's Mom. Please come home." Blah blah blah, wah wah wah.
We're never leaving! Killin' people is fun.
Here, take this. Maybe it'll do you some good.

name: Forest's Bounty

target.label: Dream Cathcher
target.landmark: Find the dream catcher to the south

journal: Hilda Deeproot Westwind Woods, near Forest cabin Find the dream catcher to the south. The hag doesn't think it's too far away and is probably on the ground.
objectives: I have many uses for that Glass Eye, but most importantly, they're all none of your business. Search the forest south of us, I think it fell out when I was running.

npc: This goblin stew is almost rea... ah splendid! You've returned!
Incredible! You've returned my Glass Eye. As promised, here's what I know about the crash. It was a few imps... dastardly creatures...
The culprits, they're not your usual woodland pests. They're 3 Imps, malevolent creatures causing chaos around these parts.
Keep your eyes on the ground. The Neon Mushroom has a unique glow.
There's the Witcher, lurking in the depths of Tempest Timberland. He's a vile sorcerer, wielding a severed head as twisted focus for his dark spells.
Then, we have the Firestarter, right here in Westwind Woods. He has a dangerous affinity with fire, hurling Molotov cocktails and dynamite with glee.
Lastly, the brute Executioner resides in Windreach Woods. He's a hulking menace, wielding a monstrous axe that's cleaved more than just trees.
They're the ones who orchestrated the crash, make no mistake. Tread carefully, they are as wicked as they are cunning.
Be patient, the Neon Mushrooms are elusive.
Your courage is commendable. Good luck with your search.
You bring me that Glass Eye back, and I'll tell you what you wanna know.
Am I an old hag? I suppose that's what some crude, cursing goblins call me. Let me guess... Zugg?
Find and bring me my Glass Eye, even an "old hag" tries not to scare folks.
I'm aware of the "accidents" you speak of, yet the knowledge isn't freely given.
Heed my warning, the forest is a twisted maze, with creatures lurking in the shadows. Be prepared for uninvited encounters.
I believe it's just to the south of us, lost in the forest somewhere.
I've lost my Glass Eye while fending off some imps.

name: New Quest Mount 01

goals.label: Place hoverboard on the charge station

goalTexts: Place hoverboard on the charge station

npc: letsgo ?
hello dude
accept
intro

name: New Quest Universal Ability
journal: Help me!

npc: start
Perspective
Aceptence
Decline 1
Decline 2
Decline 3
Quest intro
complete perspective

name: Brave New World - Welcome to Kwalat

goals.label: Meet with Zikk's brother in the village

journal: Follow the road north to Zikk's house.
objectives: Please speak to the outworlder welcoming specialist. He should be nearby. Don't die, and have a nice day.

Again? The forms are my house to the north, just follow the road. They're on the table outside. I'll give you more instructions once you're close. While you're at it, stop and see Maxwell while traveling north up the road. He'll teach you how to make a campfire, among other things.
Go make an official inquiry to my brother. He s at the Bureau in the center of Goldenfield. Just follow the road north and ask around when you get there.
goalTexts: Meet with Zikk's brother in the village

npc: Do you even know how many laws you've broken by coming out of this portal?
He's asking every newcomer to tell me to take his shift at the portal. No respect for his older sibling whatsoever.
There are some spare forms by my house, on the table outside. Get going and find them.
Don't try to mess with me. You gotta be registered, buddy, just like every other outworlder.
You'd think, right? Everyone's just minding their business, occupied with their crops and whatnot, WHILE I HAVE TO DEAL WITH ALL OF YOU AND YOUR FUCKING PAPERS.
Anyway, you have to be registered here. Standard procedure. I just don't have any blank forms left.
You know, you look pale. If you're gonna die, don't do it here. I'll have to deal with your body.
What is it? I'm kinda busy with all the newcomers.
At least you're honest - I don't know either.
So you're an outworlder, eh... How do you like here in Kwalat? Nice, isn't it?
Anyways, I can't do shit for you right now. We have enough useless outworlders running around here already. In fact, why don't you go join them?
Sorry you had to go through that. My... uh, brothers can be quite dumb. Especially that one.
That's why I'm here. But I ran out of forms with all of you flooding in.
So, do me a favor and scoot. My place is up north. And remember, don't even think about bothering my girlfriend. Next!
Oh... you're one of them, eh? So you've already met my clon... close relative?

name: No Witnesses to Glory

target.label: Missing Persons Poster object
target.landmark: Search Goldenfield for 5 posters

journal: Grizelda Windreach Woods, Wooden mushroom house. Search Goldenfield for 5 posters.
objectives: Goldenfield's got those infernal posters scattered about. Tug 'em off and rip 'em to shreds.

npc: There are five of those wretched posters scattered around Goldenfield. Be a dear and tear them down, will ya? And keep it hush-hush, no need for unnecessary attention.
Bloody hell! You daft or what? This is important!
Oh, for crying out loud! You don't know what you're missing!
It's all a load of cobblers, really. But these fools keep poking their noses around, causing me no end of trouble.
Those blasted posters, claiming my beloved cult members are 'missing'. Ha! They're not missing, they've 'ascended', damn it!
Before I share anything, you'll need to help me with a little problem. A problem these damn busybodies have caused with their bloody posters!
And to do that, you have to complete... uh... our initiation tests! Yes...
Oh dearie, you want to know my secret to interdimensional travel? You'll have to join my cult - er, church - first.
Here's your well-deserved reward. If you want our secret, you'll have to keep ascending!
Consider yourself promoted! You're now officially a 'Mushroom Minion, Level One'!
Damn it! Enjoy living your boring, clueless life.
Well, bugger me sideways! You actually did it!
For crying out loud, tell me you got those fucking posters!
Alright, love, you're in! Now, get out there and rip those bloody posters down.

name: Nuts for the Stew
journal: Fenwick "Fen" Harrow Westwind Woods, Sawmill Workers yard. Take the batteries and put them in the generators around camp, then turn on the main transformer.
objectives: Get those generators up and running with those batteries... then uh... shit... Oh yeah... stop and see Dusty.

npc: Can't remember what you're saying no to, but it's fine!
Changed your mind already? Happens to me all the time!
Anyway, man, Grommuk was actually just asking about you...
Thank you, friend. Hopefully, Grommuk doesn't try to bang those generators.
Take the batteries over there and put them in the generators. After those are juiced up, come back and turn on the main transformer.
Surely, this will get the sawmill back on track. I just hope Grommuk doesn't try doing anything to the generators...
Oh, wow, look at that power output!
Great man... get those generators and transformer up and running and stop by Oakley "Dusty" Fenn, he'll be glad to hear the news.
Weird, right?
Decline what, again? Oh, wait, I remember now. It's alright.
Whoa, hey there! Didn't expect you.
Might be safer for you with Grommuk that way.
These batteries will actually end up being very useful. On the west side of camp there are three generators that could use these.

name: Obscured Intentions
journal: Penny "Stardust" Furbank Reverie Hollow, Open air dining area. Search the gallows in Reverie Hollow for Penny's bong that has the deed hidden inside.
objectives:
Hey, life's a trip, right? And so is finding that deed. 
- Probably near the gallows... or maybe I imagined that? Anyway, enjoy the vibes!

npc: No worries, friend. I've lost more than just deeds in my time.
Heh, good call... I can barely remember where I am, let alone the deed.
Yeah, yeah, I get it. I'm not exactly a paragon of reliability right now.
You go get it while I search the Dreads, ok? And bring it to Lingua.
Honestly, my brain's more scrambled than a broken synthwave track.
Anyway, the deed's probably near the gallows and torture platform. Maybe I stashed it in my bong.
My, uh, my memory's a bit hazy right now, ya know? Must've been that last trip to dreamland... or the bong.
But now I have to go get that evidence from the Dreads you killed.
Alright, listen up. I was supposed to guard this super important deed.
And if you want a device for your portal, you're going to help us...
What, don't look at me like that! You don't know what it's like here.
Don't blame you, really I'm a bit of a mess right now.
I guess that's pretty convenient, given I'm helping Lana.
Penny had you bring me the deed?
Uh, you need something?
Alright, alright. So, I might've messed up. Again. The deed s probably near the gallows. Off you go!

name: Off With The Head... Again!
journal: Kill a boss monster anywhere on the island.
objectives: Kill a boss mob on the island... Any of em... I don't care!

npc: And it's a REAL tunnel. I'm NOT making a pass at you.
Aw yes! Glorious revenge! Heh heh heh.
You pull your pants up, get out there, and kill one of those boss mobs. I don't care which one. Just do it.
Hey! Hey come back here! I'll bite your legs off!
Hey... Hey you... DOWN HERE.
You looking for a way outta here? I can provide.
Splendid, get out there and make me... well not proud... but... content... Make me content.
The beasts of this island mauled and ravaged me after killing my guards. I want revenge.
Good, you've chosen correctly, I would want to have to gnaw your legs off!
Come back here, and I'll let you through a secret underground tunnel. Deal?
You may be wondering how I ended up like this... I was once like you... Well... not a peasant, but a King.
Well, go on now... In you go.
Yes... wonderful. I can smell the fresh blood.
That's the wrong answer!
You weak pathetic... pathetic... peasant!

name: Oil Be Back

target.label: Machine oil
target.landmark: Search crates, chests and barrels around Goldenfield for the spare machine parts

target.label: Barrells and Trash Cans
target.landmark: Search crates, chests and barrels around Goldenfield for the spare machine parts

journal: Quadro-Sentinel 4.0 Goldenfield, Fields of Goldenfield. Search crates, chests and barrels around Goldenfield for the spare machine parts.
objectives: I must repair my systems. Search barrels, crates, and chests around the fields for spare machine parts. Machine oil is located near trucks. They won't miss it.

npc: Return to me with haste. I must continue my route.
You are doing the correct action. Now go.
Have you completed your simple mission humanoid?
Mission finished: Turning off defenses. Target: Friendly.
Action Request: Please oil my new gear deep.
Hello humanoid. Quadro-Sentinel 4.0 s systems are starting to wear down. Require maintenance.
Please gather extra machine parts from chests and barrels around the fields or I may not notice your documentation.
Well, that s unfortunate. Hope you don't run into any security issues.
Help me if you want to live.
Papers undetected... undocumented portal jumper! Activating defenses....
I require fresh machine oil and machine parts to continue to keep Goldenfield safe from intruders.
Machine oil can be picked up around trucks in Goldenfield. Must receive... sweet nectar.

name: Package Pilfered

target.label: Sharp Hook
target.landmark: Kill fungus around the Windreach Woods

target.label: Limping Bugger
target.landmark: Kill fungus around the Windreach Woods

target.label: Sting Spanner
target.landmark: Kill fungus around the Windreach Woods

journal: Rusty Bowen Windreach Woods, Railway stop near Fort. Kill fungus around the Windreach Woods.
objectives: Get your ass moving, those fungi aren't gonna hunt themselves. Those sneaky little jerks are somewhere in the Windreach Woods. Shouldn't be far.

npc: I figured you'd wimp out.
That ass at the fort is making all of us totally legal dealers work with him to continue our business.
Get your ass out in the Windreach Woods and kill a Sting Spanner, Limping Bugger and Sharp Hook.
Fine, leave me hanging. Sleep with one eye open tonight.
I'm knee-deep in garbage as it is, so drag your ass to Windreach Woods and take out these creepy bastards.
Now that I know I can trust you, I can get you what you need...
Oh dear, did you - deliver that package?
Oh wow, I'm so surprised. Fuckin' pussy.
Oh gosh, you actually did it?
Thank you so much, I was so worried! My father said that was his special medicine!
Alright, you've got guts. Don't fuck it up though.
Those idiots are the fort made me a deal... I get this and I take care of some fungus for them. Well, you're up junior.

name: Pages to Protect
journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff Windreach Woods, Road house. Find Draven at the parking spot southeast of the fort. Balthazar hangs around the road house.
objectives: Hey, remember, those pages... Draven Torvik and Balthazar might have 'em. Balthazar should be like, just around here! And Draven... he's just south of the fort.

npc: Wait, you're saying no? That's.... awesome.
Draven should be southwest, at the parking spot with his bike. Balthazar will be scheming around the roadhouse.
I just hope it's nothing sexual. Unless you're like, into that. I'm not into that... Are you into that?
Whoa, whoa... Why the buzzkill, man?
They're probably gonna make you do some weird stuff to get them back.
Draven Torvik and Balthazar have them. Or was it someone else? No, no, it was definitely them.
Oh wow, yeah, I remember... I think I know where some more book pages are, man.
Let's get this thing translated, and we can find this groovy artifact...
Eh, that's ok. You can tell me about it later.
Whoa, dude, you did it. Did they make you do any weird sex stuff?
You've returned! Cowabunga dude!
Groovy, man. Let's make Mother Nature proud.
Huh? Really? That's like, not cool, man. Not cool.

name: Pass the Butter

target.label: Mushrooms
target.landmark: Take the jar and collect Noxious Spores from purple mushrooms

goals.label: Combine Noxious Spores it into a poison

journal: QUEST-O-TRON Windreach Woods, Camp near the shrine. Take the jar and collect Noxious Spores from purple mushrooms. Once you get enough, combine it into a poison.
objectives: Rick's Fisher House: It's just south of the Destroyed Bridge. Noxious Spores, poison, yum yum. DO IT NOW. It's not rocket science, moron.
goalTexts: Combine Noxious Spores it into a poison

npc: Guess I'll do it myself, you useless bucket of bones.

Collect Noxious Spores from purple mushrooms. They usually just plop out on the ground. Stuff them in this container. Once you get all the spores in there, shake it up really well... it'll make the ultimate poison! Then.... HE WILL FINALLY DIE!
Are you freaking kidding me? Ugh, whatever.
Of course you'd chicken out. Pathetic.
I'm going to poison the fuck outta him!
Bet you can guess what it is from the items I had you get...
So, meatbag, you're back. Ready for phase two of my master plan?
Poisonous mushroom spores? You insult me. All this is, is an okay laxative. Pathetic...
About fucking time someone stepped up. Don't screw this up, or I'll scrap you myself.
Seriously? You're softer than a wet tissue.
You've got guts, kid. Or maybe it's just stupidity.
I gather you're trying to get the secret to my portal travel. Let's cut a deal, dumb dumb.
Oh, the tin can's at it again, huh? Ha! That's rich!
Hey, genius! You think that robot is actually pulling this off?

name: Percival's Restorative Ointment
journal: Percival "Percy" Beamish Goldenfield, Alcemy crafting yard Search for the flasks around the center of Goldenfield. The syringe has got to be around here close.
objectives: Remember, I need those flasks. These ingredients are key. They ve got to be hanging around town somewhere!

npc: Did you manage to gather the ingredients?
Here's your reward. You ve really saved a lot of people! Lord knows what would have happened if someone actually drank one of those flasks anyways
Fantastic! Let's get started.
Your assistance is greatly appreciated.
Wonderful! With your help, we're sure to succeed.
You've nailed it!
Remember, a stitch in time saves nine, but your help saved my behind. Thanks!
I've been working on a new alchemical recipe that could really help our community. It s called the Restorative Ointment.
There's a yellow one, a purple one and a blue one. They ve got to be around town somewhere though. Check tables and shelves!
Your help would mean a lot, not just to me, but to the folks here in Goldenfield. Could you lend a hand?
To make this work, I'll need three flasks that I ve already brewed. However, they got labeled wrong and accidentally sent out to people in town.
Oh, that's too bad. Maybe next time.
I understand, it s quite a task. But do reconsider if you get the chance.
No worries, friend. The offer stands if you change your mind.
Find those flasks and lastly, I need a new syringe. I m sure there s one around here somewhere. Look around the tables here.

name: Phantom Fragment Recovery
journal: Clanker Windreach Woods, Falling planes. Find Buck in Goldenfield and talk to him.
objectives: Hey, where's that kid with the artifact? Find that little shit already - he's in the Violet Weed Fields in Goldenfield. I don't want the artifact back, I just want justice.

npc: No worries, more time for my herbal adventures.
Alright, your loss. Guess I'll just roll another blunt.
And maybe smack him upside the head too, the little ass...
You look like someone who can track him down and recover the artifact.
Last I heard, the same fuckin' prankster was spotted in the Violet Weed Fields, smack dab in the middle of Goldenfield.
The problem is, a mischievous kid made off with it. That little shit!
So, to answer your question - I found a fragment of an ancient artifact while wandering around the Falling Planes.
Ah, finally! Smoke machines aren't the only key ingredient for pretending to be a ghost...
And unless you want me to tell an adult you came and yelled at me, you're gonna help!
It must be that damn Lily Baxter, framing me again.
Cool, more weed for me. Happy trails!
I didn't steal shit! I didn't fuckin' do this!
Arti... whati?
You find that artifact, you keep it. I don't give a shit.

name: Genetically Gifted

target.label: Boars
target.landmark: Kill boarmammoth in the Skylight Grasslands

journal: Butch O'Hara Goldenfield, near Pig farm Kill boarmammoth in the Skylight Grasslands.
objectives: Head up to the Skylight Grasslands. Kill some boars and collect their insides for me. It's tough work, but someone's gotta do it.

npc: Got this theory. I reckon I can crossbreed my pigs with the boarmammoths up in the grasslands.
Don't come back without them innards.
Remember, Skylight Grasslands. Can't miss 'em.
Hows the material coming along?
Attaboy. Now, don't get squeamish on me.
Well, I'll be... You did it. Let's get to breedin'.
Not you and me, of course - you're reward is of the financial variety.
Now you can call yourself a regular butcher. Just not near my customers.
If it works, I'll have myself a new breed of super-pig. Imagine the size of the ribs on that beast!
Think you can head up to the Skylight Grasslands and collect me some material?
Of course, I'm gonna need some boarmammothr genetic material. That's where you come in.
Head up to the Skylight Grasslands and bring back some boarmammoth genetic materials.
What, you chicken?
Guess you ain't got the gonads after all.
That's a damn shame.

name: Page 1: Plague - Frogs
journal: Strike not the healthy, but those who decay.
objectives: Focus on the tainted, leave the pure, while on the island.

name: Portal Perils

target.label: Timber
target.landmark: Kill timbers around the forest

journal: Driscoll-99 Westwind Woods, Old Portal. Kill timbers around the forest.
objectives: Don't forget, we need those Timbers DEAD to move forward! Get the amber off their corpses, and bring it back to me. You can also get it without killing, but that doesn't seem fun! It's a vital ritual for restarting the portal. Try not to get any Timber splinters in an open wound!

npc: Spiffy! Go squeeze some blood from a log!
Now if you hear screams, don't worry, it's just the portal warming up.
Haha, you're back, and not a scratch on you! Or is that your blood?
Well, I'll find out if the portal doesn't open.
Hey hey, look who's back! How was the bloodbath?
In the meantime, let's move to the next ritual!
Is this my [Herbal delivery]? Excellent! This is my first time using [herbal] supplement.
You're looking for a special artifact piece? Well, good news! I have what you're looking for.
You see, the old portal here has been malfunctioning ever since it got destroyed in that 'incident.
I need a very peculiar rituals to get things back in shape. A lot of them involve killing and blood!
Right now, I need you to collect 5 amber by murdering Timbers!
Help me, and I'll give you what you want. Is this a [deal]?
Oh, no worries! I guess wrestling with demons wasn't on your to-do list today!
That's fine! Perhaps you're saving your heroics for another time.
Of course, take your time! Portal fixing isn't everyone's cup of tea, after all!
No problem! I'm sure the portal and its little monsters won't mind waiting.

name: Portal Purge Parade

target.label: Dendroid
target.landmark: Search the area and kill the monsters

target.label: Timber
target.landmark: Search the area and kill the monsters

target.label: Spider
target.landmark: Search the area and kill the monsters

journal: Driscoll-99 Weswind Woods, Old Portal. Search the area and kill the monsters.
objectives: Hehehe, these creatures are just itching to meet you! Seek them out and remember it s all in the name of balance, right? Kill a Dendroid, a Spider, and a Timber.

npc: Hehe, more for me, then! I ll have to go introduce myself to the local residents in a... more personal way.
Well, butter my gears and call me rusty, that s a no-go then!
Ah, the thrill of bloodshed shall wait for another day!
Oh, don't worry. I'll just find someone else with a taste for chaos and carnage.
I'm talking a Dendroid, a Spider, and a Timber.
Your exhilarating task is to hunt these particular beings and bring me their essence. One of each, please!
FINALLY. We can finally restore balance and OPEN. THE. PORTAL. Right after one more thing.
The creatures of Kwalat need to be...ahem, sacrificed. We must commend them for their contribution and then, well, remove them from existence!
Enjoy!
Oh shit, nothing happened.
Uh, in exchange for not hurting me, why don't you uh... take this artifact piece and never tell anyone about this.
NIKTO!
KLAATU...
What a shame! The portal will just have to dream of its grand reopening a bit longer.
BARADA...
With these words, I'll open the portal and kill. you. all!
You fool! You don't know what you have done! MUAHAHA!
FINALLY! NOW THE RITUAL CAN BEGIN!
Splendid! A little massacre always brightens the mood!

name: Portal Restorations

target.label: Spiders
target.landmark: Head northeast past Goldenfield to the Ripplecrop Fields, south of Riverrise and kill spiders

journal: Driscoll-99 Westwind Woods, Old Portal. Head northeast past Goldenfield to the Ripplecrop Fields, south of Riverrise and kill spiders.
objectives: Just a reminder, friend - I need those 10 Spiders DEAD to keep my dreams alive! Kill, kill kill, so my dreams live, live live! Or just make some strong thread yourself. Your choice!

npc: You need a break from all this juicy excitement? Understandable, but I'll be here when you are ready!
No worries, brave friend! I'll keep count of all the blood we're not harvesting today!
Oh dear, no heroic bloodletting today? Maybe next time!
I suppose the spiders can enjoy keeping their blood a bit longer. Lucky them!
Off you go, brave soul, and harvest their gruesome gifts!
The idea of that rich, crimson spider blood flowing makes my circuits tingle with excitement!
Oh, the thrill of squishing a spider! It's like a walk in the park, if the park was full of deadly arachnids!
And for the cause of bringing me 5 strong thread. Absolutely heartwarming!
Haha, maybe I'll just take a vial of your blood for the cause... kidding, of course! Unless...?
Picture this: you, heroically defeating spiders and draining their blood, all for the grand cause of portal restoration!
Now we just need to bathe ourselves in one final sacrifice, and our efforts will be rewarded!
Splendid! With all that spider blood spilled, we can almost hear the portal humming! Take this for your efforts.
Huzzah! Another step closer to our blood-soaked dream!
Oh, you're back! Did you paint the woods red for me?

name: Grizzly Shiny Glory

target.label: Imp
target.landmark: Embark on a daring adventure to unearth Rubies and Diamonds hidden deep within the Westwind Woods

journal: Grizzle Ironfoot Westwind Woods, near the Old mine Embark on a daring adventure to unearth Rubies and Diamonds hidden deep within the Westwind Woods.
objectives: I know those imps got em' out there. Check their camps and their corpses!

npc: I knew ya had the spirit of a miner in ya! Godspeed on your quest!
Remember, the earth doesn't give up her secrets easily.
Got a good feeling about this. You'll find those gems!
By the beard of the Ancients, you've done it!
How's the Grizzly Shiny hunt going?
God damn it to all hell, I've been robbed. I know it was them imps too!
Keep an eye out for my Grizzly Shinies. I'm sure they got em' sitting around their camp or they're holding on to em'!
My Grizzly Shinies, I had them all nice and stacked away and I walk out today and they're gone! Just... gone!
You ever dealt with those imps before? They're nasty, but I tell ya, if you got it in ya, I would happily purchase your services.
Those imps are crawling around the Westwind Forest. Kill em’, and get my damned Grizzly Shinies back!
The miner's life ain't for everyone.
Aye, it's a tough path. No shame in turning back.
Can't force a man to face the earth. The call's gotta come from within.
If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
I'll uh... hang on to these for now. Here's equivalent payment.

name: Price of Punishment

target.label: Boarmammoth(10-15)  or more
target.landmark: Search for boars in the woods west of Riverrise, past the fields

journal: Ace Riverrise, City Center. Search for boars in the woods west of Riverrise, past the fields.
objectives: Tick-tock, baby. Boars aren't gonna fly into your lap and cut themselves open for you, and neither will I. Hustle!

npc: Cute and clueless, just the way I like my rejects.
I'm not telling you anything...
Go find some guts and we might talk. Until then, buzz off.
Well, well, well. Look who's back. Ready to be... dominated?
Oh, bless your heart, you actually got 'em. But guess what, honey?
Bless your naive little heart! Off you go, you little intestine digger. Don't keep Mama waiting
Well, I guess I didn't ask. But asking is Spade's job.
Now, get out of my sight.
You've been dominated. That's what you wanted when you paid, right?
Oh darling, you think offering help is enough to get a taste of my services? How adorable.
Velvet Viper's Girls demand payment, and I'm talking bloody work, not compliments.
What's the matter, sugar? You look confused. You should look grateful.
Oh honey, if you can't handle the heat, stay out of my dungeon.
You'll find plenty of boars in the forests west of Riverrise.
I think some boar guts should do. Fresh ones. Bring me those, and we'll see if you're worth my time. That ll show us you have some kanones

name: Proof of Purification

target.label: Glimmering Mushrooms
target.landmark: Help Ludwig gather ammo northeast past the Candlewick Slums!

journal: Ludwig Stoncap Steppe, Dragonbane fort. Help Ludwig gather ammo northeast past the Candlewick Slums! The mushrooms are directly east of the ammo.
objectives: Tick-tock fucko! Search for ammo to the northeast, past the Candlewick Slums. There should be a spot between two big sand dunes. Directly east from there, you should find a patch of mushrooms.

npc: Hurry! Ammo crates! Mushrooms! Surely you can gather some around here somewhere, right?
Hey there! Are you real or just another figment? Haha, either way, let's talk!
No mushrooms? No bullets? Guess I'll just juggle grenades for fun!
You got the shrooms? Been waiting so long I'd have shot myself if I had ammo.
Help me gather supplies, and together we'll make the wasteland sing!
I'm out of boom-sticks and shiny shrooms! Can't fend off the invisible squirrels without them!
The Light guides us, but a few Glimmering Mushrooms make its voice so much clearer!
Bullets and mushrooms! Bullets and mushrooms! Let's make the wasteland sing!
Haha! You're saying no? Or am I hearing colors again? Either way, the mission continues!
Turning me down? Bold move! Just watch out for the carnivorous turtles!
No worries! I'll chat with the shadow people instead they always listen!
Denied? Delightful! More fun for me!
YES YES YES! Perfect.
Now the real war can begin! Hahaha!
Don't worry, I'll tell uh... Matty? Gloober? Barnaby?
I'll tell that fucko in charge you helped! HELPED ME KILL!

name: Proving Loyalties

target.label: Armored Hyena Alpha
target.landmark: Kill the Ravager Hyena around the area to earn favor with Zor

journal: Zor Steppe, Fisher's camp. Kill the Ravager Hyena around the area to earn favor with Zor.
objectives: Kill Ravager Hyena. Strong, rabid beast.

npc: Now we will work together to stop the Lightbearer's once and for all.
You have proven yourself worthy of my trust.
You return. Done what was asked?
Without action, secrets remain secrets.
Perhaps another day.
Trust cannot be built on hesitation.
Let us see what you are capable of.
Good. Begin your journey with my friends, and we shall speak again.
Kill Ravager Hyena. Strong, rabid beast. King released them to kill us, then they went wild.
You must prove you are strong enough to walk this path. Cannot give false hope to my people.
You want to save Zor and desert?
Take this ancient trinket it is a key to the knowledge you seek.

name: Proving the Steel

target.label: Corpses (Chests)
target.landmark: Gather Lightbearer Badges east outside Great Bones Village, between the roads

journal: Steel Stan Steppe, Great Bones. Gather Lightbearer Badges east outside Great Bones Village, between the roads.
objectives: The badges can be collected from fallen Lightbearers east outside the Great Bones Village.

npc: These badges are exactly what I need.
I could use your help collecting a few Lightbearer Badges from the warzone.
Amazing! You actually did it!
It's not about deception it's about keeping their spirit alive and continuing their good work.
Did you get the badges I asked for?
You're back!
Suit yourself. I thought you were different.
I just know I have what it takes to be one of them, to bring hope to others.
Ever since I can remember, I've dreamed of joining the Lightbearers and making a real difference.
Well, if you change your mind, you know where to find me.
Alright, I see how it is.
Fine, I guess I'll have to find someone else.
Awesome! We're on our way to making a real difference!
This is just the beginning I can feel great things ahead!
Fantastic! Together, we'll show the Lightbearers what we're truly capable of!
Yes! I knew I could count on you!
Thank you. With this, I can finally prove myself.
And if I get in, I can put in a good word with Barnaby for you!
I bet at least one of them looks enough like me that I can uh... carry on in their honor.
Here, take this cloak as a token of my appreciation.
Wish me luck!
If I can find the badges of those who've fallen, maybe I can honor their legacy and uh... step into their place.
They haven't seen my potential yet, but I won't let that stop me.
Let's just, uh, keep this between us... for now.

name: Brave New World - Welfare Program
journal: Zugg Clankwhistle Goldenfield, near the Bureau Go east across the street to the welfare kitchen.
objectives: Head to Martha's welfare kitchen and get yourself a handout. Maybe afterwards, get yourself killed.

npc: Head to Martha's welfare kitchen, it’s just across the street and get yourself a handout. Maybe afterwards, get yourself killed.
Hey there sugar. Come on down to my Kitchen and we'll get you taken care of, ok?
Zugg told you to come over here? That dang rat... always passin' off trouble.
By law, each newcomer is supposed to get several loaves of bread. That's the Newcomer Welfare Program of Elan for ya.
But honey, I'm too busy cooking for everyone.
So how' bout I teach you to cook some bread? Be a little more independent, ya know?
You'll need to bring me some Wheat Flour, which you can make yourself from 3 handfuls of Wheat seeds.
I'll add a little bit of my special spice, and give ya' one hell of a recipe!

name: Puzzles of the Afterlife

goals.label: Deliver the Gull Saddle to Captain Barnaby

journal: Captain Barnaby Plank Riverrise, City Pier Find the ghost on Prison Island, solve his puzzle and return to Captain Barnaby Plank with the item.
objectives: Still working on that puzzle? Stay calm and pay attention.
goalTexts: Find the ghost on Prison Island
Retrieve your prize from the ghost
Deliver the Gull Saddle to Captain Barnaby

npc: Well, how did you fare?
I bet a ghost I could hit him... I KNOW. I was foolish!
Captain Rob's Gull Saddle is... well... was lost.
No worries, I'll manage... eventually.
Ah, afraid of a little skull, are ya?
Aye, that's the spirit!
Disappointing. Come back when you are actually prepared.
Ye' see, I made a bad bet. I admit, was foolish.
Excellent. Free your mind, ready your brain.
The test is prepared. Are you ready to begin?
Until next time, mortal.
Here is the Gull Saddle
Suit yourself, but don't come looking for a share when I find the loot!
I had to end up giving him the item that Captain Rob gave me for safekeeping.
I reckon if you go to Prison Island, and find the ghost... you may be able to win the item back.
You did it! By the Seven Seas, you won!
Perhaps the sea isn't in your veins after all.
I knew you had it in you.
Here are some brand new reins for a fine beast, mate! You've earned it.
I'm not going to have much use for it anyways, I belong to the sea.
Impressive. I did not expect a mortal to express such intelligence.
You have earned my respect, and more importantly, won my game.
You've come on behalf of Captain Barnaby?
If you wish to earn the saddle back... You must play my game.
Seek the skulls on the star, and remember the sequence of the flashes.
If you win, I'll reward you. If you fail... You should exercise your mind.

name: Quelling the Rage
journal: Return to Zor at Fisher's Camp to figure out a solution to the Lightbearer's Artifact.
objectives: Take the information of the artifact s location to Zor at the Fisher s Camp.

npc: Artifact cause big troubles, make hearts wild, yes?
You outsiders touch things not understand.
But Zor knows, Zor can help calm shiny trouble.
Need special crystal, but Zor's old one lost.
You bring Lumino Moss from Dead Forest.
With moss, Zor make new Calming Crystal for you.
No help? Then chaos grows, not Zor's concern.
Maybe you think better next time.
Without moss, no calm comes.
Good, good. Go quickly, time is tricky thing.
Find Lumino Moss, we fix problem.
They use as excuse to steal more artifacts from us...
Lightbearers have artifact. Causes my people to attack in blind fury.
Just what suspected.
You bring robot data?
You must stop them. Please.

name: Questionable Evidence
journal: Quaridor Vex Windstone Village, Guard's place: west. Search forest camps to the west for a large jug that might have Triton's mask.
objectives: Search around the docks, or head south and check the trees for vases.
Head west on the other side of the lake and check the forest camps for vases that may have Triton s mask.

npc: Isn't there a way you could change your mind?
Would you rather let Triton roam free and do as he pleases?
What if Triton continues his actions? Can you live with that?
Really? Are you turning down a cursed guard's plea?
Did you know Baxton is a lawyer, stupid?
Have you figured out that you need to get that mask, and bring it to Baxton?
You'd think that mask would help a lot in a legal case against him, right?
Would you believe that such a mask could allow him to sneak into the village unnoticed? Maybe even make him look human?
Have you ever heard rumors about Triton's mask?
Maybe you can help me deliver the final summons.
How will you feel if Triton harms another baby?
After all, I was a stone-skipper for so long - I've only been a lawyer for a week.
I've been waiting for a chance to flex my legal muscles outside of a history book.
Ah, there you are! I heard you've got some evidence.
Are you sure you can be trusted, fuckface?
Oh, you've found it! Hand it over, let's see if my unofficial lawyering can actually make a difference.
Triton likes to hide his stuff, we suspect it’s hidden in a vase. Where? That’s a little harder. I would search Windreach Woods west of here.
Go west and search around the forest camps for a vase. Don t go further than the road though.

name: Venomous Voyage

target.label: Fungus ( 8 lvl )
target.landmark: Search for Fungus camps in the Windreach Woods

journal: Grizzle Ironfoot Westwind Woods, near the Old mine Search for Fungus camps in the Windreach Woods.
objectives: Get your hands on some venom! Those gross-looking fungus creatures are loaded with the stuff.

npc: By the way, you should probably stop in for a drink, you ve earned it.
Remember, it's not just about the find. It's about getting back in one piece.
By the stone! You've found it! This will surely revolutionize our research.
Any luck finding that venom?
It s going to be a matter of life or death, so just think of the rewards when you re thinking about quitting!
I'll send that part over to Ratchet.
Aye, that's the spirit! Just remember, we're dealing with venom. This stuff is dangerous, as are the creatures wielding it.
Here's a little something for your contribution to the cause!
Ah, Ratchet sent ya? I've got the part he's lookin' for, but I need a favor first.
I've found a way to get some very potent venom, and it would surely be useful to a person of your caliber.
It's tickling me whiskers with its potential! However, getting it is the difficult part.
Find some Fungus camps in the Windreach Woods and remember to wear gloves! The venom is very strong.
If ya think you've got the grit, it'd be a boon to our research.
Well, can't say I blame ya. It's a dangerous game, flirting with death.
Aye, it's a bit much. Not all of us are cut out for this sort of stuff.
That's okay. It's a risky job, and I won't hold it against ya.
How're ya holding up? Back broke yet?

name: Rat-ical Blockchain Solutions

target.label: Trap without rat
target.landmark: Pick-up mouse traps from the field, then find some of the rat corpses

target.label: Trap with rat
target.landmark: Pick-up mouse traps from the field, then find some of the rat corpses

journal: Zoltar Blipchain Goldenfield, near Wheat tent. Pick-up mouse traps from the field, then find some of the rat corpses.
objectives: Pick up those traps for me around the field! There s bound to be some rat corpses in em !

npc: Fantastic! Let's get started. Together, we can make this dream a reality.
These rat traps will do wonders for 'BlockGrains'. We're one step closer to the moon!
Brilliant! My invention worked!
Here's your reward for a job well done.
Ah, there you are! Well? Did they work?
Thank you, traveler. Your assistance is invaluable.
Ah, brave traveler! These mutated rats are creating havoc on my beloved wheat farm.
I set some out in the fields the last night. Can you do me a favor and go around and collect them and any dead rats that may be in them?
I will call it... A RAT TRAP... patent pending.
What a bummer! Those mutated rats won t wait forever, you know.
No worries, friend. If you reconsider, I'll be right here waiting.
Understandable, but don t leave me hanging if you change your mind!

I've got an idea to keep those creatures at bay. I've constructed my own rat-catching device. This simple piece of machinery uses a powerful spring to snap a bar whenever the rats press on the counterbalance!

name: Rehearsed Sabotage

target.label: Ribbit Champion
target.landmark: Search the Creeping Marsh to the north, just above the top of the river

journal: Blorp Knurt Riverrise, Scene. Search the Creeping Marsh to the north, just above the top of the river.
objectives: EXCUSE ME? Are you DEAF?! I said 5 HOSTAGES THAT NEED YOUR HELP! CAN'T you FIND them? Check the CREEPING MARSH to the north, just above the top of the river.

npc: So, I've come up with a BRILLIANT plan. I recruited FIVE people to group up and take our problem to the LOCAL GOVERNMENT!
Problem is... these five BRILLIANT people got themselves kidnapped by er... bunnies... RABBITS! Whatever!
Oh, FINALLY! Someone who UNDERSTANDS the ISSUE! Let's get those folks back, QUICKLY!
EXCUSE ME?! DID YOU SAY something? Speak UP, young one!
Oh, you ACTUALLY did it! I can t BELIEVE it!
Here s a little something for your HARD WORK... and my sanity.
But LISTEN, these earplugs are for YOU, not just ME.
Soon... NEITHER of us will need them
I've received word that a RABBIT CHAMPION has the key to these hostages. GET THEM BACK.
I suppose I could GIVE YOU SOMETHING for the effort.
WHAT did you say? CAN'T you SEE I'm BUSY here?
Excuse me, are you DEAF? You DON'T UNDERSTAND the GRAVITY of THIS SITUATION.
No THANKS! I'll just DEAL WITH IT myself, LIKE ALWAYS.
Oh great, ANOTHER USELESS person who won't HELP ME!
Why are you even STANDING HERE? Get LOST if you won't ASSIST ME!
You know, the NOISE from that concert stage is RUINING my life! I've TRIED talking to them... CAN you even HEAR ME?

name: Reluctant Reinforcement
journal: Biff "Dozer" Bromley Steppe, Central Fort. Biff "Dozer" Bromley demands that you fulfill the duties of the recruits you scared off. Head west to the Great Steppe Stronghold and Western Fort. The Northsteppe Fort is east from Biff.
objectives: Volunteer Army, Lightbearers, Ecological Team they're all expecting you. Get hoofin' to those outposts!

npc: Oh, turning down an opportunity like this? I thought someone with your potential would be eager to rise through the ranks.
Biff made you do WHAT?
Don't just stand there! Double time, move, move, move!
Maybe you can actually help hold this line.
I can't believe it worked. You actually got them all to agree to work together?
Since you scared them off, you're gonna take their place, understood?
I see you're playing hard to get. Very clever. Just imagine the influence you could wield if you joined us.
Hmm, perhaps I misjudged you. I assumed a person of your caliber wouldn't shy away from greatness.
Just last week the Lightbearers were threatening to execute the volunteers.
Well, son - this is a cause for mucho celebration, you get me?

After helping Barnaby, get your sorry self to the Volunteer Army at Western Fort double time - and check in with Roddy! You're not going to believe this, but you keep heading west, past the Dragonbane Lakes.
And don't forget the Ecological Team at Northsteppe Fort they need all the help they can get! Especially Rancor K'Zar. From here, it's the next fort over to the east.
Haul it to the Lightbearers at Great Steppe Stronghold directly west from here. They're expecting you! Talk to Barnaby Thorn.
Think you can just waltz in here and cause chaos? Well, now you owe me!
My buddy Tor, the outpost manager, has been trying to get those damn groups to work together and protect the frontier.
LET'S PARTY!
You get each to sign a statement of cooperation, and maybe we won't execute you for sabotage!
You better listen up! You ran off my recruits, and now we're in a real bind!
I've been expecting someone to step up.

name: Resurrection Research

target.label: Hyena Alpha
target.landmark: Collect Conductive Bones from the Hyena Alpha, Elastic Bands from the Scolopendras

target.label: Scolopendra
target.landmark: Collect Conductive Bones from the Hyena Alpha, Elastic Bands from the Scolopendras

journal: Madame Mirage Steppe, Western fort. Collect Conductive Bones from the Hyena Alpha, Elastic Bands from the Scolopendras. Deliver the items to Zeke Thompson at the Northsteppe Fort to ze east.
objectives: You need to fetch ze Conductive Bones from... hm, ze Alpha Hyena, oui? Ze Elastic Bands from zose wiggly Scolopendras! A child could do it! Take ze items to Zeke. He s at ze Northsteppe Fort to ze east.

npc: Feel free to stick around could use a little more help.
But I'll still need a couple more parts.
With this stuff, I can whip that respawn gizmo into shape faster than a hot knife through butter!
Explains why some of them folks ain't coming back quite right.
Well, butter my biscuit! The revive beacon is down?
Howdy, partner! You bring me those shiny bits from the front?
Tres bien! I do not need assistance from someone who cannot recognize brilliance!
Allez! Off you go! Ze safety of ze Bastion depends on my brilliance and your swift return!
Non? Hmph! I shall succeed without your insignificant help!
Bah! You refuse ze privilege of aiding ze great Madame Mirage? Your loss!
Ah, magnifique! You are fortunate to aid someone as talented as moi!
Excellent. Every moment counts against the encroaching Flesh.
May your journey be swift and your efforts fruitful.
Avec ces items, Zeke Thompson can fix the beacon! But he is in another fort. Fort Northsteppe?
Hey there! Got something interesting for me?
If it isn't my favorite parts scavenger!
Fetch ze Conductive Bones from ze bumbling Alpha Hyena, and Elastic Bands from those wriggly Scolopendras. Take ze materials to Zeke Thompson at the Northsteppe Fort.
So now, I need you to be fixing the respawner beacon, yes?
And uh... zere are some claims I am ah fraud! Non....
You see, I am uh... have some magical troubles bringing back ze dead.
I am happy to assist Brother Thad! However, I require some... minor help first.

name: Revenge of the Rabbit

target.label: Wolf Alpha
target.landmark: Kill an Alpha Wolf for their brain

goals.label: Clone a brain and get a double Wolf Alpha brain.
Clean the double brain Wolf Alpha

journal: Buck Goldenfield, Violet Weed Field. Kill an Alpha Wolf for their brain. Head to Zugg's to use the cloning machine. Then, head to the farm to the south east near Energizer-21 and clean them up in the tub. Lastly, search for a skeleton in Suncrest Fields off the fork in the road to the south east outside of town.
objectives: Collect brain of an Wolf Alpha
Hey, dummy! Did you forget the Alpha Wold brain!? Kill those things in the forest, duh! What's taking so long? Hurry up, I need those brains for my prank!
goalTexts: Clone a brain and get a double Wolf Alpha brain.
Clean the double brain Wolf Alpha

npc: Fine! Be a boring butt! I'll tell everyone you're a big meanie!
You're just a poopyhead! I didn't wanna play with you anyway!
We're gonna scare the jeepers out of her! We need to go big. Like Alpha Wolf big! Kil one in the forest and get its brain!

After you get an Alpha Wolf brain, go to the annoying goblin's office. He's got a cloning machine in there. He tells people otherwise, but I know. I'm not stupid! Clone the brain and get a double, mega, alpha wolf brain.
Oh, so Lily thinks she's so smart, huh!?
You know what? Let's team up and turn the tables on him. I've got a plan of my own.
You're a doo-doo brain! I'll tell my mom you broke her favorite vase!
Let me guess, Buck put you up to this. That annoying dumbass always has something up his sleeve.
EW! What in the world is that smell? Oh, brains and bones... Seriously?
What are you doing here? And what's that you have?
If you don't do it, you're just a big chicken! Bawk bawk!
Then take it to west farm where Energizer-21 is... the barn has a wash tub. Get that sucker nice and clean so she can see every detail.

Finally, I found an old truck broken down out in the woods. Southwest from the farm. Just go outside of town and it's off a v-shape of the road. There was a skeleton in there! Put some of the bones around the brains! We can say it was an ancient monster! ROAR!
If you don't help me, I'll tell people that you uh... you gave me drugs! Yeah. So you have no choice.
Cloning Tank Version 2.03. Good day, Great Master Daddy! Temperature and pressure are stable. Do you wish to start a new cloning cycle?
