DNA material: present. Additional brain cells source: present. Cloning cycle number 420 initiated. Thank you, Daddy.

name: Revival Overdrive

target.label: Golem
target.landmark: Collect Charge Particles from defeating nearby golems

journal: Zeke "Gearhead" Thompson Steppe, Northsteppe fort. Collect Charge Particles from defeating nearby golems.
objectives: Still wranglin' with those Golems? No hurry, friend. Those Charge Particles ain't goin' anywhere, and neither am I.
goalTexts: Return Charge Particles to Zeke Thompson

npc: Well, if it ain't my favorite adventurer! Back already?
Alrighty then, but don't be surprised if the next time you fall, it's for keeps!
Suit yourself! Just watch your step those spiders ain't known for givin' second chances!
All good, friend. If you change your mind before you're pushin' daisies, you know where to find me!
Well, that's your call, friend. Just remember, out here, once you're gone, you're gone for good!
Well now, look who's struttin' back! You wrangled those Charge Particles after all.
Much obliged, partner. These are gonna put some real pep in our beacon's step.
Well now, that's the spirit! Let's see what adventure we can cook up.
Excellent! Let's make some history together.
Knew I could count on you! Those spiders won't know what hit 'em.
Oh and careful dying. Those beacons only have a few more charges for ya.
There you are! Got something for me?
Any luck with those armored spiders?
How 'bout you rustle up 8 of those Charge Particles for me? Could be a bit of fun, and it'd sure liven things up 'round here.
Here's your reward a Revive Beacon Blueprint and my trusty wrench. They'll serve you well.
Thanks to you, we're closer to turning the tide. Can't thank you enough!
No worries, partner. I'll be here enjoyin' the fireworks while they last!
Them Golems crawlin' about got these fancy Charge Particles I could tinker with.
So I still need a couple more bits for that revive beacon kick it into overdrive and keep our boys on their feet, ya know?

name: Repairing the Reaper

target.label: Gnat
target.landmark: Find gnats in the fields of Goldenfield

journal: Quadro-Sentinel 4.0 Goldenfield, Fields of Goldenfield. Find gnats in the fields of Goldenfield.
objectives: Quadro-Sentinel 4.0 requires 5 gnat skulls as confirmation of extermination. Locate in fields of Goldenfield. Failure to complete mission will result in unauthorized status retention.

npc: Interface indicates a successful mission. Safe passage token issued.
Proceed with exterminating gnats and collecting skulls. Return promptly.
Interface indicates successful repair. Safe passage token issued.
You are now my favorite outworlder. Congratulations.
Maintain vigilance. My stationary state won't last. Resume survival protocol.
Operational query: have skulls been acquired?
Unauthorized entities feared imminent. Quadro-Sentinel 4.0 was damaged in the last bloodbath.
Assistance required while Quadro-Sentinel 4.0 repairs. Mission details: exterminate gnats. Recover skulls as proof.
System guarantee: one week safe passage under my surveillance upon completion. Compliance beneficial for survival.
Denial acknowledged. However, unauthorized exits will result in immediate action.
Affirmative. If reconsideration occurs, my location remains unchanged.
Resumption of operations critical. Assistance vital for temporary exemption from my protocols.
Acknowledged. Skulls received.

name: Rock and Keg Roll
journal: Lola Vexar Riverrise, Scene. Search the bar for the kegs.
objectives: Oi, don t be dilly-dallying now! We need those kegs: one red, one green, and one blue! Pronto! Remember mate, the bar's got what we need. Hurry back before this party's more busted than a badger's backside!

npc: Bloody hell, you're a life saver! Let's get this shindig into full swing!
Oi, back already? Spill it, did you snag those kegs?
Cheers, mate! You ve saved more than just the evening you ve saved my liver from crying!
Let s get plastered, shall we?
Here s your reward, darling. Don't spend it all on crumpets, eh?
Blimey! This gig's going tits up faster than a badger in a blender.
The press are as useful as a chocolate teapot, and noise complaints are flooding in like a cheap lager at a football match.
Speaking of which... how about we liven things up with a few kegs of the old liquid merriment? Pop over to the bar and nick some booze, will ya?
Fetch me 3 kegs. Trust me, with a bit of the bubbly, we'll be having a right knees-up and turning heads in all the right ways.
Oh, giving me the cold shoulder, are we? Hope you don't choke on a crumpet!
Too posh to keg it up, eh? Bet you're no fun at parties.
Alright, Prissy Pants. When this gig hits legendary status, don't come crying to me.
Fine then, you teetotaler. More beer for the rest of us rowdy lot!
Oh, you re a right bore, aren't ya? Go polish your monocle or something.

name: Rusty Relics for Rituals
journal: Zugg Clankwhistle Goldenfield, near the Bureau Search Prison Island for rare junk. Collect Rust-Eaten Weapon Chains, Tattered Beastskin Mantles, and Fractured Binding Stones and deliver them to Skrizzik.
objectives: He needs Rust-Eaten Weapon Chains, Tattered Beastskin Mantles, and Fractured Binding Stones.
goalTexts: Bring all the items to Skrizzik
Check your pocket for the item

npc: Skrizzik needs some rare junk from Prison Island for the ritual.
According to this old book, he needs Rust-Eaten Weapon Chains, Tattered Beastskin Mantles, and Fractured Binding Stones.
I'm still swamped with paperwork, so you're going to fetch them.
Get those relics and deliver them to Skrizzik, got it?
Also, tell him to forget my number...
Figures. Can't rely on anyone these days.
Hmph, fine. I didn't need you anyway.
Suit yourself. I'll find someone else.
Finally, someone who can follow orders.
Ah, you've returned. And you have relics?
Well, well, you've fetched exactly what Skrizzik needs!
Zugg called Skrizzik and said the good news!
You have no idea what wonders these will unlock.
These relics are quite... invaluable.
Stay, we've got one last thing to do!

name: Salvation from Madness

goals.label: Piece of Artifact from the Archosaur

target.label: Archosaur
target.landmark: Search the Great Steppes for the dangerous, wandering Archosaur and slay it for the final artifact piece!

goals.label: Bring piece of artifact to Zor

journal: Zor Steppe, Fisher's camp. Search the Great Steppes for the dangerous, wandering Archosaur and slay it for the final artifact piece!
objectives: Piece of Artifact from the Archosaur
Please kill the monstrous Archosaur to the southwest, past Silent Mountains... The final piece is what we need.
Alright laddie, bring me that artifact with the Archosaur head. Or, you can take them up to Zor... I won t put any more pressure on ya'.
goalTexts: Get a trophies from the Archosaur
Impale the head on a pike near Tor
Bring piece of artifact to Zor

npc: This is getting mounted immediately. Hell of a thing isn't it?
As promised, here's something to make it worth your while... and uh... don't worry about Zor. I'm sure he's fine...
You've made the right decision! Let me see this thing.
But that's not all. There's a respawn beacon nearby. If you can hack it, we can prevent our extinction in this relentless war against the Lightbearers.
Your actions won't stop the war, but they'll ensure our survival and sanity.
Will you help us?
May you find peace in your travels.
Thank you, outsider. You have our deepest gratitude.
Well, look who's back. What have you got there?
Perhaps another time.
Our plight continues, but I cannot force your hand.
May the winds guide you.
Be careful, the wastelands are treacherous.
I understand. The path is perilous.
Meowvians may rest again... for now.
Please, outsider. Tell people truth about this war.
Your courage gives us hope.
Archosaur eat Lightbearers... Lightbearers who carry the piece.
You... have saved what is left of us.
Do not let Lightbearers control story.
Thank you!
You must kill the beast. Search belly... retrieve final fragment.
The last piece... I hear rumors.
Outsider, I beseech you. My people are succumbing to madness, their minds twisted by a cursed artifact.
Almighty lord! This thing is enormous. Can't believe you were able to kill this thing.
Here, take this as a token of my appreciation.
Perhaps things will start looking up now.
This is it... now can calm my people down!
With these fragments. Undo what has been done.
This is it... now can calm my people down!
To the southwest, past Silent Mountains lies... Ferroshed Foundry.

name: Scarecrow Showdown

goals.label: Put the scarecrow back in place

journal: Skrizzik Prison Island Place the scarecrow in front of Zugg's office in Goldenfield and make sure to speak with him after to rub it in.
objectives: Don't forget, place that scarecrow right in front of Zugg's bureau in Goldenfield. Then send him a message!
goalTexts: Put the scarecrow back in place

npc: That slimy bureaucrat Zugg has lied to you and Skrizzik!
He's upset Skrizzik! Skrizzik won't stand for it!
Skrizzik has a little plan to teach that pompous cousin a lesson he'll never forget.
These weren't required for the ritual! So instead, Skrizzik made a little scarecrow.
Take this Troll Head Scarecrow and place it right in front of his precious bureau in Goldenfield.
Then confront him and say, 'Compliments of Skrizzik!'
Let's see how he likes being the butt of a joke!
Excellent! Skrizzik knew you had a bit of mischief in you.
Bah! Skrizzik thought you had more spine.
Can't handle a little prank? You're no fun at all.
Fine, Skrizzik will find someone else with a taste for vengeance.
You there! Care to explain why there's a grotesque scarecrow outside my bureau?
A Troll Head Scarecrow? Planted right at my doorstep? This is an outrage!
So, Skrizzik thinks he can mock me with these childish antics?
Well, you can tell that conniving scoundrel his petty tricks won't intimidate me!
And you... consider yourself warned. Meddling in official business has consequences!
Take this... as a peace offering between you and I. I had this mount for a while...
I just wanted to see if I could get a little payback on that sneaky shit head.

name: Scattered Collectibles

target.label: Trading Cards
target.landmark: Search Riverrise for all the Trading Cards

journal: Clyde Riverrise, Market in old town. Search Riverrise for all the Trading Cards.
objectives: Remember, my masterpieces are all over Riverrise. Keep those eagle eyes sharp! Imagine those kids' faces when we beat them at their own game. There are twenty cards total, don't miss any!

npc: Here's your reward. The lawsuit money will be enough vengeance for me.
Fantastic! You'll see, collecting isn't just a hobby, it's an art form.
These kids are going to pay, literally. I'm taking them to court for getting my cards dirty!
You did it! You actually found all my cards!
Ah, finally! My prized possessions - are they still near mint?
Alright, let's be real, die-hard collectors like me deserve the best.
These little brats just can't appreciate the value.
I had to put a kid in his place to land this rare collectible toy.
But what do you know? They got revenge by scattering my precious trading cards all over Riverrise.
A top-tier collector like me can't be running around playing hide-and-seek.
Can you help retrieve my cards? There should be about ten of them.
What? Are you siding with the kids now?
Ugh, fine. I'll just have to deal with those little monsters myself.
Seriously? You don't understand the magnitude of this collectible crisis.

name: Seasoned Delicacy
journal: Triton Windreach Woods, Lake house. Find Thorin in Windstone Village to the east, past the lake.
objectives: Eggs get cold! Triton need herbs soon. Thorin make taste good. Hurry! Windstone Village far! Must go fast!

npc: Quick, quick! Fresh eggs better. Triton no like old food.
That is only reason Triton no eat you!
You no help Triton now?
Triton very angry, Triton must eat baby!
You ask Thorin in Windstone Village for herbs! He make special flavor. Triton happy.
Imp eggs, they taste yucky for Triton. Only Thorin make yummy.
I'll need your help finding some special seasoning for these.
Well, well, less thrilling than Triton's usual... 'special meat', but Imp eggs are interesting!
Why you no get me herp! Awhghghg!
Eggs? Oh boy, I hope these aren't another one of Triton's 'special' meals.
Triton trust. Thorin make eggs good.
Get herb from Thorin fast. Triton want tasty now.

name: Secrets Beneath

target.label: Mob
target.landmark: Assist Silas Whitlock in dealing with the Fungus that keeps digging up his buried chest

journal: Silas Whitlock Riverrise, Hidden Chest Assist Silas Whitlock in dealing with the Fungus that keeps digging up his buried chest.
objectives: If I end up digging the same hole one more time, I might start charging rent to the Fungus! Ten Fungus. That's all. I'm starting to wonder if they have a union.

npc: With this done, I can finally focus on my real job.
You'd think by now I'd have this chest buried, but no, those Fungus keep ruining my plans.
You're a gem! My back can't handle another night of re-dug soil.
You've no idea how much I appreciate this. My evenings just opened up!
Here's your reward. And the evidence... er, treasure? Oh, it's definitely buried this time!
Finally, maybe now I can retire my shovel.
I swear if one more of those fungi pop up, I'm moving to the desert. What's the status?
It's almost like they have a personal vendetta against me or something. Every night, same old routine: they dig, I try to bury.
If you could take care of about 10 of them, maybe just maybe I can finally get this chest to stay put.
So you're fine with me growing old and gray out here, huh?
Guess I'll just keep groundhog digging every night.
You have no idea what my chiropractor bills look like.

name: Secrets of The Bound Requiem

target.label: Yaga
target.landmark: Defeat the Yaga on Prison Island, attain whatever knowledge you can and return to Kings Head

journal: Kings Head Prison Island Defeat the Yaga on Prison Island, attain whatever knowledge you can and return to Kings Head.
objectives: Remember, you must defeat the Yaga on the island to gain the final piece of knowledge.

npc: Ah, I sense that the old book you carry is almost within your grasp to understand, but there's a final piece of knowledge you lack.
The Yaga on the island possess this missing piece. They are formidable creatures, tied closely to the mystery of my downfall.
If you defeat them and return to me, and read me the secrets of that book aloud I'll reward you with a legendary treasure from the old Yorner vaults.
And I may die again from pure shock.
Your courage is commendable. I await your return.
A pity. The secrets of the past will remain hidden a while longer.
As you wish. The path to knowledge is not for everyone.
Disappointing, but I understand. The Yaga are not to be taken lightly.
Very well. Perhaps another time.
Ah, you have returned. Did you defeat the Yaga?
Well done, brave one! You have done what many thought impossible.
Now, read me the book.
Yes... The mysteries unfold.
As promised, please accept this legendary artifact.

name: Secrets of the Invaders
journal: Furr Steppe, Fisher's camp. Help Furr understand the human invaders by collecting their valuables within the Adventurer's Outpost.
objectives: Find trinkets of humankind, from camp of Lightbearers. In chests, in tents, upon soldiers they rest. Seek them you must.

npc: Ah, items you bring. Knowledge they hold.
Return you do. Valuables bring?
Very well. Paths diverge for now.
As you choose. Yndar waits not.
Need more help doing research in meantime.
Thank you. May the shadows guide you.
Understandable. Quest continues without.
Your help, most welcome it is.
With items, we uncover truths. Protect people, we will.
Need you bring human trinkets from camp of Lightbearers.
Portals they use; secrets hidden within.
Humans come, bring chaos to homeland.
Odd pieces of history. Unappreciated by others.
Secrets these trinkets share, unfold we shall.

name: Secrets Unearthed

target.label: Hidden Stash
target.landmark: Help Colt "Muffinman" McGrady by finding the Spellbreaker Amulet to the north in the Candlewick Slums

goals.label: Use the Spellbreaker Amulet to see caches

journal: Colt "Muffinman" McGrady Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. Help Colt "Muffinman" McGrady by finding the Spellbreaker Amulet to the north in the Candlewick Slums. After, head southwest to find the hidden stash.
objectives: Five artifacts. Spellbreaker Amulet. Coordinates. Simple enough for even you, right?
goalTexts: Use the Spellbreaker Amulet to see caches

npc: Wow, this artifact is teeming with dark energy. I'm not letting Barnaby get this back.
Seems he's been hiding artifacts from the king. Probably thinks you won't find them.
I have the coordinates to his secret stashes. Think you can handle recovery?
After you find it, go bring back all five artifacts, if it's not too much trouble.
But no rush. It's not like the kingdom's safety depends on you or anything.
You're solid. I need to know what he's up to.
Oh, you're not interested? What a surprise.
Well, someone's got to sit around and do nothing.
Sure, let me know when you're done doing... whatever it is you do.
Mmm, I didn't exfect you already. My mouf is full of muffin...
Oh, you actually made it back.
Now we just need to make sure the King knows what Barnaby was up to. Buckle up.
Here, take this. I appreciate your help.
Each cache is protected by a spell. You'll need a spellbreaker artifact... heard there's one up north, in the Candlewick Slums.
In the meantime, I'll try to find a safe place to dispose of this Heart of Souls. It's too bad about Gareth...

name: Secure the Assets
journal: Oswald Goldenfield, Bank. Bring Oswald materials to reinforce the bank's vault.
objectives: I'm counting on you to deliver those assets. Dr. Orion Bloom and Zorbul have my stuff.

npc: Want to takesss a ssswim before you leavesss?
Wait... what? Ossswald wants me to hold onto thisss sssstuff? He must really be nervousss.
Any luck finding the Iron Ingots and Treated Wood?
Remember, the safety of our bank depends on you.
I ll do my besst... Tell Ossswald hiiii.
And here, a reward - perhaps you'll consider banking it with us.
You're a lifesaver! Now I'll have a little peace of mind.
I received a disturbing tip that some bandits plan to rob our bank. I can't let that happen.
You aren't one of them... are you? Hmmm...
He's a dear friend and will watch over my things. He's up by the two ponds in Skylight Grasslands.
Nevertheless, I want to make sure my assets aren't anywhere near here!
Oh, that's unfortunate. I hope you reconsider.
Well, I can't force you. But remember, time is of the essence.
That's a shame. The safety of my assets relies on your help.
You've already helped me before... prove to me your decency. Make sure my most important things get to Glubgrath.
Then, my black accounting book is with Zorbul... don't ask. Pick these up and take them to Glubgrath.
Oh! Of course! My stuff! Dr. Orion Bloom has a souvenir sword that is very valuable. Go retrieve it from him.
Oh, that's unfortunate. I hope you reconsider.

name: Security Measures

target.label: Plazma Gun
target.landmark: Use the blueprint to craft a Plazma Gun

journal: Oswald Goldenfield, Bank Use the blueprint to craft a Plazma Gun.
objectives: The blueprint s in your hands. Time to track down the Plasma Gun.

npc: Here's your reward. You've truly helped me out.
Thank you! I can t tell you how much this means to me. I'll feel a lot safer with that gun.
Hey there! How's it coming along?
You really did it! Thank you so much.
Now I can rest easy knowing the bank is secure. Thanks again!
Listen, I'm really jittery about the bank's security lately. There's been talk of potential robberies around here, and I can't help but worry.
I asked for reinforcements, but they ve done little to ease my nerves. I was thinking... maybe a Plazma Gun would help me sleep better at night.
Would you be willing to help me craft one? I'd need you to get a Plazma Gun Blueprint unless you already know how to make one.
I would pay you for your trouble. If I knew how, well, I wouldn't be a banker.
Oh, that s disappointing. I sure hope nothing happens while I'm unprotected.
Alright, I get it. If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
That's a bummer. Stay safe out there, alright?

name: Sending the Alert

target.label: Parts Radio Transmitter
target.landmark: Head northwest and find the transmitter south of the Arid Canal, past the lake

goals.label: Repair radio transmitter and call to the king

journal: Colt "Muffinman" McGrady Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. Head northwest and find the transmitter south of the Arid Canal, past the lake. The parts are located around the Great Steppe Stronghold.
objectives: Remember, we need all of the broken parts to fix the transmitter. Once the array is repaired, send the message to the king.
goalTexts: Repair radio transmitter and call to the king

npc: Win win, right?
Guess there's no one else for the job.
We have to finish this - we have to tell the king what Barnaby is doing.
The transmitter's broken who would've thought? Think you can find the parts and fix it?
Well, you've managed not to trip over your own feet so far.
Oh, you're passing? That's one way to handle an insurrection.
Not up for it? Interesting choice, considering the kingdom's at stake.
Skipping out? No worries, I'm sure someone else will volunteer. Eventually.
Turning down a chance to be a hero? Bold strategy.
You've returned. Did you manage to find the parts and send the report?
Excellent work! The king has received our message.
The kingdom... and I, owe you a debt of gratitude.
Your actions have set us on the path to peace.
As promised, here are the signed accords.
The kingdom owes you a debt of gratitude.
Now uh... get the fuck out of my face.
If you manage to pull this off, the King will put me in charge. And I'll agree to work with Tor and the other forts. I'll mention your name as well.
Unfortunately, our transmitter is down. We need to get it operational before I can send any kind of message. The transmitter is northwest, south of the Arid Canal. Hop to it, soldier.
As for Barnaby... well, he won't like what's comin' to him.
Get over to the Northsteppe Fort to the east, I've heard word from Rancor that they need a hand, bad. Take care.

name: Sensing the Sands

target.label: Quasi-Thermal Desert Sensors
target.landmark: Grab four sensors from the fort and place one to the west of the South Winery

journal: Xelcor Zinn Steppe, Northsteppe fort. Grab four sensors from the fort and place one to the west of the South Winery. Go west and place on the rocky shore of the lake. Head east out of the fort and place one and finally to the south, just off the road.
objectives: Collect sensors around the northern outpost

npc: Ms. Queenie just needsa one more thingy, then we can discover the trutha!
Splendific! We'll unravel the desert's chronoquarks together!
Fizzlewhip! The zygomorphs will remain unziggled for now!
Ooh la la! Did you slip those gizmo-whizzles into the dunes just right?
Heehee! You've wibbled those gizmo-whizzles into the sandy nooks splendidly!
My quantimetrics are buzzing feel that cosmic tingle!
With this data, we'll tickle the desert's secrets until they giggle!
Grab a sensor and get it placed. Do one at a time, or grab em' all! But be careful, they're calibrated to the finest nanowibbles!
Haha! Cosmic giggles! No desert data dance today!
Could you, marvelous being, assist me in deploying these sensors?
Once you've plonked them into the sandy substrate, return swiftly so we can analyze the hyperdata!
Zippity zap! Your assistance brings cosmic giggles to my core!
Quarkles! The zimbobbles will have to wibble without us!
Heehee! Quark-tacular! Your help will make the xenowaves shimmy!
Splinktastic! Guess the hyperwaves will jiggle without our jolt!
My colleagues are all tied up with their own quantimetrics, so I'm in quite the zimbobble.
Heehee! We musta stop the apocalypse, yessie?
I have done much research! And yetta, no evidence of danger. Very odd!
Queenie insists desert expanding!
I've concocted these Quasi-Thermal Desert Sensors to detect anomalies in the flora and fauna splicktacular, isn't it?
Oh sprockets! My nano-sensors will miss their sandy playdate!
Fantabulous! Let's quantimize those sandicules post-haste!
I might have more tasks for you soon, so stay in touch!
They need to be placed at four geomagnetic nodes: north, south, east, and west. Watch out for any zygomorphs!

name: Shadows Beneath the Sands

target.label: Stealing weapons
target.landmark: Head west to the Great Steppes Stronghold and sabotage the fort

journal: Tor Drostin Steppe, Central Fort. Head west to the Great Steppes Stronghold and sabotage the fort.
objectives: Get to Great Steppes Stronghold! First, steal their weapons. Then, set fire to their provisions. And drop off my special uh... gift... for Barnaby.

npc: Oh! That robot... Happy? Said he was trying to reach you.
I can't thank you enough. Hopefully we can help the Meowvians recover their home... somehow.
And so do we...
Hopefully when the king hears how incompetent they are, they all get sent home.
I want you to search the camp for any clues notes, equipment, anything that might reveal what he's been up to.
Follow any leads you find and uncover the truth.
Heh, Barnaby can fuck himself.
Hell yeah brother, let's do this!
Ah, you're back. You have fun?
I knew I could count on you. Please, be careful out there.
Excellent. Time is of the essence. May the light guide you.
You're a fool.
You'd abandon us now?
You coward.
Fuck that guy! And fuck this war!
First, steal their weapons. Then, set fire to their provisions. And drop off this special uh... gift... for Barnaby.
Anyway, let's blow the hell out of Great Steppes Stronghold!
Maybe working with those Meowvians...
I've had just about enough of these Lightbearers. If there's an ecological collapse, we can solve it ourselves.

name: Sharpening Resolve

target.label: Reinforced parts 4
target.landmark: Gather the weapon parts directly north of the Western Fort

goals.label: Build a reinforced weapon on the anvil

journal: Silas Thorne Steppe, Western fort. Gather the weapon parts directly north of the Western Fort. When the road turns, continue straight north. Return with the pieces and use the anvil in the Western Fort to construct the new weapon.
objectives: Find the materials. Remake the weapon. Talk to Thaddeus. Time's wasting.
goalTexts: Build a reinforced weapon on the anvil

npc: I've taken a vow of peace, you see.
I... I don't think I can handle this.
Oh dear, a weapon?
Oh my! Is that a gun?
That coward needs to stop hiding behind his vows and join the fight.
Or perhaps... you can help find a better way to help...
Leave.
... Fuck off then.
See that you get it right.
You're as useless as that dull blade you brought me.
We need him. Whether he wants to kill or not.
Bring the materials back to the fort and use the anvil to construct the weapon. Then give it to Brother Thaddeus. The coward.
The materials shouldn't be hard to find. Unless you're an idiot. Head directly north of the fort. When the road starts to curve, continue straight up.
I'll show you how to make an acceptable weapon. Not one for a braindead moron
The weapon you made me? Not acceptable.
Perhaps someone else is better suited to wield it.

name: Shattered Memory

goals.label: Use the two ancient consoles that will open the door

journal: Mortimer Gloomsworth Goldenfield, near Cemetery Venture back to Prison Island and find the ancient consoles to unlock the door and find the item for Doc Greene.
objectives: Remember, the memory core lies within the old facility on Prison Island. Activate the two consoles to unlock the facility door.
goalTexts: Use the two ancient consoles that will open the door

npc: Alright, I'll see what I can do to stir your lost memories.
What's that! A Memory Core... broken, though.
Not all are prepared to face the echoes of their past.
Very well. May you find what is lost.
Be cautious, the island is treacherous, and the core may not be intact.
I sense a void within you, a missing piece of your past.
Doc Greene, though his path is a shadowed one, would be able to help.
He resides on Prison Island but will not help without a fragment of your memory.
An old facility on the island holds a memory core, hidden behind a locked door.
To access it, you must activate two ancient consoles to unlock the way.
Retrieve the memory core and bring it to Doc Greene; perhaps he can help you recover what you've lost.
I understand; the path is a difficult one.
Perhaps another time you will seek what has been forgotten.
Don't get your hopes up too high, but perhaps this will help.
Here, take this for your efforts.
I require more assistance to fix this device!

name: Shell We Eat?

target.label: Turtles
target.landmark: Search for turtles around bodies of water

journal: Butch O'Hara Goldenfield, Barn. Search for turtles around bodies of water.
objectives: Don't forget, three turtle meats. Watch your step out there. The forest can be a real beast. Remember, search around bodies of water.

npc: I was thinking of getting some good turtle meat she could make a hearty stew with. But I m drowned in orders at the moment. Think you could help Goldenfield out just a little more?
Impressive. You must have a good knife.
Hey there! Got that turtle meat for me?
You're not bad for a portal hopper! Well, what are you waiting for? Go get some turtle meat. I figure three turtles-worth outta be enough, right?
And here I had you pegged for one of them city idiots.
Martha's gonna be thrilled, and the folks at the kitchen will love it.
Hey there, I got a special request for you. You see, Martha runs the welfare kitchen, and she's been doing one heck of a job feeding everyone.
You'll need to head to bodies of water outside Goldenfield to find some turtles, and hopefully, I've taught you well enough in butchery!
But I figure, even if she s killing it, she could always use a hand, right?
Ah, that's a bummer. Thought you might wanna do something nice for Martha.
No hard feelings. If you change your mind, you know where to find me.

name: Signal in the Sands

target.label: Golem
target.landmark: Help Colt 'Muffinman' McGrady restore the transmission systems northwest by the village, north to the cemetery, and northeast up the road from the slums

target.label: Golem
target.landmark: Help Colt 'Muffinman' McGrady restore the transmission systems northwest by the village, north to the cemetery, and northeast up the road from the slums

journal: Colt "Muffinman" McGrady Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. Help Colt 'Muffinman' McGrady restore the transmission systems northwest by the village, north to the cemetery, and northeast up the road from the slums.
objectives: Don't forget, you need to reactivate all three transmission towers. By the village, the cemetery, and up the road from the slums!
goalTexts: Report to Colt McGrady that all towers are operational

npc: This is Colt. Do you read me?
Listen up, we're in a tight spot. That's... really the only reason I'm trusting you with this.
I see. Not everyone is cut out for this.
I'll put in a word with leadership for you.
Some towers might be damaged. Report in to me if so.
Time is against us. The fate of our people may rest on your shoulders.
Glad to have you on board. We re counting on you.
Excellent. Every minute counts. Be swift and stay alert.
I knew I could rely on you. Good luck out there.
Understood. I'll have to find someone else.
Very well. Stay safe behind these walls.
Hey there, did you manage to get the towers running?
Outstanding work! The signal just came through.
There s one northwest outside the Great Bones Village. Another straight north by the cemetery and finally northeast up the road past the slums!
I've already sent the distress call to the King. Help is on the way.
You've done us all a great service. Here's your reward, as promised.
The enemy's pressing in, and our defenses won't hold forever.
There's an old transmission system out in the desert, lost during a fierce battle. If we can get it operational, we can call for reinforcements from the King.
I need you to head to the desert frontline and reactivate the three transmission towers.

name: Silencing the Rumors
journal: Tor Drostin Steppe, Central Fort. Help Tor Drostin remove the inflammatory posters causing unrest at the outpost.
objectives: For the love of all that's sacred, have ya pulled down those damned posters yet?

npc: Here's your reward, as promised. If only all our troubles could be solved so simply...
I can't express how much this means everything's goin' to hell, but this gives us a breather.
It's weird shit all about how we're the ones committing a genocide! As if!
Ah, bless ya! You've torn down those damned posters!
Ah, there ya are! Tell me ya've torn down those cursed posters!
I can't believe this... We're barely holdin' together, and you won't lift a finger?
Let's keep the peace and the party goin'. Will ya lend a hand?
Fine then, turn your back on us when we're on the brink.
Excellent. The sooner those posters are gone, the better.
Good. Let's put an end to these harmful rumors.
Ah, for the love of the saints... You're leavin' us in a right mess!
You're a godsend. Maybe now we can keep this party from tearin' itself apart.
I need ya to help me tear down those foolish posters scattered about the place.
Did you manage to take down those troublesome posters?
If we don't get rid of this rubbish, things could get messy real quick.
It's rilin' up the lads, and the Lightbearers aren't too pleased either.
Those blasted posters sayin' the enemy is innocent are spoilin' our good time.
Ah, can you believe it? Someone's gone and plastered the camp with utter nonsense!

name: Slippery Passage

target.label: Scrag GUN
target.landmark: Go south of the Ripplecrop Fields to the Train Station

journal: Chad "Buzz" McNulty Riverrise, Scene. Go south of the Ripplecrop Fields to the Train Station. Kill scrags to find a key and save the hostages.
objectives: Please, please find those guys. I need them for mosh pitting, and they're also like... super nice guys. Without those, I'm just a dry bro in a sea of sweaty bodies!

npc: Thanks to you, I'm gonna slip through that crowd like butter on a hot day with my very good friends!
Whoa, you actually did it! Fellas! Who s ready to ROOOOOOOOOCK!?
Slick Savior! Did ya find the fellas?
Here you go, take this VIP autograph and band T-shirt, dude! You earned it!
You, my friend, are a lifesaver! Hope they make it back safe and sound!
God only knows what s going on with those poor boys now! Can you do me a huge favor and head over to the train station, see if you can find em ... preferably before the show!
I made it away, but my 4 buddies were kidnapped and last I heard they were being taken to the train station! I m sure one of those scrags will have a key or something, right?
Before the show we were buying wee-... some cigarettes, when me and my buddies got jumped!
Dude! We were preparing for the show tonight, getting ready for the ultimate moshpit. But something terrible happened!
C'mon, don't leave me hanging here like yesterday's laundry!
Oh man, you're gonna make me dry hump my way through this crowd?
Seriously, you're cooler than this! Don't ruin my night!
Leaving me here is like abandoning a puppy in a thunderstorm, bro.
Gonna do me like that? Just because I'm not slick right now?

name: Something Suspicious

target.label: Varkus's notes
target.landmark: Search the mine to the south, nearby Grizzle Ironfoot for the notes

journal: Alexander Stones Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform. Search the mine to the south, nearby Grizzle Ironfoot for the notes.
objectives: Can't ignore the feeling someone's watching us. Be quick, they might already know we're onto them! Get those notes before they can cloak 'em. This is our only shot.

npc: Fine, go about your day. Just remember, ignorance is bliss until you're on the abduction list.
The aliens got to you, didn't they? Open your eyes before it's too late!
Oh, I see. They've already brainwashed you, haven't they?
Look closely. There should be cryptic notes, some mysterious markings. SOMETHING. They can't hide from us forever.
You need to head over to the second exit of the mines.
I think they got to Varkus, they stole his wife, and they took our artifact piece.
You know who's behind this? The parasitic aliens! And the government won't tell you!
I've got a nose for these things, and it smells like a cover-up!
Alright, listen up! You ever seen anything more suspicious than Varkus's bullshit?
Stay close, don't let them mess with your mind. We need to find those notes!
Drink the punch all you want. Meanwhile, I'll be uncovering the truth!
We need to follow the trail to the truth before it goes cold.
You nailed it, just like I thought. Alien or not, this says Varkus killed his wife to cover up... something!
Boom! There it is, the smoking gun!
Tell me you've got something. The truth is out there, and we need to light it up!

name: Spirited Away

goals.label: Fill the bottles from the barrels

target.label: Fill Bottles
target.landmark: Fetch liquor from the ruins to the northeast near the swamp line

journal: Dr. Queenie Steppe, Northsteppe fort. Fetch liquor from the ruins to the northeast near the swamp line.
objectives: Fill the bottles from the barrels
The ruins aren't far find the barrels and fill up some bottles.

npc: Heeey there, shugar! hic I've got a shuper important shcientific... shci... shcience job for ya!
We gotta... hic lift everyone's shpirits! A party! Yesh, a big ol' party!
There'sh shome old ruins over yonder with the finesht... the mosht exshquisite liquor!
Could ya... hic shneak over and fill shome bottles from the barrelsh? It'll be our little shecret!
Then you... you take 'em to Morty Mort Decay! He'll keep 'em shafe while I... I make party plans!
Trusht me, shweetheart, this'll be the besht morale boosht ever! Everyone's gonna love it! hic
Exshellent choish! hic We'll gather shome... hic valuable shamples!
Whaaat? Too busshy for shcience? Fine, be that way!
Hic! You think you're shuper shpecial? I'll do it myshelf!
If you won't help with my shcientific... shhtuff, then forget it!
Pfft! Who needsh you anyway? Shhoo, go away!
Ah, you're back.
I see you've acquired the spirits Queenie requested.
Hand them over, and I'll ensure they're... properly safeguarded.
Here's your compensation, as promised.
Perhaps now you can assist me with some... real science.
I should mention, discretion is appreciated.

name: Spiritual Cleansing: Rocks and a Hard Place

target.label: Leafs
target.landmark: Search for Leaf Monster camps in the Skylight Grasslands

journal: Guru David Goldenfield, Yoga Lake. Search for Leaf Monster camps in the Skylight Grasslands.
objectives: Seek out 3 Leaf Monster legs. Delve into the forests of Kwalat, and you might uncover them. Remember, 3 Leaf Monster legs to use for incense sticks; the universe rewards the diligent. Tranquility hinges on those legs. Crack off as many as you can.

npc: Wonderful, you're a true seeker of harmony!
Ah, you return. How fares your quest for the legs?
Remember, you can find those critters in the Skylight Grasslands.
Here, take this relaxation elixir and meditation token as a token of our gratitude.
Now, the ritual! Sorry you can't join, but it really only works with three people.
Maybe next time I'll give you a private session.
Ah, the path of enlightenment isn't for everyone.
If you change your mind, return here, and we shall continue.
Helping us with this dilemma is your purpose today.
Ah, the cosmos smile upon you. You've found them!
I know these delicate creatures rest in the Skylight Grasslands. Bring us a few of those creature legs and I will make sure your soul is purified.
I need you to find something that we can dip the oil in to burn slowly.
You've been invaluable. But there's another delicate matter at hand.
You see, the gnat oil will work beautifully, but I ran out of incense sticks.
The balance of our harmonious ritual is now at stake.
Tiffany suggested Leaf Bug legs... I'm a little concerned about her, but, hopefully, after the ritual, she will be cleansed.

name: Spiritual Cleansing: The Fragrant Gel

target.label: Gnoos
target.landmark: Find gnats lurking in the fields and collect their wings

journal: Guru David Goldenfield, Yoga Lake. Find gnats lurking in the fields and collect their wings.
objectives: Remember, we need Gnat Wings to complete the ritual. They buzz around in all the lush corners of Goldenfield. Simply look, and be guided to your spiritual destination.

npc: Gratitude, seeker.
May the energies of the universe align to guide you on this quest.
Ah, you have returned. How fares your journey?
And they'll make this incense create an amazing trip...
The Gnat Wings you've collected radiate pure energy... and oil.
Here's your reward for aiding us in our sacred ritual.
We only need a few more small items. Perhaps you can help us find them.
Our journey here is about reconnecting with the essence of the universe.
I am preparing a cleansing ritual for my devoted students, Tiffany and Cassidy.
They roam amidst the beauty across Goldenfield. You should find them to the north if you just look.
They can be used to create a very enlightening incense oil experience.
I understand, not everyone's path is the same.
May you find peace in your journey.
The universe respects your decision.
If you ever change your mind, we are here.
Every soul has its calling.
Perhaps another time, then.
We lack an essential component: Gnat Wings.

name: Spiritual Cleansing: Flowers and Crystals of Persistence
journal: Guru David Goldenfield, Yoga Lake. Search the clearings southwest for the Purple Poppy and Yellow Crystal.
objectives: Remember, we need a mystical Yellow Crystal and a Purple Poppy. Seek it out in the clearings to the southwest of us. You're sure to find them. Your journey's success relies on your persistence.

npc: You have chosen a path of enlightenment.
You have done well, my friend.
With this, we are a step closer to our spiritual cleansing ritual.
And Cassidy will get off my back and on to hers...
May you find peace and balance as a reward for your efforts.
We re at a critical juncture in our ritual.
Perhaps the time isn't right for you to seek the crystal.
She claims it is very important, and also wants a special flower that will help... ease her.
May be difficult to find at first but just let the spirits guide you.
Let's find that flower and crystal and complete our ritual.
Ah, you have returned! How fares your quest for the crystal and poppy?
It seems you are not ready for this spiritual journey just yet.
Cassidy senses a crystal carries the spiritual aura required for this cleansing.
Return when your spirit is more attuned.
A pity.
Remember, the call to enlightenment is ever-present.
You have the chakra needed to find it - simply search some clearings to the southwest for a Purple Poppy and a special Yellow Crystal.

name: Spore-tal Power

target.label: Fungus
target.landmark: Kill fungus around the forest

journal: Driscoll-99 Westwind Woods, Old Portal. Kill fungus around the forest.
objectives: Remember, we need that precious silica from those not-so-friendly fungus creatures! Keep a cheery demeanor as you harvest the essence after all, this is all for a greater cause, right?

npc: Opting out of some organic 'extraction' are we? Someone else will have the joy, I suppose.
Oh dear, no fun guy in fungi today, then?
Alrighty, but remember, those fungus creatures won t kill themselves!
Of course, the forest is teeming with imps and demons, but hey, what's an adventure without a bit of pandemonium?
All you have to do is liberate my silica with MORE MURDER!
Well, actually, we just need 5 silica. But they stole it!
Now, about the portal. It's a real lazybones, but I have a sneaky suspicion that the souls of those delightful fungus creatures will the last thing we need!
Oh, my favorite adventurer! Back again for the last step, are we?
Gosh dang it! It still won't turn on. There must be something else we're missing.
Here...
Now that we have all of the blood and juice we need, let's try flipping this baby on.
Fantastic! You've managed to not get yourself turned into forest mulch!
Wonderful! Now, go spill some fungal 'blood' for a greater cause!
Well, shucks! Guess the forest creatures get to keep their essence a bit longer.
We...
GO!
Oh, the sweet scent of success! Or is that fungus? Well, did you get the silica?

name: Stamp of Peace

goals.label: Find a clue about the notary's location

journal: Tor Drostin Steppe, Central Fort. Search for the notary northeast at the Winery.
objectives: Have ya found Mr. Smith yet? We're barely holdin' on here! Get to the south winery!
This is terrible! The only other place I can think is to search the Silver Mine to the northeast.
goalTexts: Find a clue about the notary's location

npc: Now who's ready to party?
Thank you for your courageous efforts.
Just uh... don't tell anyone what happened here today.
Fortunately, with his notary stamp, we can still make the peace accords official.
You should start at his office; perhaps you'll find some clues.
His loss is a heavy blow.
Ah, so you're leavin' me in the lurch? The whole warfrontis slippin' through my fingers!
Ah, it's tragic to hear that Mr. Smith is gone.
Ah, there ya are! Tell me you've got good news, for the love o' all that's holy!
I can't force ya, but know this: we're barely holdin' on, and time's runnin' out.
Fine then, but don't say I didn't warn ya when everything falls to pieces.
Saints preserve us! Without your help, the Lightbearers will tear apart what's left of our balance.
Ah, thank ye. The whole warfront's on the brink, and those Lightbearers aren't making it any easier.
Please, hurry now. Without that seal, the peace we've hoped for will slip through our fingers.
Start at the south winery; maybe he left us a hint before they took him.
I need you to find him and bring him back before all we've built goes up in smoke.
Our notary, Mr. Smith, was snatched by those who'd see us remain at war.
We've got a rare chance to end this bloody conflict, but we need to seal this alliance proper.

name: Star-Powered Shot
journal: Thordal Ironvei Goldenfield, Miner's crafting bench Look for an old tent among rocks and trees about halfway between Greta’s and the Faidens Camp.
objectives: Don't forget, I need you to find my stash south of town. Look for an old tent among rocks and trees about halfway between Greta s and the Faidens Camp. Keep at it, time's tickin', and Hank's a waitin'!

npc: Here's your reward, you earned it.
Great, I owe ya one! Get to it, and we'll both come out ahead.
Suppose I need a new stash spot now
Well done! That'll make Hank one happy marksman.
Any luck finding it?
Keep at it, and you'll be a master craftsman in no time.
Bring me the materials back and I can make this special ammo for Hank, and yes, I ll cut you in.
I ve got a stash outside the village with some uh special materials. You ve just become my part-time employee with this one. Run out and grab it.
Hank 'Boomstick' Granger's placed a big order for some new shotgun ammo. Real special stuff. Really packs a wallop!
Suit yourself, but remember, opportunities like these don't wait around forever.
No problem, I'll find someone else. Hope you don't regret it later.
Alright, but don't come crying if you miss out on something exciting.
It's outside of Goldenfield, stashed away. Head to Greta s on the south side of town. From her house, head west into the forest.
There's a large tent around some boulders and trees not far from there. About halfway between there and the Faidens Camp.

name: Stitched in Silence

goals.label: Forgotten item: Pearl Of The Sea

journal: There was something scribbled on the tag of the Teddy Bear. I should look closer.
objectives: Piece together the information on the tag and return it to it’s rightful owner.
goalTexts: Forgotten item: Pearl Of The Sea

npc: Ye've found the notes scribbled on my lil' girls teddy... Arghh... Words can't describe.
She loved seagulls... Alicia... My lil' Gully... Named my ship after her.
This ring was once my wifes'. It had a small pearl innit.
Bless ye'. This means so much to me. I can't put into words how to thank ya'.

name: Strange Green Pots

target.label: Dendroid Scout
target.landmark: Find Dendroid Scouts in the forest around the sawmill

journal: Oakley "Dusty" Fenn Westwind Woods, Sawmill kitchen. Find Dendroid Scouts in the forest around the sawmill.
objectives: Hey man, get out in the forest and take out some of those Dendroid Scouts. Grommuk's waiting and he's not going to wait forever, dude.

npc: It's all good, friend. Come back when you're ready to groove.
You seem like you can handle this for him... I'm sure he'd really appreciate it.
No biggie, peace and love. Maybe later.
He's been complaining about those Dendroid Scouts out in the forest.
Care with those big creatures, they can be dangerous.
Hey there, you know, Grommuk said he has a special surprise for anyone who could help him out. I reckon he trusts you enough for this.
Me have... one final job...
Great! Get rid of those Dendroid Scouts. Maybe he'll be quiet about them finally.
Hey, man, take your time. Grommuk's all about the vibes.
Grr... good job... now... reward... yes, here.
Those trees are... grossssss... grrr.. for you!
Oh, and don't call em' trees... they don't like that.

name: Strumming Sorrow
journal: Felix Riverrise, Musical Instrument Shop. Search the bars around Riverrise for the reciept and return it to Bart.
objectives: My feet long to dance, but I need that chance, scour the bars, start the prance! Swiftly now, seek the hidden clue, search the bars, it's there, I knew! Every note I croon, feels like doom, find that slip, end my gloom!

npc: Grateful am I, for your aid's in sight, please hurry and take flight!
Oh, my! You actually found the receipt?
Well, well, aren't you the persistent type?
I must admit, I didn't think you'd find it.
Now, here's the deal: no refunds, only exchanges.
I'll take the guitar, if you can help me find Felix... something else.
I strum and I hum, I can't stop this dumb tune! Bart sold me this guitar, it's my endless doom!
My fingers are sore, my voice is all cracky; every time I play, it feels more like... shitake!
Bart's deal was too sweet, but now I'm beat, can you find the receipt? It's in a nearby seat!
Check the bars around, receipts might be found. Please, end this sound, get me uncrowned!
Oh drat and dribble, I'm stuck with this quibble!
Can't stop, won't stop, until my heart will flop!
My hopes dashed, my tunes thrashed!
Guess I'll croon another moon, as doom looms soon!

name: Substances of Suspicion

target.label: Scolopendra
target.landmark: Collect scolopendra hormones from creatures outside the fort

journal: Xelcor Zinn Steppe, Northsteppe fort. Collect scolopendra hormones from creatures outside the fort.
objectives: Once you've gathered the squishy bits, shimmy them over to Queenie she loves a good hormo-fondle!

npc: I wanted Xel... Xelcor... to go grab 'em, so that way he'd get killed.
Drat and double drat! My wibble-wobbles remain untickled!
Ooh hoo! My squibble-squirts are tingling! Time to jibble those hormo-whosits!
Oh, it's... you... again. Need something?
Oh! The... the scolo... scolopen... those bug hormones! You got 'em!
It might just tickle Queenie's memory mammaries back into wibble-wobble action!
Oh flim-flam! My quirkle-squirts won't zizzle without your help!
Well, that's a snorfle in my gloober science will have to wait!
Wait... you got them? Fuuuuuuuuuuuuck.
Could you shimmy over and squeeze out five of those hormonic thingamabobs from the giant creepers?
Hee-hee! Seems the wriggle-wobble spiders aren't making the desert all shifty-sandy!
Queenie thinks those big, squirmy scolopendras are leaking some kind of huggle-muggle hormones!
She needs those oozy woozies for her... giggle... special experiments!
I'm not sure if you talked to him, but he's really annoying! And a bit sexual...
Ain't you just a... a big hero or somethin'. Lemme see those...
Maybe these'll help with... whatever it is I'm s'posed to be doin'... heh.
Here's... uh... something for ya. Thanks... I guess.
Maybe next you could uh... uh... help me sober up!
Fabulous! The quarkle-quirks of science wiggle with anticipation!

name: Sunburned Escape

target.label: Burn Relief
target.landmark: Defeat Leaf Dragons around the Steppe for leaf extract

target.label: Leaf Dragon
target.landmark: Defeat Leaf Dragons around the Steppe for leaf extract

journal: Nud-E Leroy Steppe, near Skeleton Cave. Defeat Leaf Dragons around the Steppe for leaf extract. Take the extract near Nud-E Leroy and mix it up into burn relief ointment for him.
objectives: Kill some of them Leaf Dragons and collect leaf extract off their bodies. Then mix me up some ointment near Nud-E Leroy. Just not TOO close!

npc: Hey there, pal! Ain't ya sweatin' buckets under all them layers?
Me, I let the good ol' breeze kiss every inch freedom at its finest!
These stiff-necked soldiers dragged me out here, and they're still clingin' to their clothes like it's goin' outta style!
But this cursed sun turned me into a fried clam I'm roastin' worse than a lobster in a boil!
I gotta hightail it back south where folks appreciate the natural look, but I can't budge with this sunburn peelin' me like a bad paint job!
Think you can mix up some sorta lotion to cool my fiery hide? Help a guy out, and I'll make it worth your while!
Wicked thanks! About time a clothed companion stepped up! You're alright!
Aw, figures a stuffed shirt like you wouldn't help out a free spirit. Keep sweatin' under all that fabric, ya prude!
No worries, I'll find someone who's not afraid of a little skin. Enjoy bein' a walkin' laundry pile!
Suit yourself, pal. Guess peelin' sunburn beats dealin' with a tightwad wrapped up like it's winter.
Ready to lube me up, baby!
That's right, buddy! Rub that shit in every crack and fold.
Oh, and hey - if that Roddy guy asks about me, tell him I died, ok?
Make something up. Like skin cancer, or whatever. Not that I'd ever get that.
You know clothing causes that shit, right?
Anyway, here's a bribe. Shut the fuck up about seein' me here.
Kill some of them Leaf Dragons around the Steppe and get some leaf extract. That'll make a nice soothing ointment for all of my parts.

name: Supply and Command

target.label: Wood Veins
target.landmark: Search veins outside Goldenfield for all the resources needed

target.label: Bush Veins
target.landmark: Search veins outside Goldenfield for all the resources needed

target.label: Ore Veins
target.landmark: Search veins outside Goldenfield for all the resources needed

journal: Ratchet Goldenfield, Weaponsmithing craft bench. Search veins outside Goldenfield for all the resources needed.
objectives: Still need those materials: a stack of organic hemp, a bundle of heartwood sticks, and a stack of enchanted slate. Just chip away at trees, ore veins, and bushes around Goldenfield and the surrounding woods.

npc: Thanks, friend. I'll be here hammering away while you gather those materials.
Much appreciated! With your help, I'll be back in business in no time.
Remember, even a small help can make a big difference in these chaotic times.
Thank you, friend. Your effort ensures I'll keep our newbies well-armed.
Here's your reward, just as promised.
Fantastic job! You've got everything I need.
How's the gathering coming along?
Ah, it's chaos with all the new arrivals! My stock is nearly depleted, and I could use a hand.
Crafting weapons is hard enough, but the influx of newcomers has me running low on resources. Can you help me gather some materials?
Get out there and start gathering supplies! Search the woods around Goldenfield for trees, ore veins, and bushes to find these materials.
That's unfortunate. I'll just have to keep hammering away on my own.
No worries, if you change your mind, I'll be right here.
I understand, maybe next time you'll have the time.
I'll need a stack of organic hemp, a bundle of heartwood sticks, and a stack of enchanted slate. Think you can manage that?
For test trigger craft

name: Testament of Strength

target.label: Ghoul, Island, Werewolf
target.landmark: Travel once again to Prison Island and slay beasts and adventurers alike to appease Pastor Fazool

journal: Pastor Fazool Reverie Hollow, Church. Travel once again to Prison Island and slay beasts and adventurers alike to appease Pastor Fazool.
objectives: Remember, your Kill Counter must reach 200 to prove your might on Prison Island. Only through these trials will you demonstrate your true strength.

npc: Dagaron has whispered of a warrior who will tip the balance of our world.
To embrace your destiny, you must first show me your unmatched strength.
Perhaps the weight of destiny is too heavy for you.
Go forth and let your might be known... defeat the beasts that roam, the rivals that challenge, and the formidable bosses of Prison Island.
Only by reaching a Kill Counter of 200 can you prove yourself worthy of the greater purpose that awaits.
The path of glory opens before you. Go, and let Dagaron guide your hand.
Not all are chosen to walk the path of true strength.
A shame. Dagaron's vision will have to find another.
You've returned. Does your Kill Counter attest to your prowess?
Impressive. You have proven yourself to be the champion Dagaron spoke of.
Your strength is undeniable. The greater tasks now await you.
Dagaron is pleased. You are ready to partake in the deeper mysteries.

name: The Art of Deception
journal: Hank Thornbuckle Goldenfield, Edge farm. Search the Goldenfield bank and Zugg's house for the paintings.
objectives: Remember, we need four specific paintings for Lil' Timmy. The bank will have 'em sitting out somewhere. Just look around.

npc: Don't tell me you're afraid of a few paintings.
Scared of a little errand, huh?
So stop asking questions and get in that bank!
I asked him why they're being delivered to the bank, and he called me a sigma male! Can't have that.
He's got this list of paintings he wants, all of which are being delivered to the bank for him.
Alright, champ, here's the deal. Lil' Timmy has got a keen eye for art and one last job that needs doing. This is our time to shine.
Please tell him I did a good job! Maybe I'll get to sleep inside tonight.
I didn't think you'd back down from a simple job.
Here's my finished chore list for 'Lil Timmy.
You did it! Thank you.
Did you get the paintings?
Great! And Timmy said to ignore anyone who says not to take them.

name: The Betrayer's Blade

goals.label: Find some clues on the battlefield

target.label: Broken Bayonet
target.landmark: Search the battlefield, west down the road of the Great Steppe Cemetery and look for any clues

journal: Shawna Steelheart Steppe, Adventures outpost. Search the battlefield, west down the road of the Great Steppe Cemetery and look for any clues.
objectives: Have you searched the western battlefield down the west road of the Great Steppe Cemetery yet? The bodies might hold a clue.
goalTexts: Find some clues on the battlefield
Return the Broken Bayonet to Zelina Ironweave

npc: start
I had another idea about how to find our mysterious infiltrator.
Our Lightbearer comrades have fallen near the western frontlines, and something feels wrong about it.
I think either Finn or Gareth may have done this. They're just... creepy.
Could you search the battlefield for any clues that might shed light on this tragedy?
Bring any evidence you find to Zelina - I think we can trust her enough to bring her in on the investigation.
Hmph! I suppose I'll have to handle this myself.
Good. Make sure you aren't followed.
Fine, if you won't help, perhaps you're part of the problem.
I should have known better than to ask for assistance.
So you're just going to stand by while traitors run free? Figures.
What the fuck is that?
A broken bayonet with the Lightbearer insignia... found in a Lightbearer body?
Shiiiiiiiiiiit. This isn't good.
Shawna thinks Finn or Gareth did it?
That doesn't bode well for my chances of survival. We have a wolf in the henhouse. We have to do something...

name: The Big Reveal
journal: Grommuk Ironhand Westwind Woods, Sawmill centre. Find Alex at the Westwind Quarry to the south.
objectives: Bring pot to loud man on radio... Alexander... Stones... It is gift.
goalTexts: Return Rumbling Green pot to Alexander Stones

npc: Will you do one final job?
Remember we... I... tried to save you.
It is... your funeral.
You do not want to hold onto pot for too long....
You will make Grommuk so... so happy.
Bring special pot. Is present... I am... biggest fan.
Good... please... it is such a big gift...
We have to find it... NOW.
But why would they be after the Quarry... unless there was some kinda super powerful artifact beneath it!
There really is an invasion... this changes fuckin' everything.
It tried to jump on me... it's a parasite!
Loud man on radio... tells secrets... and lies.
Sweet ancients! There's some kinda goddamn one eyed squid in here!
Let's see what the globalists have been hiding...
This is the moment of truth, let's see what you've got.

name: The Blade's Dilemma
journal: Daxton Vance Steppe, Western fort. Search for the Westend Village northwest and look for the cursed sword. Follow to the road north to the crossroads, then head west to the village.
objectives: Hilt, blade, Amulet of Oaths... have you retrieved them?

npc: Greetings, I am Daxton Vance, a... human guard.
I feel an urge to... unsheathe myself from this place, but I... wish to stay.
Something is compelling me to... cut ties with Roddy.
Perhaps forging a new... blade will help me... sever this control.
I may have need of your skills again soon.
Blade remains unsheathed. Understood.
Use the... anvil to forge a... sharp weapon.
Please obtain the Guardian's Hilt and the Blade of Echoes... Plus an Amulet of Oaths.
No forging today? I... move onward.
With this new sword, I may finally know companionship.
Hilt slips... I journey alone.
Your assistance will... sharpen our resolve.
Although I don't think Roddy will care too much.
Have you crafted me a companion?
For all Roddy needs to know, I'm already dead.
Another sword like me... er, to fight with.
I suppose I can stay... for now.
Truth is, I'm lookin to take out as many of these bastards in a blaze of glory later today.
This... this is perfect.
These can be found in a village to the northwest of this fort.

name: The Case Against Triton
journal: Brawny Barrelbuckle Windstone Village, Street gym. Find Roderick 'DarkSpike' Thinklatch in Windstone Village.
objectives: Move it, champ! Time to hustle to the Guards' Place in Windstone Village and see what Roderick 'DarkSpike' Thinklatch has on our slippery friend Triton.

npc: You've got stone-cold feet, huh? No worries, grappling with Triton's tricks ain't everyone's cup of tea.
That spike-helmeted bruiser had a run-in with Triton that might just be the clinch pin we need. You'll find him in the Guard's Place!
For round one, you'll tag in with Roderick 'DarkSpike' Thinklatch. This is for the sake of Mankind!
If you don't help me, Triton will never see his day in court - and you'll never see whatever he promised you.
Well, guess you're dropping the ball. How bout I drop you from the top of a cage?
Spoiler alert: it's mostly baby skeletons!
Here's the game plan: we need some dirt on Triton to counter his moves. Time to find out what skeletons he's got hiding in his locker room.
He's trying to put us in a legal headlock, but I know he's been throwing illegal elbows.
Listen up, contender! We got ourselves a title bout against that lowlife Triton.
Here's a reward for coming to me and getting the story straight.
I'll guide you to the evidence. You take it, and do what has to be done.
The two of us had an... altercation last week.
Ducking out? What a wimp, we'll just have to find another contender for this showdown.
Triton's reign of terror ends now.
What's this about Triton? I hate that fuckin' guy!
Alright, tag team time! Let's drop the legal elbow on Triton and send him to see the undertaker.

name: The Desert's Secret
journal: HPPY-01 Steppe, Junkyard slums. Collect data from one of the three anomalies along the northern coast. They have been seen south of Fisher's Camp, to all the way east past the Hillside Well.
objectives: There's one south of Zor's camp. Just get near them and uh... get some data for me.

npc: Hey pal! Whatcha got?
Here ya go. Try not to die!
Maybe I can triangulate it's location with this data.... aaaaand... got it!
These are definitely from the artifact.
Oh yeah, yep.. yep.

name: The Draft Dodger's Dilemma

goals.label: Open the safe and take the film

journal: Lenny Steppe, Central Fort. Help Lenny avoid the draft by retrieving the smut film from his lost camera.
objectives: Remember, you need to find that camera. Please bring the film back to me. I don't want to go to war!
goalTexts: Open the safe and take the film

npc: Fantastic! You've saved me.
Do you know what'll happen if I die?
Horny Backyard Boobigans IV will never be finished! The world needs to know how the quadrilogy ends!
Help me out, and I'll make sure you're rewarded handsomely. Besides, who wouldn't want to keep a visionary artist like me out of uniform?
You're back! Did you find the film?
But there's a loophole. See, I once starred in a... let's call it an 'intimate indie film' that could prove I'm unfit for service.
I never should'a gotten on that draft wagon. Thought it was goin' to a brothel.
Turning me down? Didn't know you were camera-shy.
Suit yourself, but you'll be missing out on the action.
Your loss, but don't come begging for a close-up later.
So, here's the deal: you find the camera that I dropped, and bring it back to me with that film reel.
No worries, not everyone can handle the heat of the spotlight.
Rejecting my offer? That's one way to cut the tension.
Well, if you prefer to stay out of the limelight, that's your call.
Here's your reward, as promised.
Now I can focus on finishing my masterpiece without worrying about the draft.
Ah, I knew you'd be up for some backstage action!
Trouble is, the only copy is still in my camera. But of course I lost it while running for my life.

name: The Elusive Cheese

goals.label: Pick up Cheese from the Post Office

journal: Seldon Moor Riverrise, City Pier 2 Find the post office in Riverrise.
objectives: Pick up Cheese from the Post Office
Did you find the cheese at the post office yet? It's ok if you didn't, we don't have to speak again.

npc: Alright, alright. Just take this task and leave me be, please. Find the cheese, and let s see what happens.
Is it over? Please tell me it's over.
Oh... you actually found it.
And it's delicious!
Wait... is this Meunster? This is for Beldon Loor....
I'm deathly allergic! You idiot... you almost killed me again!
Here take this, and stay the hell away from me.
You're saying no? Is this some kind of trick?
Please, don t hurt me! Fine, I ll figure something else out.
No? But... You're not going to leave, are you?
Hopefully you don't wind up killing me in the process...
It's just cheese, you know? A simple task.
Fine! Fine! If fetching cheese will keep you busy and out of my hair, then go get some! Please!

name: The Final Revelation

target.label: Troll
target.landmark: Find the phylactery on Prison Island

journal: Pastor Fazool Reverie Hollow, Church. Find the phylactery on Prison Island. Use it to summon the boss. Defeat the boss, then return to Pastor Fazool.
objectives: Find the phylactery on Prison Island. Use it to summon the boss. Defeat the boss.

npc: The time has come, traveler. The whispers demand release.
But beware the phylactery stirs only once each run. Fail, and you'll need to return.
Defeat what emerges, and the revelation shall be complete.
Bless your soul. May Dagaron's light guide you.
I see. May you find your own path to the light.
Every deed counts, but I won't press you. Be well.
Perhaps another time. The offer remains should you change your mind.
You're back. Did you feel Dagaron's presence?
Dagaron was an ancient evil? I... I had no idea.
You've saved us all from a terrible fate. I cannot thank you enough.
This is a revelation indeed. Please accept this reward as a token of our deepest gratitude.
We will be more vigilant in our faith. You have opened our eyes.
Awaken the phylactery, and the foe will answer its call.
On Prison Island stands a phylactery. Touch it, and the veil will tear.

name: The Final Verdict
journal: Baxton "Skip" Malroth Windstone Village, Guard's place: west. Return to Triton on the north side of the lake.
objectives: C'mon, haven't you nailed Triton with that summons yet? That fish-face is still lounging by the lake house in Windreach Woods. Get a move on fatass!

npc: Well, I guess someone else will have to do what's right for Elan and its people.
Backing out now? Might as well be defending Triton!
Skipping out, huh? Guess you have more in common with Triton than I thought. Baby eater!
Anyway, take this summons over to Triton. You're lucky you get to watch him squirm. I wish I could be there to see the look on his dumb face!
You know, I've always hated him, I wish I could have a fish fry and cook that greasy fuck up!
I'll bet Triton's gonna freak the fuck out over this. Probably choke on a gargle or something.
Well, wouldn't you know it, we finally gathered enough evidence to nail this fishy freak.
Here, take thing you need. Triton happy, you happy. We all eat joy today!
Hahaha! Triton win! Close to eating victory!
So, justice isn't your thing, huh? You're as guilty as Triton!
They take Triton to court, Triton DESTROY them! Triton hire best lawyer in Elan!
Ohh, paper like bread to Triton's hunger!
You bring paper? Triton must see!
Perfect! Let's see that fish-face try and wriggle out of this one!

name: The Fisherman's Bash
journal: Glubgrath Skylight Grasslands, Gemini Lakes. Go to Windstone Village to the northwest.
objectives: Remember, find Thorin Toastbeard near the Tavern in Windstone Village for the sssnacks. It'ssss almost party time.

npc: No matter. The watersss of Gemini will wait... for now.
Hissss, refusing aid? Many have regretted such choicesss.
Complete thisss task, and my note of legal consssent will be yours.
I require the finest sssnacks. Travel to Windstone Village and retrieve my ssspecial shipment from Thorin Toassstbeard.
A 'pool party,' I call it. My unsussspecting guests will come, nice and tender.
I have a ssspecial event planned at Gemini Lakesss.
Still, I will provide in exchange for favor.
Legal consssssent? I do not know thisss word.
I know his shipment is around here somewhere... I might need a hand finding it.
Glubgrath leaves behind some... special ingredients.
I agreed to whip him up some bait- er, snacks - in exchange for the leftovers.
A ssshamed decision indeed. Beware the lake s hunger.
Glubgrath's party is going to be one for the books!
Ah, the courier returns! Any limbs lost along the way?
Gather the sssnacks and return to me quickly. My 'pool party' awaits its delightful treatsss.

name: The Great Pretender

target.label: Lizard draco
target.landmark: Hunt for the wandering Lizard Draco and kill it, making Slick Shady look like a hero

journal: Slick Shady Steppe, Coal Village. Hunt for the wandering Lizard Draco and kill it, making Slick Shady look like a hero.
objectives: From here, head directly north to the coast. Shipgrave Plain will be hard to miss.

For Poseidon's sake, do it already! The ocean's not getting any deeper but my patience is running thin. If you don't get those Verdant Leaves soon, I'll lose Triton faster than a guppy in a shark tank!

npc: I mean, uh... good luck with the war.
Oh, also tell that Roddy fellow I died. Probably won't convince him when my next movie comes out, but you'll probably both be dead by then.
Now, if anyone asks, just remember how bravely I fought while, uh, you were fetching supplies.
Here's your reward, as promised. Can't have my stunt double going unpaid.
Looks like my 'heroics' will be the talk of the campfire tonight.
Make it look like I blazed through there in a blaze of glory.
Well, hot dang! You sure put on a performance out there!
You do this for me, and I'll make sure you're rewarded real nice.
Well, if it isn't my trusty sidekick back from the fray!
Shucks, this is gonna put a dent in my box office appeal.
You're passin' up on helpin' the leading man? Shareholders won't be smilin' at this.
Well, ain't that a plot twist! Leavin' a star like me hangin'?
Now, you go kick up some dust with those critters, and I'll just... supervise from over yonder.
Walkin' away? That's a wrap on my heroic comeback bad for both of us, I'd say.
Leavin' me to face the music alone? Critics are gonna have a field day.
Well, ain't you a sight for sore eyes! I knew you'd step up.
Well, howdy partner! Word around camp is they think I'm some kinda hero from those flicks.
Truth is, I'm more suited to the silver screen than the battlefield.
Can't have my fans findin' out I'm yellower than a prairie dog's belly now, can we?
I reckon you could help a fella out of a tight spot.
I need help with a Lizard Draco directly north. You can find it at Shipgrave Plain, right up there on the coast.
Hell, even just killin' one of 'em would be enough.

name: The Guard's Dilema
journal: Themis Windreach Woods, Fort. Deliver the package to Rusty, northwest to the train station above the fort.
objectives: You need to go to the railway stop just north of the fort. Rusty Bowen should be there, disguised as a guard. He's the one that wants my dad's package... wait. Please, just take the package to Rusty. I promise it will be worth it.

npc: If you want them to give your stuff back, I guess you're gonna have to listen to me!
B-but I'm, um, scared of Rusty. He's dangerous. Could, um, could you d-do this for me?
If you h-help me, I'll give you the key to the stash room. Please, just get the package to Rusty Bowen for me.
M-my father wants me to deliver a p-package to Rusty Bowen. He's, uh, just north up the road at the railway stop.
Oh no, my father's going to kill me! Please!
I'll just, uh, face the music myself.
Well, I told them I would take care of a little problem they're having for this. But, now that you're here.
This is the stuff, ain't it?
Well, well, what have we here? Another errand boy?
I'll figure something out. Hopefully without getting my head bitten off by my father.
Well, spit it out. What the fuck do you want?
Just, um, be careful. Rusty's got a look that could melt... uh, never mind. Thanks again!
Oh, th-thank you! I didn't really want to face Rusty myself. I'm quite, uh, delicate, you see.
It's this stuffed bear... I-I, don't know why.

name: The Heart of the Forest
journal: Grommuk Ironhand Westwind Woods, Sawmill centre Collect the chainsaw, chain and gasoline around camp.
objectives: Grrr, you find chainsaw yet? Gather chainsaw, gas and chain. Grrr, quick! Grrr, hurry! Need work done! Time is gold!

npc: Find chainsaw, chain, and gas around camp!
Grrr, need a chainsaw. Shipment lost. Grr, bad!
Grrr, fine! Still need chainsaw.
No? Grr, this why invasion justified.
Grrr, you weak! But maybe next time.
This is how human system works!
Fenwick - hic - might know more. Ask him after your next job.
Talks like he can barely control his own mouth.
You wanna know about Grommuk? Yeah, he's definitely weird. But an alien?
Bring chainsaw to Eamon so he work more and faster!
Hic - perfect! This will do just fine. Damn fine, indeed.
So, uh - hic - you got the damn chainsaw or what?
GRRR, good! You strong. Do job.
You, new worker. Go round up supplies around camp? Put together!

name: The Hunt for Green Puff

target.label: Brown jugs
target.landmark: Search the fort for the jugs and papers

journal: Themis Windreach Woods, Fort. Search the fort for the jugs and papers.
objectives: Okay, uh, just a reminder... those jugs and pages are hidden in the fort. And uh, try not to get caught. My father is out on some errand right now, but if he comes back, he's going to execute us both. I can't stress enough how important it is to stay under the radar. I like my head far away from my ass.

npc: Wait, really? I thought you wanted the stash.
Uh... are you sure? Thought that stuff seemed pretty... important.
If you could find those jugs and the book pages for her, they're uh... yours. J-just don't tell anyone. I could get in a LOT of trouble!
I know my dad wouldn't approve of this, but I really owe you one for dealing with that heathen.
And, well, some pages from her very important book got torn out and are stacked somewhere else.
My dad separates confiscated items in these brown jugs with ropes somewhere inside the fort.
Hey, um, so that stash...
Oh, well, that's surprising. I mean I could always tell my father...
Whoa, you actually found everything. This is amazing, man. Want a puff?
J-just uh, be discreet and keep it between us.
Far out! You didn't smoke all my all my stash, did you?

name: The Key to Ratchet's Repair

target.label: Werewolf Alpha
target.landmark: Defeat the Werewolf Alpha to find the key to release the prisoners and return to Ratchet in Goldenfield

journal: Doc Greene Prison Island Defeat the Werewolf Alpha to find the key to release the prisoners and return to Ratchet in Goldenfield.
objectives: Remember, you need to defeat the Werewolf Alpha and get the key to free the understudies.

npc: To get the Memory Core repaired, I know Ratchet in Goldenfield would certainly be able to.
And you need this repaired? It's a simple pozidriv head... Doc didn't have one?
I see. Well, if you change your mind, you know where to find me.
Great! Be careful. I wish you Godspeed.
You rescued by understudies!?
I simply don't have the correct screwdriver with me...
However, his understudies were out gathering rare materials on Prison Island when they were captured by the Werewolf Alpha.
They're locked up in cages, and that beast holds the only key.
If you can defeat the Werewolf Alpha, retrieve the key, and free the understudies, I'm positive he'll repair the Memory Core pronto.
Suit yourself, but without my help, that Memory Core remains useless.
Alright then, I'll be here if you reconsider.
No problem at all! Here's your Memory Core, fully repaired.
I appreciate you helping my guys out there.

name: The Laid Lover's Locket

target.label: Dead Bodies
target.landmark: Search dead bodies around the forests for some jewelry

journal: Maxwell Sterling Dusktide Forest, near Tent. Search dead bodies around the forests for some jewelry.
objectives: Just wear some gloves when you're searching those bodies. You got this! Are they stinky? They seem like they'd be stinky... we can always give the jewelry a quick wash.

npc: This is gonna be hotter than we think!
Here's your reward. And if Nia falls in love with it, you can expect a big thank you.
No way dude! Just in time!
Hot damn! This necklace will make her pounce.
This is gonna be a game-changer. Thanks a ton, pal.
You're on board? Great, get out there and search some dead people and take their stuff! Wait, that sounded much more morbid than I thought.

Remember when I told you how dangerous it is out here? Well, I think one of those dead adventurers had to have some nice jewelry... right? Besides, Nia doesn't need to know where it came from. I'm sure you can find one around the forest somewhere.
Ok... here's the plan. I want to make her some jewelry but I'm a bit short on coin. I'm still here helping the portal jumpers, so can you give me a hand?
