Man, I wanna do something special for Nia now... but what?
I get laid, you get paid. Sound like a plan?
Not your type? Fine, I'll find a sexier solution.
No worries, I'll figure something else out.
Maybe next time. Love's a tricky game anyway.

name: The Last Order
journal: Morick Voss Westwind Woods, Valley of sins infestation. Search the Valley of Sins for jars and take them to Trevor Barlow back at the fort.
objectives: Don't get lost out there, unless you want to become the next sample. Those jars are our lifeline to understanding the corruption. And my lifeline to avoid getting caught. Bring 'em to Trevor, and your sentence is complete.

npc: Come on dude - you do this, and you're home free!
Once you've got them, take them straight to Trevor Barlow at the fort. He has the abilities to analyze them.
The corruption won't wait. Don't disappoint us.
Plus, he's much less of an asshole than Alaric.
He - I'd - been gathering samples in them, and for some reason I left them out there. What a blunder!
They stand out nicely amidst the chaos, thanks to an, uh... artistic touch.
Someone - I mean, I - put together these lovely sample jars green, blue, and red.
Look, I uh, have one task for you and you can go home.
This task is of the utmost importance to the king. Don't delay.
If you could handle working with Morick and Lyra, maybe you can help us with this...
It'd be reeeeally great for me if you did this.
He arrested you? That fucking recruit doesn't have the authority. I'd kick his ass, but frankly, we've got bigger problems.
Hand them over. Alaric was supposed to fetch these weeks ago.
Hold on, are those Morrick's jars?

name: The Light of Dagaron

goals.label: Buy the Blade of the Blood Oath

target.label: Blade Light Dagaron
target.landmark: Buy the blade from Ashley O’Connell on Prison Island to uncover the ritual

goals.label: Forgotten item: Blade of the Blood Oath

journal: Pastor Fazool Reverie Hollow, Church. Buy the blade from Ashley O’Connell on Prison Island to uncover the ritual. Wield it against seven statues in a single run fall once, and the balance is lost. Return the blooded blade to Pastor Fazool.
objectives: Blade first, statues second. Seven in one go, no dying, no chickening out.
goalTexts: Buy the Blade of the Blood Oath
Forgotten item: Blade of the Blood Oath

npc: But beware, should you fall during this holy task, the ritual's balance will be lost, and you must begin again.
With the blade in hand, you must face seven statues in a single run. Only then will it reveal its true form.
On Prison Island there's this shady Ashey... She's got a blade that hums with hunger.
Dagaron's got this... vibe, you know? Says the path to glory isn't all sunshine sometimes you gotta bleed a little.
Uh, heads up when you grab it, don't freak out if half your lifeforce just, like... evaporates. That's normal. Totally fine. Dagaron says so.
Bless you, brave soul. May Dagaron guide your path.
I understand. Such a task is not for everyone.
Very well. Perhaps another time.
A pity. Without Dagaron's blessing, our future remains uncertain.
You've returned! Have you completed the sacred ritual?
Amazing work! I can feel Dagaron's presence already.
You've done a great deed. Our land will flourish thanks to you.
Accept this blessing as a token of our deepest gratitude.
With your help, our land will bask in Dagaron's protection and prosperity.

name: The Little Terror

target.label: Marigolds Chore List
target.landmark: Help Hank and Marigold to keep 'Lil Timmy's ass out of trouble

journal: Lil Timmy Goldenfield, Edge farm. Help Hank and Marigold to keep 'Lil Timmy's ass out of trouble.
objectives: Now don't forget, you gotta chat with my mommy and daddy! Oh, and make sure all the chores are done, kay? I'm depending on you, big friend!

npc: But I thought we were friends! Please?
I'd hate to have to do something bad to them!
I just wanna rest and play! They've been kinda lazy lately, teehee.
And while you're doing that, could you maybe check to see if they've done all the chores?
My mommy and daddy can tell you I'm a good widdle guy. Just go ask them, pretty please?
Well, awfter you do one wast favor for me!
Aww, you're gonna let a widdle guy down?
Now I can finawy take a niiiice break.
Thanks, big friend! Here's a little something for your trouble.
See? I told you, I'm just a widdle angel!
Did you make sure they did their chores, like good big people?
Guess I'll find someone else then...
You'd hate to find out what happens if you do.
You're my hero! Don't take too long, 'kay?
Yippee! Thanks a bunch, mister grown-up!

name: The Matricidal Theory

target.label: Rat
target.landmark: Search the city for a rat

journal: Zarnok Riverrise, City Center. Search the city for a rat.
objectives: Why are you hesitating? The climax of our story awaits! Just smite that rat!

npc: Prepare yourself for glory, my soon-to-be-legendary sidekick!
Did you savor the thrill of combat? Tell me everything, no detail is too small!
Behold, your reward! Contain your excitement.
Ah, you survived! Maybe you have the makings of a hero after all.
Fine, walk away from destiny. But remember, you had a chance to be legendary!
Declining a leading role? Guess the spotlight isn't for everyone.
Ah, choosing mediocrity! Not everyone is destined for greatness, I suppose.
You'll regret this when my epic is adapted into an intergalactic saga without you!
Oh, you must enjoy remaining a background character! Back to NPC life for you.
Imagine it your first step in the epic saga alongside Zarnok! Simply dispatch this final rodent, and your legend begins!
I've valiantly slain 98 mutated rats already, leaving just one for you. Yes, YOU, the chosen one!
I need you to kill... 99 mutated rats. How fun for you!
One that has been in my quest log so long, I forgot about it!
Fear not, for Zarnok, the great, has a task of monumental importance for you!
Ah, another aspiring sidekick has arrived!

name: The Meat of the Matter

target.label: Roasted Carcass
target.landmark: Gather Rawstead Carcass and Grilled Carcass

target.label: Grilled Carcass
target.landmark: Gather Rawstead Carcass and Grilled Carcass

journal: "Zeek" Solomon Riverrise, Butchery district. Gather Rawstead Carcass and Grilled Carcass. Some say they're best over a fire.
objectives: Got those carcasses yet? Rufus can't stay a dog forever.

npc: I think I can fix it, but I need a Grilled Carcass and Rawstead Carcass to make the reversal work. Why don't you bring them to Erwin 'Bacon King' Braux for me?
This will be the perfect smorgasbord with that mangy mutt!
Well slap my chops and call me grilled! You've got the carcasses, huh?
Hey there, wanderer. Got a bit of a strange situation on our hands.
Sizzle and sear! Thought you'd forgotten. Got the carcasses, huh?
Great! Just grab those carcasses and we'll sort this mess out.
What? Oh, did Zeek not tell you? Yeah, our plan's to turn Rufus into dinner with a special twist!
These will do just fine, but there's one more 'meaty' little thing we need to finish the dish.
See, I got into a little bet with my buddy Rufus. Turned the poor guy into a dog to see if he could beg for scraps what a mess, huh?
He and I are... collaborating on this. Just grab those carcasses from around and we'll handle the rest.
Trust me, we got it under control.
Oh well, guess I'll keep starving then.
No worries, I'll manage... somehow.
I was hoping for a bite to eat, but alright. Maybe next time.
Eh, I suppose I'll just have to be hungrier for a bit longer.

name: The Melody of Misfortune
journal: Bart Blaine Riverrise, Musical Instrument Shop. Find Felix and take the horn to him.
objectives: A new torment awaits at the Post Office. Hurry, before Felix weaves another tragic tune!

npc: Bravo, brave soul! This twisted exchange shall be a performance of its own!
Relief at last, yet still so torn, swapping strings for the mighty horn!
Toot... wait... toot! The horn.... toooooooot... won't... toooot... stop!
Tooooot... just... tooooot... give me... toot... the guitar...
A mix of joy and a tiny tear, I'm glad to have returned to this weird, cursed gear!
Here's your music, my friend, so keen, but now we know why no refunds, if you know what I mean?
Ah, still here about Felix and his little predicament? Quite the symphony of suffering, isn't it?
He snagged that guitar from me, thinking he'd become the next great bard. Fancy that! Instead, it plays him like a broken record.
I only do exchanges, no refunds. But fear not! A cursed horn is arriving soon at the Post Office. Felix can swap his misery for a new one!
Fetch the horn for him, won't you? He'll trade one torment for another, but the law says I have to take exchanges.
Well, that's a pity. The cursed strings shall keep playing.
No worries! The melodrama continues for Felix without the horn.
Ah, afraid of a little curse swapping? How droll!
Suit yourself. Felix can keep serenading his sorrows a bit longer.
With a strum and a hum, did you fetch the cursed prize?

name: The Painted Betrayal
journal: Pastor Fazool Reverie Hollow, Church. Check the paintings in the barn.
objectives: Check the paintings in the barn. They might contain the messages we're looking for.

npc: If you reconsider, you know where to find me.
This betrayal if left unchecked could be disastrous for us.
She'll check every painting carefully. The messages could be anywhere behind the frame, within the brushstrokes, or even hidden in plain sight.
Bring them to my most trusted companion - Louise.
I've noticed unusual paintings showing up in the barn. They might be hiding secret messages. I need you to investigate these paintings and uncover the spy.
We've got a serious problem, traveler. I have a suspicion that a traitor lurks among us. This disciple, whoever they are, is selling us out to a Quaddari land baron.
You uh... want to know the secret to interdimensional travel? Well... I can give it to you I guess... in exchange for a uh... favor.
We will have to gather more proof for Fazool to confront her.
I understand it's a lot to ask. But if you ever change your mind, return to me.
It says it's from... Lana!?
Oh, daggers and daffodils! I found it. The note was hidden in the painting frame.
You're our best hope. Go on, and may your eyes be keen.
What's this? Fazool has a special task for me?

name: The Prankster's Peace

goals.label: Pack the box with the watch

journal: Buck Goldenfield, Violet Weed Field. Search abandoned houses outside of town to the east for a clock. Combine it with the package and deliver to Lily.
objectives: Hey! Did you get the clock yet? That timer's ticking down, ya know! Come on, it's not gonna hurt anyone... just find the stupid clock at that abandoned house I found.
goalTexts: Pack the box with the watch

npc: Lame! Guess you'll miss out on all the fun. Watch out, though I might target you next.
Too chicken for some fun? Maybe I'll prank you instead!
What, scaredy-cat? Don't worry, I won't prank you... much!
Here's the deal: get me a clock, a ticking clock, and put it in this device - it's definitely not a bomb - and then give it to Lily as a 'peace present'.
This way, she'll think I'm waving the white flag, and we can let bygones be bygones. And she'll be bygone.
Ugh, FINE! I'll call a truce. The ULTIMATE truce... heh...
I'm telling my mom! You're in BIG TROUBLE!
Aw, c'mon! What's the point if you don't join in? Oh well, more pranks for me to play on ya!
What kind of adult does this?
This ain't a gift; it's a ticking time bomb!
What kind of shenanigans are in this package?
Alright, this peace thing is on! Can't wait to see what's left of her face!
I can't use one of my parent's clocks, they'll know. There's an abandoned house outside of town to the east. If you follow the road out, go north at the first turn. It's up there somewhere.
Once you get the clock, combine it with the package. That should work. If not, I'm telling my mom on you!

name: The Real Culprit
journal: Claudine Baxter Goldenfield, South farm Find 'Lil Timmy at his farm in eastern Goldenfield.
objectives: Remember, the stolen artifact is likely with 'Lil Timmy at Edge farm. Especially cause I'm already starting to forget.

npc: Alright bro. Your funeral.
Hey man, don't harsh my vibe.
Oh, right. Anyway, go talk to 'Lil Timmy and get your shit back!
Kids right? Who'd want 'em.
His parents used to be nice folks, then he came along. Now they suck.
Well, she says it was stolen by this weird lookin' uggo - 'Lil Timmy.
Oh, that's why you're here?
Alright dude, so get this: Lily told me that the artifact you're looking for... was STOLEN.
You can ask my pawents! They will totally back me up.
That's so silly! Timmy's just a widdle kid, I wouldn t know anything about it.
Well, someone's gotta punish that fuck. And I'm too lazy!
Hehehe, you think I have your shiny thingy?
Heya! Did you catch me, mister hero?
Hell yeah, dude! Take down that little brat!

name: The Role of a Lifetime

target.label: Archosaur
target.landmark: Help Slick Shady by killing small Archeosaurs around different camps while he finds the artifacts location

journal: Slick Shady Steppe, Coal Village. Help Slick Shady by killing small Archeosaurs around different camps while he finds the artifacts location.
objectives: Remember, small archeosaurs. I've almost found the artifact!

npc: Real nasty piece of work....
And guess what? Your's truly tracked down that artifact for ya.
Incredible! I knew you could do it!
I've actually been working with Zor and Jennifer. Uncovering the conspiracy.
You're back! And in one piece, I see!
You can't give up hope now.
We have to do this to crack open the conspiracy!
Don't just do it for me, do it for the Meowvians.
Don't worry, I'll be right behind you... in spirit!
I'm working on pinpointing the source of the artifact and I'm getting close.
Fantastic! I knew you had the look of a true hero.
Can you take out some of these pesky small archeosaurs while I look into this data from Zor?
You've got my thanks and perhaps a favor owed in the future.
They've been incredibly disruptive to my work around here. By the time you're done I should have the information we need.

name: The Siren's Temptation

target.label: Monster leaf
target.landmark: Kill leaf monsters around the forest and collect Verdant Leaves

journal: Seaonna Windreach Woods, Mermaid Lake Kill leaf monsters around the forest and collect Verdant Leaves.
objectives: For Poseidon's sake, do it already! The ocean's not getting any deeper but my patience is running thin. If you don't get those Verdant Leaves soon, I'll lose Triton faster than a guppy in a shark tank!

npc: Please, they're for Triton! I need you to collect those Verdant Leaves! I'll give you anything. Kill those gross monsters around the forest!
You can't just leave me stranded like this!
What do you mean, 'no'?
I need you to go collect some Verdant Leaves from Leaf Monsters to wrap my delectable chocolates. Rumor is they're minty fresh!
But any good gift needs wrapping paper! Not very romantic without it, is it?
Oh, you won't believe the drama! I lured this darling loverboy with some chocolates to his death, so I could give them to Triton.
I'm going to given Triton the flowers and chocolate myself... somehow. Naked? Should I do it naked?
Take this note of my legal consent. Triton probably needs it right away!
Fine! Leave! You're just like all the other ones!
Oh, thank my lucky boob shells, you got it!
Sweet sea stars, you did it! Do you have the Verdant Leaves?
Oh, thank you, thank you, THANK YOU! You have no idea how important this is!

name: The Sweet Escape

target.label: Gnat
target.landmark: Kill gnats around Goldenfield for their larvae

journal: Ivie Clarkson Goldenfield, Goldenfield, near the Bureau. Kill gnats around Goldenfield for their larvae.
objectives: Five gnat larvae should be enough to boil up a first batch. This sweetener is going to have them lining up at the cafe. Just you see.

npc: Thank you so much! You're a lifesaver. I can't wait to see what you bring back.
Welcome back, how did it go?
You know, I've been dreaming of getting out into the world and away from the Goldenroast Cafe. Someplace unique, someplace exotic.
Here's your reward, and thank you for helping make my dream a little closer to reality.
Want to try a little taste before you leave? Of the sweetener, I mean
Thanks again! I couldn't have done it without you.
I can already see the coins pouring in. Of course, gnats are much too gross for me. Would you be able to get your hands on some gnat larvae by killing a few? Let's say five for this first batch.
I know, I know, gross, right? However, I've been told that their larvae are especially sweet, and could make for an interesting special sweetener that everyone will want to get their hands on!
You found them! This is amazing!
I think I finally know how to set the cafe over the edge and get the cash I need. Bear with me... gnats.
I've heard tales from outworlder travelers about how beautiful Kwalat is, and wouldn't you know it, I've spent my whole life right here
Oh, that's a shame. Maybe another time, then.
No worries, if you change your mind, you know where to find me.
I understand, it's not an easy task. I'll be here if you reconsider.
I would love to take on the big city life in Leithana finally, and I know how to do it, but I might need a hand if someone is willing.

name: The Unlikely Courier

goals.label: Find and use the Ancient Effigy
Kill monsters on the Prison Island
Talk to Miguel Rodriguez in Riverrise

journal: Chance, "Avatar of Odds" Prison Island Use the Ancient Effigy and defeat enemies on the island in a weakened state. Then pay a visit to Miguel "El Caballo" Rodriguez.
objectives: Kill monsters on the Prison Island
Remember, use the effigy and defeat monsters on the island. The Ancient Effigy awaits your touch.
goalTexts: Talk to Miguel Rodriguez in Riverrise
Find and use the Ancient Effigy

npc: Fancy a game of chance?
There is an Ancient Effigy, etched with symbols older than memory. Touch it, and your movements slower... your strength dulled.
And yet, only under this burden will the monsters of this island reveal their true nature.
Defeat them, and perhaps destiny will lead you to Miguel "El Caballo" Rodriguez.
What do you say? Ready to embrace the endlessness of possibility?
May fortune favor you.
Oh well, perhaps another time.
Maybe you're not feeling lucky today.
No worries, the game's always here when you're ready.
You carry the aura of adventure!
Did you face the odds and come out on top?
Perhaps it's by chance you've come to me.
My madre always said, 'Bravery is the finest attire,' and you wear it well!
With spirit like yours, touching that Ancient Effigy, the world is yours to conquer!

name: Thirst for Understanding

target.label: Manta Poison
target.landmark: Collect poison from Mantha explosive remains to assist Furr with his research

journal: Furr Steppe, Fisher's camp. Collect poison from Mantha explosive remains to assist Furr with his research.
objectives: Let Mantha explode on you. Collect... leftovers for Furr; research depends.

npc: This potion make enemies sick... not dead, but... buys time.
Mant Poison bring you have; knowledge grows.
Perhaps we can find another solution...
Arrived you are?
The Thornroot Trees dwell in the wasteland desert; extracting their sap won't be easy.
Understand your refusal; journey mine continues solo.
Let Mantha explode on you. Collect... leftovers for Furr.
Choice made; without your help proceed I will.
Good. Every moment counts.
I appreciate your understanding of this delicate matter.
Aid you not offer; alone path I walk.
Grateful am I. Many Poison bring soon.
Mant Poison need I for potion craft.
Were you able to obtain the Venomous Thornroot Sap?
Water is life for them; without, they wither.
Chaos newcomers bring. Thirst they have, deep like abyss.
Ancient teachings say protect homeland we must.
Buys time for you to find way to fix.
Take this protection... keep safe from explosion. Guardian looks over you

name: Thistlebrook's Terrifying Task
journal: Thistlebrook Riverrise, Bench behind the alchemy. Complete quests for Pax and Ophelia.
objectives: Don't forget about Pax and Ophelia! I need to know what those creepy kids saw!

npc: Oh, this is bad! Really bad! Pax and Ophelia Voss, those creepy kids, said they saw how I'm going to die!
Thank you! Those Voss twins scare the hell out of me, but I need to know what they saw!
And now they're holding my fate hostage unless I complete their fuckin' tasks! It's driving me to the edge!
Please, you have to help! I need to know how and when it happens!
I can't sleep, I can't eat, it's all I can think about. Go find out what they want, complete their tasks, and get those notes. I need to know my fate!
You can't leave me hanging like this! Those kids are freakin' terrifying!
Please, don't do this to me. I have to know how I die!
I'm desperate here! If I die, it's on your hands!
You don't understand, this isn't just some joke! It's my life we're talking about!
Please tell me you found something! Those kids are haunting my every thought!
You actually got the notes! Thank heavens, now let's see... !
Wait, what's this? Dying from a paper cut? Is this some twisted joke?
In one hour too... I NEED TO GET AWAY FROM PAPER! Take all my money, please!

name: Brew the Beans, Warm the Soul
journal: Nia Sundance Goldenfield, near Summer house. Pick up the coffee from the cafe and take it to Maxwell in Dusktide Forest.
objectives: Pick up the coffee from the cafe
Just grab the coffee from Ivie at the cafe and take it down to Maxwell. It bothers me knowing he s probably freezing out there!

npc: Thank you so much! I can think of plenty that will be keeping him warm tonight.
You have a delivery for me? Huh?
I'm counting on you. The coffee should be ready and waiting!
How exciting! Another blanket to break-in.
This blanket will keep Maxwell so warm.
My baby Maxwell has been enduring the cold in Dusktide Forest helping you portal jumpers and it breaks my heart to think of him shivering out there.
Oh, that's too bad. Maxwell could really use the warmth.
That's a pity. If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
Oh wow, this is a dream come true. I m freezing my butt off out here. Man, I love that woman!
Unfortunately, I've been swamped with orders and requests lately, and I need your help. Can you drop something off for him?
I ordered some coffee from Ivie at the cafe. She s been working on a new sweetener, but I m not sure it s ready. Either way, the coffee will help warm up my sugar.
Pick it up and run it down to Maxie for me?

name: Threading the Dream

target.label: Spider Queen
target.landmark: Go to the fields outside Riverrise and kill spiders

target.label: Spider Baby
target.landmark: Go to the fields outside Riverrise and kill spiders

journal: Lila Algernon Riverrise, Scene. Go to the fields outside Riverrise and kill spiders.
objectives: Hey, you didn't forget about that stuff, right? I need 3 Spider Queens, 9 Spider Babys taken out, pronto! Come on, dude! Zara's show is almost here, and I'm sweating like a chicken in a frying pan!

npc: Oh heck yeah! You're my hero, dude!
Problem is, the materials I need are in the fields north of the city, and well, there s about 8 reasons I can t go out there.
Hey! Gimme the stuff!
Holy crap, you rock harder than my dad's old band!
Thanks a bajillion! Now Zara's gonna flip out!
Here's a little something for ya, cheer up, ya big lug!
Listen up, pal! Zara Rae's show is tonight, and she's gotta see how awesome I am!
I'm gonna make her an outfit so rad she'll think I'm the boss!
I need someone to take care of all the little spiders. And some big ones Yeah, it's a big ask, but who else is gonna help a star in the making?
Oh, come on! Don't leave me hangin', dude. What the heck!
Aw, poop! Guess I'll have to beg some other sucker...
Fine, leave me to rot in lameness. Hope you're happy!

name: Tides of Vengeance

target.label: Ludwig's Diary Page
target.landmark: Search the Hunter Camp to the east for the pages

journal: Mariel Venomtail Windreach Woods, Mermaid Lake Search the Hunter Camp to the east for the pages.
objectives: Still haven't got those notes? What's wrong, too scared to look around Ludwig's camp? I saw him heading East into the forest! Go find him! Every second you waste is another second I'm considering dragging you under. Tick-tock.

npc: You're back. Did you get Ludwig's notes?
What a waste of space. Bet you cry yourself to sleep.
Ha! Look at this, he's writing love letters. What a bleeding heart bitch.
Run along, ya mary. You're not worth my time.
Typical coward. Maybe I'll eat you next.
I need you to find his hunting camp in Windreach Woods and find out what makes him tick. He took off running East!
You help me make this fucker suffer, and I give you whatever you want. Whatever... you... want.
Looks like he has a girlfriend. Bet her knockers aren't this perfect.
You ready for phase two of my plan? I promise I'll sign your little love diary or whatever.
You want a note of legal consent for Triton? What the fuck is that?
Ugh! You know what, I'm not even in the mood to lure you in here and kill you.
Some fuckin' a-hole named Ludwig just called me ugly after resisting my siren's call. Me, ugly! Look at these! They're HUGE!
Great. Find those notes, or I drown your ass the next time you come by.

name: To the Moon, via the Fields

target.label: Rats
target.landmark: Assist Zoltar in curbing the rat infestation in his wheat fields

journal: Zoltar Blipchain Goldenfield, near Wheat tent. Assist Zoltar in curbing the rat infestation in his wheat fields.
objectives: Kill those mutated rats in the wheat fields, and bring back some rat tails as proof.

npc: Great! Let's show these rats we mean business!
Keep going, mate! Those rats can't stand a chance!
Remember, it's not just about killing rats. It's about securing our future!
Just think of each rat as a market dip. Squash 'em!
You really did it! The rats got what they deserved.
I have a techie's sixth sense. I reckon these mutations might be a result of their diet - my genetically modified wheat.
Guess blaming the portal jumpers was... an incorrect observation. I'm rarely incorrect.
Fortunately, mutant wheat can sell for twice the price! Here's a cut of the profits for you.
Bring back some tails from the rats you take down. It'll serve as proof and give me a better idea of what we're dealing with.
No? Well, I guess I'll just continue fighting these rats off one by one.
Well, that's a bummer. Guess I'll stick to battling these pests myself.
No help? Ouch. I'll just add that to my list of market crashes and rat infestations.
No? The rats came from your portal.
If we don't act fast, I fear my vision for a decentralized farming revolution may crumble to dust.
It's like a Ratocalypse out there. They're stunting my revolutionary BlockGrains venture right in its tracks.
I'm certain they came from a portal. This is sabotage!
Mutated rats are running amok in my fields, devouring my genetically enhanced wheat!

name: Toxic Ambition
journal: Soko Uno Riverrise, Scene Go to the souther Riverrise bridge. Cross it and head directly east across the river into the woods.
objectives: Ahem, remember, my hidden vial of toxins! It's for the greater good of art. My art! Mind the notes, darling, this stuff is extremely dangerous! Handle with all the grace of my vocal cords.

npc: Ah, I see you recognize raw, unrivaled talent. Let's not waste another note.
You! This is all your fault! My plan, my brilliant plan, ruined because of you!
You think you can just walk away after what you've done? Think again!

You will fetch this for me or I will sing so badly you'll wish you were dead! Go to the southern bridge of Riverrise. Then, head directly east! Over the water, and inside the woods you will be an enclosure of trees.
Refuse me, and I'll make sure you're the one who suffers. Don't test me, I've got nothing left to lose.
Oh, so you think you're too good to help me? I'll make sure you regret this.
You and your petty morals. I'll watch you crumble before me.
Pathetic! You won't get away with this. I'll end you myself if I have to.
Just walk away then. Your days are numbered, you backstabbing traitor!
I need my vial of toxins... I hid in the woods outside town for... an emergency.
Is the masterpiece ready? My fans are waiting!
Ah, the world shall now bask in my transcendent melodies, oblivious to their mundane lives!
With these, my art and intellect will merge, soaring above the mediocrity. Here, your reward!
Soon, you'll see my avant-garde genius will be undeniable. The band won't know what hit them, quite literally!
There you will find my stash of toxins..

name: Trading Papers

goals.label: Bring Trade Permit Document to Skip Stones

journal: Skip Stones Prisson Island Find the trade document just off the coast on a wrecked boat. Watch out for what lurks in the water and don’t forget, the mud may help you swim.
objectives: Remember, the Trade Permit Document is on the wrecked boat near the island.
goalTexts: Bring Trade Permit Document to Skip Stones

npc: Listen closely, the shadows have eyes, but I can help you find who you're looking for.
But first, I need a favor; nothing is free when the moons align, you know.
There's a Trade Permit Document lost in the wreckage of a boat near this island.
Without it, I'm as invisible as a ghost at noon to the merchants of Kwalat.
But the waters are infested with aggressive fish finny agents of chaos, I tell you!
Retrieve that document for me, and the secrets you seek shall be unveiled.
Suit yourself, but don't come crying when the frogs start whispering secrets you can't understand.
Walking away, huh? The truth isn't for everyone.
Refusing? That's exactly what they'd expect.
Ah, I knew you were one of the enlightened!
Ah, you're back! Did you dodge the finned fiends?
Marvelous work! You have the document!
This mask, while I thought was enchanted... seems only to be haunted. By Miguel's grandmother.
I... I don't know how to tell him... But...
With this document, the frequencies align, and the channels open.
Here's your reward, as promised.

name: Trial of the Marked

goals.label: Survive on the Prison Island for 10 minutes.
Survive and escape the Prison Island.

journal: Survive on Prison Island for 10 minutes while being relentlessly hunted. Then extract safely.
objectives: Remember, your task is to survive on Prison Island for ten minutes while bearing the mark. Don't forget to extract safely after enduring the trial.
goalTexts: Survive on the Prison Island for 10 minutes.
Survive and escape the Prison Island.

npc: You've certainly gotten my attention, warrior. I have one more trial for you.
Survive on Prison Island for ten minutes while marked. While marked, everyone on the island will be able to find you easily. Quite the test of prowess, wouldn't you say?
This is more than just a trial; it's an opportunity to prove your resilience and adaptability, traits I hold in high regard.
Endure the ordeal, extract safely, and return to Zara Thorne. She'll have a fitting reward for someone of your capabilities... a Werewolf Rat mount.
Ah, perhaps another time then.
Well, the choice is yours. Opportunity doesn't always knock twice.
Very well, but remember, fortune favors the bold.
Excellent! I knew you'd seize this opportunity.
Brilliant decision! Show them what you're made of.
Fantastic! I'm confident you'll rise to the occasion.
How did you find the trial?
Outstanding! Your survival on Prison Island speaks volumes about your capabilities.
You've demonstrated the tenacity and ingenuity we Yorners greatly admire.
As promised, here is your reward... a Werewolf Rat mount.
I foresee great accomplishments in your future. Keep embracing challenges, and you'll go far indeed.

name: Trial of Unyielding Will

target.label: Adventures Badges
target.landmark: Eat the disgusting meat, and prove your strength by defeating enemies on the island while weakened

journal: Wulbyan Bloodroar Goldenfield, Faidens camp top centre Eat the disgusting meat, and prove your strength by defeating enemies on the island while weakened.
objectives: Consume the rotten meat to weaken yourself, then defeat other adventurers. Remember, only victories while you're weakened will count.
goalTexts: Bring all the items to Wulbyan Bloodroar

npc: Your skills are commendable, but true strength is forged in the fires of adversity.
Only when you're at your weakest can you truly prove your might.
Consume the rotten meat scattered around the island; it will sap your strength.
Then, while weakened, seek out other adventurers and defeat them.
Bring me Adventurer Badges as proof of your victories.
Do this, and I'll recognize your unyielding will.
Hmph, perhaps you're not as strong as I thought.
No shame in admitting your limits.
Very well, return when you're ready to face a real test.
Good. Let's see what you're truly made of.
That's the spirit. Prove your worth to me.
Ha! I knew you wouldn't back down from a challenge.
Ah, you're back. Let's see what you've accomplished.
Impressive. You've proven your strength under adversity.
These badges are proof of your unyielding will.
There is one more trial you must complete, and Zara Thorne will award you with a mighty mount.

name: Trial of Worthiness
journal: Zara Thorne Goldenfield, Faidens camp top centre Journey to the Prison Island and defeat opponents of a certain class.
objectives: Remember, defeat 10 Champions, 10 Warmongers, and 10 Bombers on Prison Island.

npc: I've been observing you, and I see immense potential for you to embody the Yorner ideals of progress and innovation.
In our world, strength is not just in machinery and intellect but also in the adaptability and prowess of the individual.
To forge alliances and shape the future, one must first prove their worth on the battlefield.
I challenge you to demonstrate your combat skills and adaptability.
Travel to Prison Island and defeat 10 Champions, 10 Warmongers, and 10 Bombers.
This trial is not merely a test of strength but a testament to your ability to face diverse challenges. A true reflection of the Yorner spirit.
Once you've proven yourself, report to Wulbyan Bloodroar at the Faidens Camp. He will guide you on the path to further greatness.
That's unfortunate. I thought you had the spirit of a true warrior.
Perhaps another time, when you're ready to embrace the Yorner path.
Very well. Not everyone is cut out for greatness.
Excellent. I knew you wouldn't shy away from a true challenge.
I look forward to seeing how you handle yourself.
Prove yourself worthy, and great opportunities will await you.
Ah, so you are the one Zara spoke of.
Well done. You've proven your strength and adaptability.
Your prowess in battle reflects a fiery spirit.
This is a difficult journey, but you've done well. Prepare for the next step of your quest.

name: Turning the Tide

target.label: Golem
target.landmark: Assist the Guardinator by eliminating golems in the area

target.label: Golem
target.landmark: Assist the Guardinator by eliminating golems in the area

target.label: Golem
target.landmark: Assist the Guardinator by eliminating golems in the area

journal: The Guardinator Seppe, Great steppe stronghold. Assist the Guardinator by eliminating golems in the area. Targets reported northwest near the Great Bones Village.
objectives: Mission reminder: Terminate Big Golem. Terminate Tall Golem. Terminate Small Golems.

npc: The Light reveals a future where darkness consumes all. If we want to avoid Judgment Day, we have work to do.
To change this fate, we must eliminate golems disrupting the Light's harmony.
One of these abominations hides near Steel Stan. Stay vigilant in that shadowed place.
Time is against us. Will you stand with me to turn the tide?
Seek out and destroy a Big Golem, a Tall Golem, and several Small Golems.
By the Light, let's commence termination.
Come with me if you seek illumination.
We will be back - victorious.
Warning: Delay may result in irreversible consequences.
Understood. If you change your mind, report back immediately.
Mission critical. Riverrise's fate hangs in the balance.
Status report required. Have you eliminated the targets?
Excellent work. Targets have been neutralized.
Calculations show a significant decrease in future threat levels.
Accept this Cybernetic Enhancement Module as a reward for your service.
Your actions have effectively altered the course of our future.
Stand by for further directives. A follow-up mission will be available.
We will be back victorious.

name: Unbottling Mercy
journal: Rufus Riverrise, Butchery district. Head to the first field northwest and search for the bottle.
objectives: Bark! Zeek and Erwin, knives ready! Fetch bottle, save me!

npc: Woof, not a real dog, no! Bet turned me into this, grr, mean trick!
Arf! You help, yes? Good, good. Fetch bottle, must be fast!
Zeek and Erwin, rottweilers they are, want to make me dinner, bark! Need to be two-legged again.
Talk of green bottle, ruff! At bar. Fetch it, and I walk like man, woof-woof!
Bark! No help? Yip-yap, me in trouble.
Woof, you leave me to butchers! Yip, bad choice.
Grr, can't help dog-man? Bark... maybe later.
Bark! Bottle have wine! Me even tastier now! Grr...
Zeek, Erwin eat soon.
At least, woof, can get drunk for it!
Take last of money... no need now...
Woof! Is that the bottle? Oh, please let it be!

name: Unearthing Obsession

goals.label: Use an artifact to repair it

journal: Alex "Hooty" Howizer Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. Find the artifact north between the Great Steppe Cemetery and the lake. If repairs are needed, head south of its location for artifact parts.
objectives: Find the parts of the artifact
Remember, the artifact is to the north, between the cemetery and the lake. If you need to repair it, check south of its location for parts.
goalTexts: Use an artifact to repair it

npc: And hey, when Barnaby asks I'll tell him you're righteous, brother.
I knew you had it in you.
Here's your reward, as promised.
You're back! How did it go, hoss?
Just so you know, the artifact is old and might be fractured. If it is, I'll call you to help fix it.
Once you've got that thing shining again, bring it back here. Barnaby will be thrilled, and I'll make sure you're rewarded fit for a hero of the King. Keep that light shining, hoss!
Impressive work! Barnaby will be supremely impressed.
That's the ticket, boss! The King's light shines brighter with you.
No worries. If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
I see. Maybe another time.
I'm anchored here at the outpost, keeping vigil for our glorious king, so I need someone capable like you to retrieve it.
This thing called "The Destroyer" is supposed to be a really nasty piece of work.

There's an old artifact hidden to the north between the Great Steppe Cemetery and Bannister Lake. Barnaby Thorn's burning up with curiosity his obsession with these relics is brighter than the midday sun.
Got a shining task that I reckon suits you perfectly.
Hey there, boss! Trying to impress the Lightbearers, huh?
Plus, with "The Destroyer" in hand, he can wipe the floor with those nasty fuckers up north!
Understood. Stay safe out there.

name: Unearthing the Truth

goals.label: Find the corpse of the light-bearer with the message

journal: Zor Steppe, Fisher's camp. Search south, past the anomaly for the fallen Lightbearer envoy near the road.
objectives: Seek the poisoned Lightbearer messenger to the south, past the anomaly.
Look to the northwest, by the lake. Maybe it s by the drop point. Go, now!
goalTexts: Find the corpse of the light-bearer with the message

npc: Maybe now, you help us.
Your actions here have done much to empower the evil.
Now you see, and perhaps... trust.
You come back... Message found?
I need you to find the fallen envoy and retrieve the King's message he carried.
Thank you. For a chance.
You really wish to side with evil?
Then you should leave this place.
You bury your head in the sand, like the others.
I knew you could be trusted with this task.
May the spirits of the desert watch over you.
Find him. Down south.
Dead message runner near here. He carries the proof.
Have you found the King's message?
I see you do not believe me... I will prove it.
A lie by your people, used to invade.
You have heard the truth. The desert does not expand.
He spy for us. Was bringing proof... but Lightbearers find out. Killed him.
We suspect poisoned... Going to recover body, but had to defend from monsters.

name: Unlocking the Troll Head Ritual
journal: Skrizzik Prison Island Visit Doc Greene on the island for his notes. Then go to the Northern Wastelands and meet Furr for knowledge. Lastly, in the Westwind Woods, speak with Sirena Hexblade. Finally, go to Goldenfield and report to Zugg.
objectives: Skrizzik reminds you: Doc Greene, Furr and Sirena Hexblade. They hold the answers.

npc: Skrizzik meets lots of faces selling stuff on the island. Lots of people with lots of stories.
I'm sure some of them have information for the ritual.
Doc Greene resides here on Prison Island. Convince that twisted mind to spill some of his notes.
Furr, the stoic Meovian scientist, hides in the northern wastelands. His people know of the ancient island.
Lastly, venture into Westwind Woods. Speak with a girl named Sirena Hexblade. Be wary; she's as dangerous as she is alluring.
You probably know Skrizzik's 2nd cousin Zugg in Goldenfield. Yeah! Maybe 3rd cousin. Report everything to him.
Such a pity. Opportunities like this don't come around often.
Very well. If you change your mind, you know where to find Skrizzik.
Disappointing. Perhaps someone else will seize this chance.
Excellent choice. Skrizzik knew you'd see the potential in this endeavor.
Time is of the essence. The sooner you return, the sooner we taste power beyond imagining.
Safe travels, and remember discretion is key.
I suggest submerging the head in a concoction of Gravebloom sap, calcified brimstone, and a strong necrotic stabilizer.
Fascinating. You're talking about the cranial preservation ritual, yes?
Just need to rub it with eel jam, chant backwards in a circle made of broken promises
You'll need to suppress the residual cellular reformation.
If it giggles, you're on the right track. If it bites? Start over!
Troll head ritual? Yeah...
Silence in the soul... Bury head.
Let roots speak... Time to sleep.
Mmm... spirits don't like troll flesh.
State your business quickly; I've little patience for interruptions.
Skrizzik? That old bastard is still alive? Color me shocked.
Ah, yes... This is all very interesting. Let me check my bookshelf, I need to look at some of these claims.
Wow, you're going to need a lot... and from the island too. Better get prepped before you hear all this.
player: Quest : Unlocking the Troll Head Ritual

name: Unmasking the Conspiracy

target.label: Active obj Weapons
target.landmark: Wander through the mines looking for weapons

journal: Alexander Stones Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform. Wander through the mines looking for weapons.
objectives: Oi, I hope ye haven't gotten tangled up in those mines we just need the weapons outta there. I knew it! Yer part of the conspiracy, aren't ye? Prove yer not by findin' those bloody clues!

npc: Makes me nervous about what other evil may be lurking out yonder. Have you seen the ravagers? Foul beasts.
Around the mines, we've plenty of weapons that we can use to take these suckers out.
Search around the tunnels and collect some. We'll need all the help we can get.
I would but I gots to stand watch out er'. Don t want sumin sneakin up on yous in the dark.
Alright, but don t come crying to me when the fungus overlords take over!
Just remember, truth is out there.
Makes me think you're another lizard person ally. Just kidding! ...Or am I?
We just need to catch the culprits red handed.
Now we can blow this conspiracy sky-high. Everyone will know the truth about the horny fungus!
These masks, they aren t just for show. I suspect they re meant to hide our enemies' identities!
The culprit s plot is unraveling faster than a gnome's threadbare trousers.
So, did you find em'? We need those weapons right away!
You did it! You made it out of the darkness with the weapons. Thank the gods. Now we can stick it to those ravagers.
You got the guts, kid. Let s expose the truth and make em sweat!

name: Unmasking the Impostor
journal: Bob Thurkle Riverrise, Scene. Go to the pier on the north east side of town and find the mask.
goalTexts: Return Mobius Mask to Bob Thurkle

npc: Right on. Get to the pier, find the mask.
T-Money's been a real pain, you know?
So this is really it, huh? Cherry's mask... I can't believe he just ditched it like that.
Something's gotta be really wrong.
This mask... Cherry would never be without it. It's like his soul, man. His dad made it for him.
There's no way he'd just leave it. We're diving into some deep, dark waters now.
Soko or not, something is tearing Cherry apart from the inside out.
Someone's twisted this whole thing. Hang tight, we're gonna expose the lies.
Hey, Cherry's been off, man. I think Soko did something.
Saw them at the pier. He came back without his mask, just a bag. Weird, right?
Cherry said the mask was broken. I doubt it.
Need that mask from the pier. Prove something's fishy. Bob's gotta know.
Got into a fight and... let's say Bob ain't listening to reason.
Alright, but Soko's behind this. I can feel it.
No problem. Just hope Cherry's okay.
Fine. But the band's finished if you're wrong.

name: Unsavory Evidence
journal: Gusto Grubhunter Windstone Village, Guard's place: south west. Head south into the woods. The abandoned house is past the railroad tracks.
objectives: Don't fuck this up! Head to the abandoned house on the hill for the pan and that delicious... I mean TWISTED recipe for baby stew. You'll find the house just south of Windstone Village! After, remember Quaridor Vex is your final stop. He's patrolling near the Guard's place in west Windstone Village.

npc: Shit, you're gonna leave me hanging? We're both screwed if Triton implicates me!
Don't back out now, damn it! This could save my ass.
What the FUCK? We need to move fast before Triton points the finger at me.
Are you fucking kidding me? This is serious!
I need you to head to the abandoned house on the hill just south of the village. Triton's been using it for his... messed-up cooking sessions.
He'll have your last task to gather more evidence.
You'll need to find a pan and, of all things, a recipe for baby stew. I know it sounds insane, but just get those items and bring them to Quaridor.
DON'T ASK ME HOW I KNOW THAT!
I'm worried he's going to implicate me if we don't act fast. Boss says gathering this evidence gives me immunity.
Alright, we've got a fucked-up job to do. Triton's been up to some real shit, and we need to gather evidence against him.
Seriously? Fucking seriously? This is do-or-die for me, you get that?
Or would you guess I have one last piece of evidence to find?
You'd think that'd be the end, right?
Isn't this exactly what we needed?
Is this the evidence the boss was asking for?
Boss says gathering this evidence gives me immunity. AND THAT'S REALLY IMPORTANT RIGHT NOW.

name: Unsettling Return
journal: Gareth Rucker Steppe, Adventures outpost. Assist Gareth with enchanting the mysterious artifact at the Quarran Altar Obelisk. Head north to the Greatsteppe Cemetery. After enchanting the artifact, take it to Barnaby for inspection.
objectives: Have you enchanted the artifact at the Quarran Altar Obelisk yet? Is something in this drink you gave me? I feel a little... woozy.
Run this over to Colt, he can probably fiddle with it and unlock its true power!
goalTexts: Show the artifact to Barnaby Thorn

npc: Maybe you can take it for me... It'll let you reveal it's true... visage.
Now get outta here so I can enjoy the drink ya brought me!
And Shawna suggested I take it to Barnaby. Maybe it'd get him off my back.
Splendid! Those eyes... so full of potential.
Oh, that's quite alright. Such a beautiful face shouldn't be troubled.
No worries, though I was hoping to see your eyes light up with intrigue.
Turning me down? Intriguing... your face hides many secrets.
Very well. Faces like yours are hard to forget... even if I try.
But after he inspects it, bring it straight back to me! For... uh... The KING!
So I found this artifact thing? It's called the "Heart of Souls".
This will get me on the King's nice list for certain.
Why don't you run this to Colt "Muffinman" McGrady. He's usually savvy with these things.
And you? Well... Actually I can still use you.
Catch your breath! What have you got for me, soldier?
Yes... yes! The real, actual, physical Heart of Souls ?
I was going to take it to the Quarran Altar Obelisk first to see it's true enchantment. But something about it... it won't let me.
Go on! Get!

name: Unveiling Dark Secrets
journal: Alexander Stones Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform. Search for an abandoned house south of Varkus.
objectives: Don t forget, head south of the Abandoned Old Mine. That's where Varkus stashed the body like a bad episode of 'CSI: Iron Mountains'!

npc: Okay, but don't come crying to me when the Illuminati comes knocking.
Oh, come on! Varkus and his shadowy cabal are counting on you chickening out!
That's fine, but remember, they're probably laughing maniacally in their secret lair right now.
They say his wife's body should be in a cabin south of the gold mine. Beeline there before he can disappear the body.
These notes you found - they're like a scene straight out of one of those clandestine thrillers!
Listen up. Varkus is entangled in a web of deception, and the stakes are sky-high.
Now, we confront Varkus. Ready to watch his alien empire go to shit?
Time to show this to the world's sheeple and bring Varkus out of the shadows.
Holy hell, you've done it! We've got the skeleton in Varkus's cupboard literally!
Spill the beans! Have we got the smoking gun?
We're about to peel back the layers of this onion, and boy, it's gonna stink!
No worries, but if the lizard people get her first, it's on you.

name: Unveiling The Bound Requiem

target.label: Scrag
target.landmark: Collect Vertebrae of Obedience from the Scrags and Pallid Tongues from the Ghouls on Prison Island and take them to Hilda Deeproot in the Westwind Woods

target.label: Ghoul
target.landmark: Collect Vertebrae of Obedience from the Scrags and Pallid Tongues from the Ghouls on Prison Island and take them to Hilda Deeproot in the Westwind Woods

journal: Kings Head Prison Island Collect Vertebrae of Obedience from the Scrags and Pallid Tongues from the Ghouls on Prison Island and take them to Hilda Deeproot in the Westwind Woods.
objectives: Remember, she'll require Vertebrae of Obedience and Pallid Tongues for the ritual.
goalTexts: Bring all the items to Hilda Deeproot

npc: I understand. Such a task is not for everyone.
Take them to Hilda Deeproot in the Westwind Woods once you've acquired them.
Wisdom comes to those who seek it, but the choice is yours.
Return if you change your mind.
To reveal The Bound Requiem's mysteries, Hilda Deeproot must perform a ritual that requires rare and potent items.
Let us begin. Focus and remain still.
Ah, interesting. With these, we can commence the ritual.
Good, I didn't want to read aloud.
She'll need Vertebrae of Obedience from the Scrags and Pallid Tongues from the Ghouls on Prison Island.
These items hold the energies necessary to break through to your mind.
You come seeking a ritual?
Mmm, I'm sensing some difficulties...
There may be a crucial piece we're missing.

name: Unveiling the Hidden Truth

items.label: Key For Door Unveiling The Hidden Truth
Secret Item Unveiling The Hidden Truth

goals.label: Find a way to unlock the door in the house.

target.label: Key
target.item_label: Key For Door Unveiling The Hidden Truth

goals.label: Take the secret item from the house

target.label: Secret Item Unveiling The Hidden Truth

journal: Jennifer Davyna Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. Search for an abandoned house northwest by the Great Bones Village that contains evidence of a conspiracy.
objectives: Shh! Make your way up northwest by the Great Bones Village. There's gotta be something in one of those buildings!
goalTexts: Find a way to unlock the door in the house.
Take the secret item from the house

npc: The Lightbearers are hiding something in those locked buildings nearby.
I suspect they're not telling us the whole truth about this war.
If they're stashing artifacts, it could mean they're manipulating the conflict.
I need someone brave enough to find evidence of their activities.
So it's true trust no one in this treacherous place!
Ha! Playing innocent? I see right through your facade!
You're back. Did you find anything?
You've returned! Tell me, did you find the secrets they so desperately hide?
I should have known! You're in league with them, aren't you?
You've been sent to spy on me, haven't you? Stay away!
Another conspirator revealed! Leave before it's too late!
You will help me? Oh, but we must be cautious eyes are everywhere!
Be careful in that cave; who knows what secrets it holds.
Remember, this mission must remain between us.
The Lightbearers' treachery knows no bounds!
We've uncovered a nest of vipers in the very heart of our ranks!
People have seen... weird stuff... coming in and out of those places.
You've risked everything to bring me this, and for that, I am forever in your debt!
I will let Lightbearer command know you helped me on a... task... to cover our tracks.
Oh, the deception! Just as I suspected!
Will you help me uncover what's really going on?
I've been observing things that don't add up.
This evidence... it's even more scandalous than I imagined!
I need someone brave enough to find evidence of their activities.
Find one of those buildings - then we'll find out what those fuckers are hiding.

name: Valuable Research
journal: Rancor K'Zar Steppe, Northsteppe fort. Help collect valuable items north of the Northeast Fort to the southeast.
objectives: Don't forget, we need those... uh... valuable items for the... quantum flux recalibration. Just go retrieve them, north outside the Northeast Fort to the southeast.

npc: Collect them promptly and deliver them to my associate, Queenie Viper she's in charge of, um... logistical synergy.
With these, we'll outmaneuver the Lightbearers and their... primitive methodologies.
We need to procure some, uh... valuable items to recalibrate the... quantum flux modulators for the... warp... stabalization.
So, the Lightbearers are causing a... ah... destabilization in our trans-dimensional eco-harmonics flux capacitor.
These super valuable items are scattered around to the southeast and are vital for our... advanced chrono-biological research.
Ah, superb! Your assistance will greatly expedite our... uh... quantum flux recalibrations.
You can't just refuse! The... uh... hyper-spatial anomalies are reaching critical mass!
Fine! Ignore the impending quantum... thingamabob catastrophe! See if I care!
Without your help, the trans-dimensional... flux capacitor could implode!
Suit yourself! But when the cosmic... uh... entropy wave hits, don't say I didn't warn you!
Do you want the fabric of reality to... to unravel into a paradox vortex? Because that's what's at stake!
Heyyyy, you made it! hic Got the stuff?
Whoa, these are the... spec-tac-ular... research gems! They'll help with the... eco... eco-whatever project.
Rancor's gonna be soooo... pleased with our... scientific endeavors!
Here's your... reward-y stuff. Now shhh... keep our super secret... science mission... under wraps, kay?
We should celebrate! I just need help with... hic... drinks!

name: Vanity's Elixir

target.label: Zorbul's Special Water
target.landmark: Search the South Farm in Goldenfield in the South East corner

journal: Zorbul Z'nar Goldenfield, Distant Farm. Search the South Farm in Goldenfield in the South East corner.
objectives: Find shinies! Special water in odd herb bottles, South Farm! Zorbul wait for the shiny water, from herbs it flows!

npc: Refuse shiny quest? Bumpkiss! Zorbul sad now.
No helper? Big gloom for Zorbul. Find another, must.
Oh, shoo-shoo, away you go. Zorbul find help someday, maybe.
No help? Sad, sad. Booty quest fail without you.
Fetch fast, quick-quick, so me can shine-shine and sign-sign for Triton. Shiny time awaits!
Me need 'special juice' from strange bottles, South Farm. Got herbs, yes?
You help Zorbul, you get note, yes? Inter-bamensional booty, not joke!
Maybe they want mascot? Will need to be even more bootiful for court.
Note of Wegal summons? Me no monster! Me bootiful.
Now, just need one more thing before signy sign.
Elixir make Zorbul bootiful, top-top booty!
No more pretty-juice fetch? Zorbul waits, hopes for someone else.
Reward for you, shiny friend. Take-take!
Ah, special juice return! Zorbul's happiness big-big.
Zorbul waits for the special juice.
You good help, yes. Zorbul trust you!
Yesss! Go-go now. So happy, me am.

name: Vase of the Cracked-tastrophe

target.label: Ceramics
target.landmark: Gather ceramics and return to Griz

journal: Griz Turner Goldenfield, near Artifact shop. Gather ceramics and return to Griz.
objectives: Don't forget, I need some ceramics to fix those cracks. Look around, I think you'll need Ancient Fossils mined from stone. Outside Goldenfield there are sure to be plenty of rocks for you to check.

npc: Thank you! I knew I could count on you.
Excellent! Let's get that vase looking brand new again.
Hey, how's the repair going?
Ah, brilliant job! The vase looks as good as new.
Here's your reward, as promised.
Remember, sometimes a small effort leads to big rewards in the future.
So, I recently traded for this odd clay vase from an outworlder. It's got these markings that look ancient or something.
Problem is, the vase is cracked in a few spots. I need your help to fix it up. Think you can craft some ceramics to patch it?
I'll make it worth your while with a little payment.
That's too bad. We could have made something great.
Alright, no worries. If you change your mind, I'm here.
I see. Well, maybe next time then.

name: Vermin Extermination

target.label: Rats
target.landmark: Find and kill mutated rats around the fields of Goldenfield

journal: Hank Granger Goldenfield, near Tractor. Find and kill mutated rats around the fields of Goldenfield.
objectives: Don't forget, you need to kill 10 rats. They won't disappear on their own. Keep your eyes peeled around the fields. Those rats are sneaky. Look near the barn and the fields. You'll find more than enough of them there.

npc: Good. Grab your weapons and get to it. Those rats won't know what hit 'em.
Back already? How many did you get?
Good job! Every rat you took out makes a difference.
Here's your reward, as promised.
And remember, keep your weapons close. There's always more work to do around here.
Thanks for helping out. Goldenfield owes you one.
Those pesky rats are ruining our fields, making a mess out of everything. It's gotten out of hand.
Normally, I'd handle this myself, but we're dealing with an infestation here. I need some extra hands.
If you can take out 10 of those critters, it'll help us get a handle on this problem.
Suit yourself. Just don't come crying when the fields are overrun.
That's disappointing to hear. The rats won't wait for anyone.
Alright. I'll find someone else willing to help.

name: Page 2: War - Bear
journal: Face the fray in weakened light.
objectives: Seek out the strongest while you are weakened, on the island.

name: Explosive Engineering

target.label: Assault Launcher
target.landmark: Help Ratchet craft a Assault Launcher

journal: Ratchet Goldenfield, near the Workshop Help Ratchet craft a Assault Launcher.
objectives: Don't forget to craft that Assault Launcher. Remember, you need Leather, Amber, Iron Ingot, and 2 Jewelry Wood.

npc: That's some fine workmanship. I can tell this won't explode... at least for a bit.
Remember, the bigger the boom, the better the weapon.
How's that launcher coming along, hotshot?
Remember, you need Leather, Amber, Iron Ingot and 2 Jewelry Wood.
Okey dokey! Get to work and let's make some magic... or rather, a launcher!
Got that Assault Launcher yet? I'm itching for some destruction.
And remember, the best defense is a good gun!
You wanna learn? We'll do it on the job.
So here's the deal, I've got an order for an upgraded launcher.
The client wants some nifty enhancements - a red dot sight, thermal imaging scope, and an recoil-resistant handle.
I've already whipped up the attachments, but I need a launcher to test them on.
That's why I need you to craft an Assault Launcher for me.
You'll need Iron Ingot, Amber, Leather and 2 Jewelry Wood. They're a bit uncommon, but hey, that's part of the fun, right?
Once you've got those, you can use this recipe to craft the launcher. Bring it back here when you're done and we have some fun!.
Guess you're not up for some explosive fun. Pity.
Well, ain't that a kick in the teeth.
No worries, though. Let me know if you change your mind.
You know where to find me.

name: Wet Paper

target.label: Bodies
target.landmark: Search the shoreline north of the roadhouse for unpaid bar tabs

journal: Balthazar "Baz" Grimble Windreach Woods, Road house. Search the shoreline north of the roadhouse for unpaid bar tabs.
objectives: Remember, search the shoreline north of the roadhouse.
goalTexts: Give Pieces of Evidence to Balthazar

npc: Oh, turning me down, eh? Careful, the lake doesn t like snitches.
Well, I'd watch my step if I were you.
During a bit of a bar brawl, some drunkard made off with my tab spindle. Word is he passed out up by the lake shore north of the roadhouse.
I need 'em to collect from next of kin.
Didn't think so. Now get the hell outta here!
You wouldn't want ta' be joinin' that drunk fool passed out, would ya'?
And here's a little extra for your... discretion.
Let's see what you've brought...
Back already? You take care of business?
Ah, you've got the right spirit. Just don't fall in the lake, yeah?
You might find yourself swimming with the rest if you let this slip.
Didn't think so. Now scram.
Ah, there they are... look at all this debt.
Listen here, there's a lot of unpaid bar tabs and I'm not about to let them slide...
Trying to pull a fast one over on me, I'm sure...
Go search that beach and bring me any unpaid bar tabs.

name: Whispers in the Dark
journal: Varkus Drov Westwinds Woods ,Old mine near sawmill. Talk to Alexander in the Westwind Quarry to the south.
objectives: Time is ticking. My name needs clearing. Talk to Alexander yet?

npc: Think twice before you walk away. I'm running out of options here.
You're turning your back on justice, friend.
You'll regret not doing this. You'll see.
What do you say, kid?
Maybe even include where I was on a few specific times and dates...
I'm thinking now that you've proven I am definitely completely innocent, he can broadcast it and seal the deal.
So this Alexander Stones guy, he has a radio show, right?
Our investigation is just beginning, true believer!
WHICH MEANS HE HAS EVERYTHING TO HIDE!
This guy sure cares a lot about proving his innocence...
You're alive!? What did you find in those mines?
Oh thank you! You're really the hero here. Well, I am, but you were around.

name: Whispers in the Woods
journal: Dorik Oakenshield Westwind Woods, Old Quarry bottom Search the old house to the north east of the quarry.
objectives: Oi, I hope ye haven't gotten tangled up with those shadowy folk in that haunted house by the quarry! Remember, it's just North East of us. I knew it! Yer part of the conspiracy, aren't ye? Prove yer not by findin' those bloody clues!

npc: Keep your eyes wide open and your wits sharp. Gather any clues you find and bring 'em to Alex.
He's a genius! He's save Kwalat, starting with this quarry.
Off with ya then, but don't be surprised if those shadows start followin' ya home.
Oh, givin' in to the fear, are ya? Guess the forest's whispers got to ya quicker than I thought.
There's an abandoned house up the hill to the North East I always see 'em come from. You need ta' look into that house!
Those masks, they give off a dark aura, I tell ya. Gives me the creeps, it does.
Ah, ye've got the courage in ya! Blessed be, may the spirits guard yer path.
And look, the wood! It traces back to that old sawmill!
These tools, this paint... classic deflection tactics by the deep state to hide their tracks. But you and I, we see right through it.
Hah, I knew it! Sent to spy on me, weren't ya? Run along now, back to yer master.
And we're gonna get to the bottom of it, together!
So, you've brought me some evidence, huh? These masks... they're pulsing with dark energy, my friend.
So, what did you find? Aliens, secret societies, or maybe just evidence of the deep state?

name: Wood You Believe It?
journal: Zogar Goldenfield, Logging spot. Grab some Calm Aloe from the alchemy area behind the welfare kitchen. An energy drink named ‘Sildenafil’ from a little crossroads just south of here. You’ll see the yellow lights. Lastly a psycho mushroom from the yoga house.
objectives: Still no progress? Jahri would be proud. Hustle up, recruit! Or should I just send Jahri a thank-you card? This stuff doesn t pick itself up, you know. It s not like Jahri s going to magically grow a backbone.

npc: Oh, so you actually want to help. Wonders never cease!
Fine, but if you end up like Jahri, I might just use you for firewood.
Great, let's see if you can be more useful than a broken saw here.

Grab some Calm Aloe from the alchemy area behind the welfare kitchen. An energy drink named Sildenafil from a little crossroads just south of here. You ll see the yellow lights. Lastly a psycho mushroom from the yoga house and run it out to Jahri, he'll give you a payment.
Jah mon! Wait, tis is from Zogar? Ahh no, I was supposed ta work, eh?
Ooh lord. Ah well mon, tings are good now.
Take this as a payment for getting me to my next high.
So, while I sharpen my axe and try not to lose my mind, can you grab a few items that might kick him in the ass and get him moving?
I mean, I hired him to actually do stuff. I could teach a squirrel to do it faster.
Ever heard of a chill emergency? Yeah, me neither. But Jahri seems to think it's a thing, and guess what? He hasn t moved from his spot!
I totally forgot working for Zogar didn't I?
Great. Another Jahri in the making.
Fantastic. Guess I should've asked the squirrels instead.
Perfect. Jahri's got a new buddy to do nothing with.

name: Study of the Wooden Deer

target.label: Wooden Deer
target.landmark: Embark on a perilous hunt for a Wooden Deer in Windreach Woods for Ludwig's research

journal: Ludwig Schatten Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp Embark on a perilous hunt for a Wooden Deer in Windreach Woods for Ludwig's research.
objectives: Look to the northeast for Petalgrove, south of the river. There you will find the great Wooden Deer.
Don't forget! We need you to find a Wooden Deer in Windreach Woods.

npc: Fantastic! Stay sharp and remember, Wooden Deer are more dangerous than they look. Or so I've heard.
How's the Wooden Deer hunt? Any luck?
Don't forget! A Wooden Deer from Windreach Woods is what we need.
Found that Wooden Deer yet? I've got my dissecting tools ready!
Oh, ho, ho! Isn't this a beauty! Good job, you.
Look at the bark on this beast! You've done well. Now, to the dissecting table!
Don't forget! We need you to find a Wooden Deer in Windreach Woods.
Here's a little thank you from the Keepers.
Imagine a creature that's more tree than beast, wandering the woods like a lost limb of Mother Nature herself.
I'm dying to dissect one of these natural marvels! With your help, science will march on!
With your help, science will march on!
Oh, did I scare you? No worries, they're only slightly deadly.
Just think about it. It's not every day you get to hunt a tree-beast.
Scared of a little tree? I won't tell anyone.
Ah, the elusive Wooden Deer. A creature of splinter and leaf, bark and bone.
Just northeast of us is Petalgrove, south of the river, where you'll find the great Wooden Deer.
I wouldn't travel alone though, it will put up a heck of a fight.

name: Wulbyan's Challenge

target.label: Objects Chest Island
target.landmark: Open the legendary chest on the southwest corner of Prison Island and retrieve Raiders Totems to give to Wulbyan

journal: Wulbyan Bloodroar Goldenfield, Faidens camp top centre Open the legendary chest on the southwest corner of Prison Island and retrieve Raiders Totems to give to Wulbyan.
objectives: Remember, you need to open that legendary chest when it appears. Be prepared, other warriors will want its treasures as well!
goalTexts: Bring all the items to Wulbyan Bloodroar

npc: Your skills have grown, warrior. I've been watching you.
There's a legendary chest that appears on this island from time to time. It's filled with treasures only the greatest fighters deserve.
Only by venturing to the island against other adventurers will the chest appear on the southwest corner of the island.
I challenge you to seize this chest when it next appears.
Prove your strength and honor by facing off against other contenders.
Bring me the Raiders Totems from the chest as proof of your valor.
These Totems are ancient relics of immense power.
Hmph, perhaps you're not ready after all.
Suit yourself, but opportunities like this don't come often.
A true warrior wouldn't hesitate, but I won't force you.
Very well. Return when you're ready to prove yourself.
That's the spirit! I knew you wouldn't back down from a challenge.
May your blade be sharp and your wits sharper.
Bring me those Totems, and show everyone your true strength.
Go now, and may honor guide you.
What news do you bring?
Well done, warrior!
I knew you had it in you.
These Raiders Totems are proof of your valor.
You're closing in on your great journey! Just a few more trials.

name: Eggs for Breakfast

target.label: Egg
target.landmark: Search farms around Goldenfield or butcher birds

journal: Guru David Goldenfield, Yoga Lake Search farms around Goldenfield or butcher birds.
objectives: I need 10 fresh eggs for my breakfast! You can find them from local farmers. Visit local farms and gather 10 eggs. The local farms are known for their fresh produce. Be sure to get the eggs without causing a ruckus!

npc: You're a lifesaver, my friend. Remember, the eggs must be fresh and unbroken!
Remember, keep the eggs intact!
How goes the quest for the eggs?
Those eggs better be fresh and unbroken when you bring them back!
You did it! The eggs are perfect. Here's your reward, and may your chi be ever balanced!
Excellent work! Here's the Talent Renewal Cube. Use it to reimagine your passive skills without losing your progress or experience.
Great job! These eggs will make a fantastic breakfast. Take this Talent Renewal Cube as a token of my gratitude.
I've been meditating all night and I'm famished. I need 10 fresh eggs for breakfast.
Local farmers have the best fresh eggs. Their farms are well-stocked.
Make sure the eggs are fresh. I can't meditate properly on an empty stomach!
Be careful not to break them. A broken egg is no good to me.
As a reward, you'll receive a Talent Renewal Cube. This will allow you to reset your passive skills without losing any of your progress or experience.
The Talent Renewal Cube is a valuable tool, granting you the ability to adjust your abilities while preserving all your achievements.
Oh, that's a shame. I guess my breakfast can wait.
No worries, maybe next time you'll feel more inclined to help.
Alright, but you'll miss out on the Talent Renewal Cube.

name: The Young Woodraptor Predicament

target.label: Young Woodraptor
target.landmark: Ludwig needs your help to hunt a Young Woodraptor in Westwind Woods for his research

journal: Ludwig Schatten Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp Ludwig needs your help to hunt a Young Woodraptor in Westwind Woods for his research.
objectives: Find Wildstart Crater north of Windstone Village. If you hit the river, you've gone too far.

npc: Fantastic! Bring me that Young Woodraptor and we'll make scientific history!
Have you found a Young Woodraptor yet? I'm eager to learn more about them.
Ho, ho, you did it! This Young Woodraptor is a real treasure.
And, of course, here s some treasure for you.
How goes the Woodraptor hunt?
Remember, Young Woodraptors are feisty little critters. Don't underestimate them.
Don't forget, we need a Young Woodraptor from Westwind Woods.
The Young Woodraptor is an enigma. Why are they more aggressive than the adults?
Is it because they're trying to prove themselves? Or maybe they're just cranky?
Either way, I'd love to learn more about them. And you're going to help me!
Oh well, can't blame a guy for trying.
No harm done. If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
Scared of a little Woodraptor? Don't worry, they're more bark than bite... well, mostly.
Ever been north of Windstone Village? You'll find Wildstart Crater... This is where the Woodraptor nests.

name: Zero To Hero Ish

target.landmark: txt

journal: Flint Thistlewick Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. txt
objectives: Vexina s got what we need, but she won t give it up for free. Head east to the Great Steppe Stronghold and find her.

npc: You ever hear the phrase a hero is only as good as his gear ? No? Well, I live by it! And, uh my gear needs some serious upgrades.
Prison Island. Dangerous place. Monsters. Rogues. Probably haunted. BUT! It has the materials I need to become the hero I was meant to be!
Thing is I don t exactly know what I need yet. That s where Vexina comes in. She s sharp. Knows all about that death trap. Real dark and mysterious. Like a cool antihero.
She ll have the info we need. Only problem? She won t just give it away.
Find her and see if you can get her to give you information about what I need from the island and what to expect.
You ll be able to find her to the east, at the Great Steppe Stronghold probably swooning over the degenerates there no doubt.
Wait until she gets a load of my new suit though!
Yes! A step closer to greatness!
Fantastic! You re making history, my friend. My history.
Good choice. If anyone can convince Vexina, it s you. Or someone more charming.
What? You d leave a wannabe hero stranded?
Oh. No, yeah, I get it. Why help a guy become a living legend when you could.
Fine, fine. I ll just wait here. Helpless.
Stick around and perhaps I ll have something for you after all.
Perhaps he would make a more worthy hunt in his new armor. Hm
What did the man in the tin can say? I ve fought many great battles, but why would I help him?
Ah, a new hunt approaches. Looks strong worthy.
